I jov muliakiréla tumen kurtalakire jagorosa. Jov na javéla te tanginél (te žalinel) tumen, te tanginél, i jov na javéla lačhé-ilytko ke tumé.”" 
Jeremiah21:11 A kralískire Judejákire kheréske phen adiáke: ‘Šunén Ráskire-Devléskiro lav," 
Jeremiah22:1 Adiáke phendiá Raj Devél, mánge, Jeriemiejoske: “Džá dro kher Judejákire kralískiro, i odój phen davá lav," 
Jeremiah22:2 i phen: “O, Králi Judejákiro! Šun Ráskire-Devléskiro lav, tu, kon isyn beštó pe Davidóskiro trono, tu i tyré dynárja, i manušá, savé zadžána pirdál daja pórta!" 
Jeremiah22:6 Pal-dová so adiáke phendiá Raj Devél pal Judejákiro kher: “Tu san šukár vaš Mánge syr Galaádo, syr vučipén pe Livanoskiri bérga: ne Me, čačes, keráva tútyr čhučí phuv, fóro, dro savó nikón na dživéla." 
Jeremiah22:11 paldavá adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél pal Salumoste (Šalumoste), Iosijakire čhavéste, kon sys králi Judejákiro, savó kralindia paló Iosijaste, léskire dadéste, savó gijá péskire phuvjátyr: ‘Jov butýr na risjola pale;" 
Jeremiah22:18 Paldavá adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél pal Ioakimoste (Jahakimoste), Iosijakire (Josijaskire) čhavéste, kralíste pe Judéia: ‘Na javéna te obroven les “so ž Miro pšal? I so ž Mirí phen?” Na javéna te obroven les: “So ž, tu san, miro Khieningo?” i “So ž léskiro baripén?”" 
Jeremiah22:24 “Me som džidó”, – rakiréla Raj Devél, – mek Iiehonija [Koniah-ju.o.], čhavó Ioakimoskiro, králi Judejákiro, te javél sýrby angrusty jakhitkonesa (piečatka) pe Miro čačó vast, ne Me i odothýr vytyrdavas tut," 
Jeremiah22:30 Adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél: “Začhinen (zapisynen) kadalé manušés, Iiehonijas, syr bičhavorengires, syr manušés, saveskiro džiibén na javéla mištó; pal-dová so nijékh léskire kheritkoné rodóstyr na javéla te dživél mištés, i na javéla te bešél pe Davidóskiro trono, i na javéla te xulainél butýr pir Judéia.”" 
Jeremiah23:6 Dre dolé dyvesá Judéia javéla zrakhny, i Izrailjo javéla te dživél bi darákiro. Jov javéla te kharelpe: ‘Raj Devél isyn amaró Čačipén.’" 
Jeremiah24:1 O, Raj Devél sykadiá mánge, i, ake, duj korzíny (khudé) inžyrosa čhudé angíl Ráskire-Devléskiri Khangirí. Davá sys paló (poslie) dová, kielo Navuhodonosóro, králi Vavilonóskiro, zalydžijá dro pliéno Jerusalimóstyr Iiehonijas, čhavés Iohakimoskires, kralís Judejakires, i Judejakiren thagar'jén, i spiecen dre vastytka butiá kaštesa (kherá-keribnaskiren), i petalengiren (kovalién), i jov jandiá len dro Vavilóno." 
Jeremiah24:5 ‘Adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél, Izrailjoskiro Devél: “Syr davá lačhó inžyro, adiáke i Me javáva te ginav pal lačhende manušénde, savén zalydžine dro pliéno Judejátyr, konés Me bičhadjom krig dalé štetóstyr pe phuv Xaldiejengiri." 
Jeremiah24:8 A so pal dová bibáht inžyro, so les naštý te xas, šunén: ‘Adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél: ‘Dasaví bibáht Me keráva Sedekijaske, kralíske Judejátyr, i léngire thagar'jénge, i manušénge Jerusalimóstyr, savé jačnépe pe daja phuv, i kodolénge, savé jačnépe pe Jegiptóskiri phuv.’" 
Jeremiah25:1 Ake, isyn lav, savó javdiá ke Jeriemiéjo pal saré manušénde Judejátyr dro štárto berš, syr Ioakimo, čhavó Iosijáskiro – králi pir Judéia, lyjá te kralinél. Davá sys pérvo berš, syr Navuhodonosóro, lyjá te kralinél pir Vavilóno." 
Jeremiah25:2 Davá lav proróko Jeriemiéjo phendiá saré manušénge Judejátyr i saré manušénge Jerusalimóstyr, rakirí:" 
Jeremiah25:3 “Biš te trin berš – dešutritone beršestyr, syr kralindia Iosija, čhavó Amonóskiro, králi Judejákiro ke adadyvés javélas ke me lav Rástyr-Devléstyr, i me, Jeriemiéjo, rakirdjom tuménge, uštyi pe zlóko (ránko) i rakirí, ne tumé na šundlé." 
Jeremiah25:18 ke Jerusalimo i ke saré fórja Judejátyr, léngire kral'jén i léngire thagar'jen, sob (kaj) te keráv léndyr čhučó štéto, sob (kaj) pe lénde te divinenpe trašasa [darátyr-r.s.], te sipinen, Me keráva léngire lavéstyr košybén (arman), syr davá isyn až i ke davá dyvés;" 
Jeremiah26:1 Dro sámo anglypén (načalo), kiéli kralindia Ioakimo, čhavó Iosijáskiro, králi pir Judéia, javdiá dasavo lav Rástyr-Devléstyr mánge, Jeriemiejoske, phení:" 
Jeremiah26:2 “Adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél: ‘Terdjov pe gréda (dvóro) Khangirjákiri Ráskire-Devléskiri i phen saré for'jenge Judejátyr, so javéna te den patýv dre Khangirí Ráskire-Devléskiri, saré lavá, so Me priphenava túke te phenés lénge: Na garav ani jékh lav." 
Jeremiah26:10 Kiéli thagárja Judejákire šundlé saré kadalé lavá, jone giné Kralískire kheréstyr ke Khangirí Ráskire-Devléskiri, i jone bešné ke zagiibén dre neví pórta dre Khangirí Ráskire-Devléskiri.”" 
Jeremiah26:18 “Mihaj Morašostyr angilphenelas dro dyvés, kiéli o Jezekíia sys králi pir Judéia, i phendiá saré manušénge Judejátyr, rakirí: ‘Adiáke rakiréla bolybnáskire-jangoléngiro Raj Devél: “Sióno javéla pharado syr phuv pluĥostyr (pharadiatyr), Jerusalimóstyr jačénape ruíny [bará-r.s.], I bérga, kaj isyn Khangirí, javéla syr bérgica maškír veš." 
Jeremiah26:19 Ci Jezekíia, králi Judejákiro, i sarí Judéia muliakirdé les? Ci so jov, Jezekíia, na darelas i na rodelas Devléskiri láska. I Raj Devél potangindia (požalindia) pal bibáht, so Jov vyphendia pe lénde. Ne ame kerása baró čoripén proti amaré dijá.”" 
Jeremiah27:1 Angíl, kiéli o Sedekíia; čhavó Iosijáskiro sys králi pe Judéia, dasavo lav javdiá Jeriemiejoske." 
Jeremiah27:3 i bičháv len Idumejakire (Edomoskire) kralíske, Moavoskire kralíske, Amonitengire-čhavéngire kralíske, Tiroskire kralíske, Sidonoskire kralíske bičhaibnaskirengire vastésa, savé javéna ke Jerusalimo, ke králi Sedekíia pir Judéia." 
Jeremiah27:12 I me phendjom Sedekijaske, kralíske pe Judéia, saré dasavé-sama lavá, rakirí: “Čhuvén tumaré menia dro ĥámo kralískiro Vavilonóstyr, i tumé dynarinén léske, i léskire manušénge i te dživén’ javéna tumé:" 
Jeremiah27:18 Ne kóli jone isyn proróki, i, kóli isyn Devléskiro lav lénde, mek jone te mangén zoralés Ras-Devlés, jangoléngire-bolybnaskires, sob (kaj) khoré (sasúdy), savé jačnépe dre Ráskire-Devléskiro Khangirí, i dro kher Kralískiro Judejákiro, i dro Jerusalimo te na piridžan ke Vavilóno." 
Jeremiah27:20 saré dolé kuč priedmiéty, savé na lyjá Navuhodonosóro pésa, kiéli lydžijá dro pliéno Iiehonijas, Jehakimoskire čhavés, kralís pir Judéia, Jerusalimóstyr ke Vavilóno, i saré lačhé-rodoskiren manušén Judejátyr i Jerusalimóstyr," 
Jeremiah27:21 čačó, adiáke rakiréla bolybnáskire-jangoléngiro Raj Devél, Izrailjoskiro Devél pal khoré (sasúdy), so jačénape dre Khangirí Raskiri-Devléskiri, i dro kher kralískiro Judejátyr i dro Jerusalimo:" 
Jeremiah28:1 I sys davá dro dová-sámo berš, angíl, kiéli o Sedekíia kralindia pe Judéia, dro štárto berš, dro pándžto čhon, so Ananija, Azuroskiro čhavó, proróko Gavaonostyr, rakirdiá mánge dre Khangirí Ráskire-Devléskiri angíl rašande i saré manušénde, i phendiá:" 
Jeremiah28:4 I Me janáva pale pe davá štéto Iiehonijas, čhavés Joakimoskires, kralís pe Judéia, saré Judejákire plienonen, kon gijá ke Vavilóno’, – rakiréla Raj Devél – pal-dová so Me phagirava ĥámo kralískiro Vavilonóstyr”.’" 
Jeremiah29:2 Davá sys paló (poslie) dová, kiéli o Jehonija králi i králica, i jevnuhi, i thagárja Judejákire i Jerusalimóstyr, i spiécy dre vastytka butiá pir kašt (kherá-kheribnaskire) i petalengire (kovali) vyginé Jerusalimóstyr." 
Jeremiah29:3 O Jeriemiéjo piridyja davá lyl dro vast Jeliasoske (Eljasoske), čhavéske Šafanoskireske, i Ĥemarijaske, čhavéske Xielkijaskireske, savén o Sedekíia, králi Judejákiro, bičhadiá ke Navuhodonosóro, králi Vavilonóskiro. Dro lyl rakirdiape:" 
Jeremiah29:22 I pal lénde léngire lavá javéna syr prokošybén (arman) maškír saré Judejákire pliennonende dro Vavilóno, syr jone javéna te rakirén: ‘Mek te kerél adiáke túke Raj Devél syr Sedekijaske i Ahavoske, savén Vavilonóskiro králi pekcia pe jag;" 
Jeremiah30:3 Ake javéna dyvesá’, – rakiréla Raj Devél, – ‘Kiéli Me janáva pale plienóstyr Miré manušén Izrailjostyr i Judejátyr’, – rakiréla Raj Devél. ‘I Me keráva adiáke, sob (kaj) jone te risjon pe phuv, saví Me dyjom léngire dadénge, sob (kaj) jone te javén xulaja pe láte.’”" 
Jeremiah30:4 I, ake, isyn lavá, so phendiá Raj Devél pal Izrailie i pal Judéia:" 
Jeremiah31:23 Adiáke rakiréla bolybnáskire-jangoléngiro Raj Devél, Izrailjoskiro Devél: “Kiéli Me janáva len plienóstyr, jone nevéstyr javéna te rakirén davá lav pe Judejakiri phuv i dre lákire fórja: ‘Te bahtiakirél Raj Devél tut, o čačipnáskiro kher, o svénto bérga!’" 
Jeremiah31:24 I odój pe lénde jačéna te dživén manušá Judejátyr, i dre saré léngire fórja, phuvjákire xulaja i kodolé javír manušá, savé psiréna ĥurtenca." 
Jeremiah31:27 “Ake, javéna dyvesá’, – rakiréla Raj Devél’, – so Me keráva adiáke, sob (kaj) dro Judejákiro i dro Izrailjoskire kherá te bijandjon (lotjon) manušá, i te bijandjon kherítka murdalá (skoto)." 
Jeremiah31:31 “I javéna dyvesá’, – rakiréla Raj Devél, – ‘kiéli Me sčhuvava Nevó Zavieto Izrailjoskire kheresa i Judejákire kheresa –" 
Jeremiah31:33 ‘Ake, isyn Zaviéto, savó Me sčhuvava Izrailjoskire kheresa i Judejákire kheresa. Pale dolé dyvesá’, – rakiréla Raj Devél’, – ‘Me čhuváva Miro Zakóno andré lénde i Me čhináva davá dro léngire ile, i Me javáva léngiro Devél, i jone javéna Miré manušá." 
Jeremiah32:1 Lav, savó sys ke Jeriemiéjo Rástyr-Devléstyr pe déšto berš Sedekijaskiro-kralískiro dre Judéia, davá sys dešuohtoto berš, syr o Navuhodonosóro lyjá te kralinél." 
Jeremiah32:2 Dro dolé dyvesá Vavilonóskiro xaladybén (armija) občhudiá trusciál Jerusalimo i o Jeriemiéjo, proróko, sys phandlo dre gréda (dvóro) štaribnaskiri, so sys dro kher kralískiro Judejákiro." 
Jeremiah32:3 O Sedekíia, králi Judejákiro, phandia les dro štaribén, rakirí: “Sóske tu angilphenesa i rakirésa: ‘Adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél: ‘Áke, Me otdáva davá fóro dro vast kralískiro Vavilonóskiro, i jov léla les’;" 
Jeremiah32:4 i Sedekíia, králi Judejákiro, na zrakhélape Xaldiejéngire vasténdyr, ne jov adiáke peréla dro vast kralískiro Vavilonóskiro, i jov javéla te rakirél lésa muial (muj pe muj), i te dykhél les jakh pe jakh;" 
Jeremiah32:12 i me dyjom javír kopija pe kinybnytko lyl Varuhoske, Nirijaskire čhavéske, čhavéske Maasijaskireske angíl Anamieiloskire jakhá, miré-kakeskire čhavéskire i pe jakhá jakhitkengire, savé podčhindlepe pe kinybnytko lyl angíl saré Judénde, kon sys bešté pe gréda (dvóro), kaj stréga sys." 
Jeremiah32:30 E čhavé Izrailjoskire i e čhavé Judejákire kerdé jekh čoripén angíl Mánde tyknal/ sternal (smolodu); čačó, čhavé Izrailjoskire, féni dénas jag Miré xoliake pal butiá, so kerdé léngire vastá’, – rakiréla Raj Devél." 
Jeremiah32:32 pal saró čoripén, so kerdé čhavé Izrailjostyr, i čhavé Judejátyr, so jone dyné jag Miré xoliake pe lénde: jone, léngire králja, léngire thagárja, léngire rašaja i léngire proróki, muršá Judejákire i džiibnáskire (žytieli) Jerusalimóskire." 
Jeremiah32:35 I jone čhudé vučé štéty Vaaloske pe dólo Jenomoskire [Ginomoskire-ju.o.] čhavéngiro, sob (kaj) te lydžán pirdál jag léngire čhavén i čhajén te den patýv Molohoske: so Me priphendjom te na kerén lénge, so na javdiá Mánge pe godý, sob (kaj) jone te kerén dalé džungalé réndy, sob (kaj) manušá Judejákire te kerén grého.”" 
Jeremiah32:44 E manušá javéna te kinen féldy pal lové (rup), i te podčhinen lylá (brify), i te čhuvén čergen pe lénde, i te len jakhitkonen pe phuv Vienjaminoskiri, i pe štéty, i so isyn pašýl Jerusalimo, i dre fórja Judejákire, i dre fórja pe bérgi, i dre fórja pe telatuné štéty, i dre fórja paš-dyvesytka (južna), pal-dová so Me riskiráva len plienóstyr”, – rakiréla Raj Devél." 
Jeremiah33:4 Pal-dová so, ake, so rakiréla Raj Devél, Izrailjoskiro Devél, pal kherá dro Jerusalimo i pal kral'jengire kherá, so isyn dre Judéia, savé phagirena pir dová, sob (kaj) te javén maribnýtka valy léndyr i kurtála vaš maribén:" 
Jeremiah33:7 I Me keráva adiáke, so risjona pale emanuša dro pliéno Judejátyr i Izrailjostyr, i Me pirikerava dolé štéty, syr jone sys ĥaredyr (ĥará)." 
Jeremiah33:10 Adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél: “Adadyvés nevéstyr javéla te šunelpe pe davá štéto, pal savó tumé rakiréna: ‘Davá štéto isyn čhučó, ni manušá, ni kherítka murdalá’ – dre Judejákire fórja, pe Jerusalimóskire pe vulícy (gásy) isyn čhučó, ni manušá, ni savó džiibnáskiro, ni kherítko murdál," 
Jeremiah33:13 Dre fórja bergitka, dre fórja pe dólo, i dre fórja paš-dyvesytka (južna), pe phuv Vienjaminoskiri, i pe štéty trusciál Jerusalimo, i dre fórja Judejákire, ĥurty javéna te džán péske nevéstyr tel manušéskiro vast, savó ginéla len, – rakiréla Raj Devél." 
Jeremiah34:2 ‘Adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél, Devél Izrailjoskiro: “Džá i rákir Sedekijasa, kralísa pe Judéia i phen léske: ‘Adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél: Áke, Me otdáva davá fóro dro vastá kralíske Vavilonóstyr, i jov xačkiréla les jagása." 
Jeremiah34:4 Féni šun lav Ráskiro-Devléskiro, o Sedekíia, králi Judejákiro! Ake, so rakiréla Raj Devél pal túte: ‘Tu na merésa kurtalátyr," 
Jeremiah34:6 I proróko Jeriemiéjo phendiá saré dalé lavá Sedekijaske, kralíske Judejakireske, dro Jerusalimo," 
Jeremiah34:7 kiéli kralískire-Vavilonóskiro xaladybén marelaspe proti Jerusalimo, i proti saré fórja dre Judéia, so jačnépe: proti Lahiso i Azeka; pal-dová so féni dalé fórja zoralé vantenca jačnépe Judejákire for'jéndyr." 
Jeremiah34:9 sob (kaj) kažno (sváko) manúš te otmekél pe vólia péskire murškané i džuvlikane pisharís – Judos, ci Judyca, sob (kaj) nijékh léndyr te na rikirél Judejos (Judos) pšalés dre navolia." 
Jeremiah34:19 thagar'jen Judejátyr, thagar'jen Jerusalimóstyr, jevnuhen, rašán, i saré manušén dolé phuvjátyr, savé proginé maškír pašá cieliantoskire," 
Jeremiah34:21 I Me dáva Sedekijas, kralís Judejakires, i léskire thagar'jén dro vastá léngire vergéngire, dro vastá odolénge, savé rodéna léngiro di, i dro vastá kralískire-Vavilonóskire xaladybnaske, so risiné pale tuméndyr." 
Jeremiah34:22 Ake, Me priphenava, – rakiréla Raj Devél, – ‘i Me keráva adiáke, so jone risjona ke davá fóro. Jone džána maribnása pe davá fóro i shačkirena les jagása; i Me keráva fórja dre Judéia čhučé, bi manušéngiro’”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Lav, savó sys ke Jeriemiéjo Rástyr-Devléstyr dre Ioakimoskire dyvesá, čhavéskire Iosijaskire (Josijaskire), kon sys králi pir Judéia, rakirí:" 
Jeremiah35:13 ‘Adiáke rakiréla bolybnáskire-jangoléngiro Raj Devél, Devél Izrailjoskiro: “Džá i phen manušénge Judejátyr i odolénge, kon dživéla ke Jerusalimo: ‘Ci na priléna tumé uphenybén te šunén Miré lavá?’”, – rakiréla Raj Devél." 
Jeremiah35:17 Paldavá adiáke rakiréla bolybnáskire-jangoléngiro Raj Devél, Izrailjoskiro Devél: “Ake, Me janáva pe Judéia, i pe saré manušénde, kon dživéla ke Jerusalimo, saró fuipén, so Me khardjom len, ne jone na otphendlé Mánge.’”" 
Jeremiah36:1 I sys adiáke dro štárto berš Ioakimoskiro (čhavó Iosijáskiro), kon sys králi pe Judéia, sys dasavo lav Jeriemiejoske Rástyr-Devléstyr, phení:" 
Jeremiah36:6 Paldavá tu džá i gin zoralés (de upré) svitkostyr lavá, so tu začhindian miré čibatyr (lavéndyr). De upré lavá Ráskire-Devléskire dro dyvés, kiéli postinena, dre kaná manušénge Judejátyr, savé javéna péskire for'jéndyr." 
Jeremiah36:9 I sys adiáke, so dro pándžto berš Ioakimoskiro (čhavó Iosijáskiro), kon sys králi pe Judéia, dro jeniáto (bijekhéskiro déšto) čhon, so posto isyn phendló te rikirén sarénge manušénge Jerusalimóstyr i saré manušénge, savé javné for'jéndyr dre Judéia ke Jerusalimo," 
Jeremiah36:28 “Le javír svítko i začhin pe léste saré lavá, so sys angledýr pe pérvo svítko, savó Ioakimo, králi Judejákiro, xačkirdiá." 
Jeremiah36:29 I tu phen Ioakimoske, kralíske pe Judéia, – ‘adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél: ‘Tu xačkirdian davá svítko, phení: ‘Sóske tu čhindian pe léste, so o králi Vavilonóskiro, čačes, javéla i xasiakiréla daja phuv, i jov keréla adiáke, so na javéla ni manúš, ni murdál (žyvotno) odój.’”" 
Jeremiah36:30 Paldavá adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél pal Ioakimoste, kralíste pe Judéia: ‘Léstyr na javéla nijékh te bešél pe Davidóskiro trono, i léskiro trúpo čhurdena pe xačkiribén dyvesé, i pe mrazo ratý." 
Jeremiah36:31 I Me javáva te sendiakirav les, i léskiro kherítko ródo i léskire dynar'jén pal léngiro čoripén, i Me janáva bibáht (bída) pe lénde, i pe džiibnaskirende dro Jerusalimo, pe muršende dre Judéia, so Me phendjom pe lénde, ne jone na pričhude kan.’”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Tén'ci Jeriemiéjo lyjá javír svítko i dyjá les Varuhoske, lylá-čhinybnaskireske, čhavéske Nierijaskire, savó čhindiá pe svítko saré lavá Jeriemiejoskire čibatyr, saré dolé lavá lylvarjatyr, so xačkirdiá dre jag o Ioakimo, králi pe Judéia; i odój sys but dočhude lavá, savé sys dasavé-pac' syr i pérva lavá." 
Jeremiah37:1 I lyjá te kralinél o Sedekíia, čhavó Iosijáskiro, pe štéto Iiehonijaskiro, savó sys čhavó Ioakimoskiro, konés Navuhodonosóro králi Vavilonóskiro čhudiá syr kralís pe phuv Judejakiri." 
Jeremiah37:7 “Adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél, Devél Izrailjoskiro: Adiáke tumé phenén Judejákire kralíske, kon bičhadiá tumen ke Me, sob (kaj) te phučén Mándyr: ‘Áke, isyn faraonóskiro xaladybén, so vygijá te podel vast tuménge, javéla te risjol pale pe péskiri phuv." 
Jeremiah38:19 I o králi Sedekíia phendiá Jeriemiejoske: “Me darava Judeiendyr (Judendyr), savé našné (piriginé) ke Xaldiéi, sob (kaj) e Xaldiei te na vyden man dre vastá léngire, i sob (kaj) jone te na kerén mánca, so jone zakamena.”" 
Jeremiah38:22 ‘Áke, saré džuvlién, savé jačnépe dro kher kralískiro pe Judéia, janéna ke Vavilonóskire thagárja, i kodolé džuvliá phenéna túke: ‘Tyré malá podrakirde tut, i jone lyné upralypén pe túte, tyré ĥerá tasadyne dre bláta (artapiel') I jone risiné krig tútyr.’" 
Jeremiah39:1 I sys adiáke: dro déšto čhon, dro jeniáto (bijekhéskiro déšto) berš, kiéli o Sedekíia sys Judejákiro králi, javdiá o králi Navuhodonosóro Vavilonóstyr i saró léskiro xaladybén proti Jerusalimo, i jone občhude trusciál (krugom) fóro." 
Jeremiah39:4 I sys adiáke: kiéli o Sedekíia, králi Judejákiro, i javír muršá xaladéngire (maribnýtka) dykhné len, tedy jone lyné te našén, i jone giné javrí foróstyr ratý, kralískire untasa (sadosa) pirdál pórta maškirál duj vánty. I jone giné dromésa pir dólo Jordanoskiro." 
Jeremiah39:6 I králi Vavilonóskiro muliakirdiá čhavén Sedekijaskiren angíl léskire jakhá dre Rivla, i králi Vavilonóskiro adiáke-pac' muliakirdiá lačhé-rodoskire ran Judejátyr;" 
Jeremiah39:10 Ne o Navuzardano, raj pe kralískiri stréga, mekciá čororé manušén, konéste ničý na sys, pe phuv Judejakiri, i jov dyjá lénge vinagradýtka barja i féldy dro dová-pac' časo." 
Jeremiah40:1 Lav, savó sys Jeriemiejoske Rástyr-Devléstyr paló (poslie) dová, syr o Navuzardano, raj pe kralískiri stréga, mekciá les te džal Ramatyr, kiéli jov lyjá les, savó sys phandlo zandir'jénca maškír sarénde, konés lydžiné dro pliéno Jerusalimóstyr i Judejátyr, savén lyné dro pliéno ke Vavilóno." 
Jeremiah40:5 Akaná, kiéli Jeriemiéjo iščo (inké) na otphendiá (na gijá krig), o Navuzardano phendiá: “Džá pale ke Godolija [Gedaliah-ju.o.], čhavó Ahikamoskiro (ŭnuko Safanoskiro), konés králi Vavilonóskiro, čhudiá syr barydyrés pe fórja Judejákire, i jačpe te dživés maškír manušénde; ci džá vari-karik te javél kučes túke pir tyrí godý.’ I raj pe kralískiri stréga dyjá léske xabén pe drom, počastunko i mekciá les te džal." 
Jeremiah40:11 I adiáke-pac' i saré Judei (Judy), kon sys dro Moávo i maškír Amonitianende, dre Idumeja (Edómo), i dre javír thema, šundlé, so králi Vavilonóskiro mekciá paš Judén, i so jov čhudiá pe lénde Godolijas, čhavés Ahikamoskires (čhavés Safanoskires)," 
Jeremiah40:12 i tedy saré adalé Judy risiné saré šteténdyr, ke savé len tradyne, i jone javné ke phuv Judejakiri, ke Godolija dre Masífa, i jone skedyné mol (vino), i lynaitka barjakirdé (plódy) drieván but." 
Jeremiah41:3 I o Ismailo adiáke-pac' pekadiá pe meribén saré Judén, savé sys Godolijasa dre Masífa (Micpa), i Xaldiején, konés jov lathiá odój: maribnytkoné (xaladytkone) manušén." 
Jeremiah43:4 Ake, o Iohanano, čhavó Kariejoskiro, i saré raja xaladéngire i saré manušá, na kandyné zan Ráskire-Devléskiri, sob (kaj) te jačénpe te dživén pe phuv Judejakiri." 
Jeremiah43:5 Ne Ioanano, čhavó Karejaskiro i saré raja xaladéngire, lyné sarén, savé jačnépe Judejátyr, kon na risiné te jačénpe te dživén pe Judejakiri phuv, saré Najudytkoné nacyiéndyr, ke savé len tradyne –" 
Jeremiah43:9 “Le baré bará dre vastá péskire i garav len dre ĥleja (glina) dro bar, savó isyn pe štéto, syr džása andré kher Faraonóskiro pe jakhá saré Judéngire," 
Jeremiah44:1 Lav, savó sys Jeriemiejoske pal saré Judénde, kon dživdiá pe phuv Jegiptóskiri, savé jačné te dživén ke Magdola [Migdola-ju.o.], i dro Tafniso (Tafaniesa), dro Nofo, i pe phuv Pafrososkiri, rakirí:" 
Jeremiah44:2 “Adiáke rakiréla bolybnáskire-jangoléngiro Raj Devél, Devél Izrailjoskiro: ‘Tumé dykhné sarí bibáht (bída), so Me jandjom pe Jerusalimo i pe saré fórja Judejákire; i, ake, dalé fórja isyn čhučé (pusta), i nijékh (nikón) na dživéla odój," 
Jeremiah44:6 Paldavá Miro xoliakiribén i Mirí xolý vyčhudepe i roshačine dre fórja Judejákire i pe vulícy (gásy) Jerusalimóskire; i jone isyn čhučé i bi manušéngire, syr isyn davá adadyvés." 
Jeremiah44:7 I akaná – adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél, bolybnáskire-jangoléngiro Devél, Devél Izrailjoskiro: ‘Vaš (pal) so tumé keréna daja bari bibáht proti péste, sóske tumé keréna adiáke, sob (kaj) te xasjon tumaré muršá i džuvliá, bijaty i tyknemasa, sob (kaj) te na jačélpe nijékh Judejátyr," 
Jeremiah44:9 Ci bistyrde tumé fuipén tumaré-dadéngiro, fuipén kral'jéngiro Judejátyr, fuipén léngire-romniengiro do-sámo fuipén, so tumé kokoré kerdé, i fuipén, so tumaré džuvliá kerdé pe phuv Judejakiri i pe vulícy (gásy) dro Jerusalimo." 
Jeremiah44:11 Paldavá – ake, so rakiréla bolybnáskire-jangoléngiro Raj Devél, Devél Izrailjoskiro: “Ake, Me riskiráva Miro muj proti tuménde vaš bibáht, i vaš xasiban Judejákiro." 
Jeremiah44:12 I Me láva kodolén, savé jačénape Judejátyr, sob (kaj) jone te riskirén péskire muiá te džán pe phuv Jegiptóskiri te dživén syr čúža; odój jone xasjona saré i lénge javéla xasibén pe phuv Jegiptóskiri. Jone xasjona kurtalátyr i bokhátyr. Jone meréna, tyknestyr ke naj baredýr kurtalátyr, bokhátyr, i pe tuménde javéla prokošybén i dívo trašasa (trašaibén), prokošybén i bipatyv." 
Jeremiah44:14 sob (kaj) nijékh, kon jačélape Judejátyr, savé javné pe phuv Jegiptóskiri te dživén odój syr čúža, te na kerenpe nikaj, i te na vydžidjon, sob (kaj) te risjon pale pe phuv Judejakiri, ke saví léngiro iló marelape te risjon pale i te dživén: nikón na risjola pale apríč odolénde, savé našéna.”" 
Jeremiah44:17 Ne ame, čačes javása te kerás pir kažno lav, so ame phendiam péskire čibása: te xačkiras dróga smóly bolybnytkone devlorjake i te čhuvas láke thadune svénta dyibená, syr ame kerdiám: ame i amaré dadá, amaré králja i amaré thagárja dre fórja Judejákire i pe vulícy (gásy) Jerusalimóskire. Paldavá aménde sys but maró, aménge sys mištés, i ame na dykhciam bibáht." 
Jeremiah44:21 “Ci davá isyn na dróga smóly, so tumé xačkirdé dre fórja Judejákire i pe vulícy (pe gásy) Jerusalimóskire, tumé i tumaré dadá, tumaré králja i tumaré thagárja, manušá dalé phuvjákire? Ci so davá Raj Devél na ripirdia len, ci xaj, na javdiá davá Léske pe godý?" 
Jeremiah44:24 I phendiá Jeriemiéjo saré manušénge, i saré džuvliénge: “Šunén lav Ráskire-Devléskiro, saré – Judejákire manušá, savé dživéna pe Jegiptóskiri phuv:" 
Jeremiah44:26 Pal-davá šunén lav Ráskire-Devléskiro, saré Judejákire manušá, savé dživéna pe Jegiptóskiri phuv: ‘Ake, Me sovlahadjom Miré baré lavésa’, – rakiréla Raj Devél –, sob (kaj) Miro lav te na phenél butýr nijékh manúš Judejátyr, kon dživéla pe Jegiptóskiri phuv, phení: ‘Te dživél Raj Devél, Devél.”" 
Jeremiah44:27 Ake, Me javáva te dykháv pe tuménde ke bibáht, a na vaš lačhipén: saré manušá Judejátyr, savé isyn pe phuv Judejakiri javéna te xasjon kurtalátyr, i baré bokhátyr angíl dová, syr javéla kónco (jagóro) lénge." 
Jeremiah44:28 Ne kodolé nábut manušá, savé našéna kurtalátyr, risjona pale ke phuv Judejakiri phuvjátyr Jegiptóstyr, i saré, kon jačélape Judejátyr, savé giné pe phuv Jegiptóskiri te dživén odój syr čúža, udžinena, koneskire lavá risjona dro čačipén, Miré ci léngire." 
Jeremiah44:30 ‘Adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél: ‘Áke, Me vydava faraonos Vafrijos [Xofras-ju.o.], kralís Jegiptoskires dro vastá léngire-vergéngire, savé rodéna léngiro di, syr Me vydyjom Sedekijas, kralís Judejakires, dro vast Navuhodonosoroskire, kralíske Vavilonoskireske, savó sys vérgo Sedekijaske i, kon rodyja léskiro di.’”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Lav, savó rakirdiá proróko Jeriemiéjo Varuhoske, čhavéske Nirijaskireske, kiéli o Varuho čhindiá dalé lavá dre lylvarí Jeriemiejoskire čibatyr pe štárto berš Ioakimoskiro (čhavó Iosijáskiro), kon sys králi pe Judéia, phení:" 
Jeremiah46:2 Pal Jegípto, pal xaladybén Faraonóskiro Niehajoskiro, kralískiro Jegiptóskiro, savó o Navuhodonosóro, králi Vavilonóskiro rozmardiá pašýl reka (len') Jevfrato dro Karhamiso dro štárto berš Ioakimoskiro (čhavó Iosijáskiro), kon sys králi pe Judéia:" 
Jeremiah49:34 Ráskire-Devléskiro lav, so sys Jeriemiejoske, prorokoske proti Jelamo, kiéli o Sedekíia, králi Judejákiro, lyjá te kralinél:" 
Jeremiah51:59 Ĥáda, isyn lav, so proróko Jeriemiéjo priphendiá Sieraijaske, čhavéske Nirijaskireske (kon sys unuko Maasejaskiro): kiéli jov gijá Siedekijasa, kralísa Judejátyr ke Vavilóno dre štárto berš, syr jov lyjá te kralinél. O Sieraija sys kheratuno phurydyro." 
Jeremiah52:3 Davá sys pal Ráskire-Devléskiri xolý, so kerdiápe dro Jerusalimo i Judéia i Jov riskirdiá Péstyr léngire manušén. Tén'ci Sedekíia ĥazdyjápe proti kralíste Vavilonóstyr." 
Jeremiah52:10 I čhindiá králi Vavilonóskiro čhavén Sedekijaskiren angíl léskire jakhá; i jov adiáke-pac' čhindiá saré thagar'jén Judejátyr dre Rivla. 
Jeremiah52:15 Tén'ci o Navuzardano, raj pe kralískiri stréga, lydžijá dro pliéno vari-savé čororé manušén, i javír manušén, kon jaciápe dro fóro, i kodolén, savé (našné) Judendyr ke králi Vavilonóskiro, i kodolén, savé jačnépe spiecendyr dre vastytka butiá." 
Jeremiah52:28 Ake, isyn ginybén manušéngiro, savén o Navuhodonosóro lydžijá dro pliéno: pe eftáto (bitrinéngiro déšto) berš 3023 Judén;" 
Jeremiah52:30 dro beš te tríto berš Navuhodonosoroskiro, o Navuzardano, raj pe kralískiri stréga lydžijá krig dro pliéno 745 Judén. Saré manušá, konés lydžiné dro pliéno, sys 4600." 
Jeremiah52:31 I sys adiáke: dro trijánda-eftáto berš, syr Judejákire kralís Ioakimos lyné dro pliéno, dro dešuiavir čhon, pe biš te pándžto dyvés čhonéskiro, so Jevil'-Mierodaho, králi Vavilonóskiro, ĥazdyjá angíl manušénde Ioakimos, kralís Judejakires, i mekciá pe vólia les štaribnastyr." 
Lamentations1:3 Judejákire manušá giné dre navolia, kaj menčynena len i jene isyn pharé – butiakire andynarščyki. Jone dživéna maškír Najudénde, jone na otkhinjona. Saré, kon tradyne len, javné naŭžakirdes pe lénde, syr lénge jaciá pharó te dživén." 
Lamentations1:15 Raj Devél štakirdia tel ĥerá saré miré zoralypnaskire manušén maškirál miro fóro, Jov khardiá khetané skedyibén pe mánde te zatasaven saré miré tyrnen manušén: Raj Devél štakirela sýrby dro prieso patyvalia ternia džuvliá, kon isyn Judejakiri čhaj." 
Lamentations2:2 Raj Devél xasiakirdiá i na potangindia saré Jakovóskire kherá: Jov čhurdyjá telé xoliátyr Judejákire-čhakire tvárdymi [zoralé štéty-r.s.], Jov phagirdiá sarésa len pe phuv, Jov čhudiá magiripén pe kralipén i léskire thagar'jende." 
Lamentations2:5 Raj Devél jaciá syr vérgo: Jov phagirdiá telé Izrailjo, Jov phagirdiá telé saré léskire felatiniá, Jov vymardia pe koterá léskire tvárdymi i Jov dyjá butedýr roibén i túga Judejákire Čhake." 
Lamentations5:11 Vérgi léna pe zor Sionoskire džuvlién, a patyvalé terné džuvlién dre Judejákire fórja." 
Ezekiel8:1 I sys dro šóvto berš, dro šóvto čhon, pe pándžto dyvés. Me bešavas dre miro kher, i Judejákire phurydyrá bešenas angíl mánde i pyjá pe mánde odój Ráskire-Devléskiro, Devléskiro vast." 
Ezekiel9:9 Tén'ci phendiá Jov mánge: “Izrailjoskire-kheréskiro i Judejákiro čoripén isyn baró, drieván baró, i adáia phuv isyn pherdý ratésa, i fóro isyn pherdó čoripnasa, so kerénas pehromi, doléstyr, so jone rakiréna: “Mekciá Raj Devél, Devél adáia phuv, i na dykhéla Raj Devél, Devél.”" 
Ezekiel17:15 Ne kodová (Judejákiro králi) ugija léstyr, bičhadiá péskire poslen dro Jegípto, sob (kaj) te den léske but gren i but manušén. Ci javéla léske baht? Vydživela, xaj, kodová, kon kerél davá? Jov phagirdiá dorakiribén, zrakhélape li jov?" 
Ezekiel17:16 ‘Te dživáv Me’, – rakiréla Raj Devél, Devél. “Pe štéto, kaj dživéla králi, savó čhudiá les (Judejákire kralís) kralísa, a jov na zrikirdia sovél, saví dyjá kralíske, rosphagirdiá péskiro dorakiribén lésa, jov meréla léste ke Vavilóno." 
Ezekiel21:20 Vykede drom, pir savó kur-tala džálas pe Rava, Amonoskire-čhavéngire fóro i pe Judéia, dro zorjakirdo Jerusalimo." 
Ezekiel27:17 Judeja i Izrailjoskiri phuv timisiakirenas túsa. Paldová, so tu biknesas, pleskirenas Minifoskire parné givesa, gudlypnasa, jagvinesa, kaštune ksilesa i bal'zamosa." 
Daniel1:1 Pe tríto berš Ioakimoskire (Jakimoskire) kralipnaskiro, Judejákire kralískiro, javdiá o Navuhodonosóro, Vavilonóskiro králi, ke Jerusalimo i obgija les trusciál xaladybnasa." 
Daniel1:2 I dyjá o Raj Devél dro léskiro vast e Iokimos, Judejákire kralís, i adákicy khoré (sasúdy) Devlytkoné kheréstyr, i jov bičhadiá len pe phuv Sienoar, ke léskire Devléskiro kher, i jandiá adalé saré khoré dre piralý vaš kazna léskire devleskiri." 
Daniel3:8 Paldavá dro dasavo časo podginé vari-savé Xaldiejendyr i dophendle pe Judénde. 
Daniel5:13 Tén'ci sys jandlo Danijéljo angíl kralíste, i o králi lyjá te phenél i rakirdiá Danijeljoske: “Ci san tu o Danijéljo, jekh pliennone Judytkone čhavéndyr, savén miro dad, o králi jandiá Judejátyr?" 
Hosea1:1 Ake, isyn lav Ráskire-Devléskiro, savó javdiá Osijáske, čhavéske Biejeroskiréske dre dolé dyvesá, kiéli raindlé štar králja Judejákire: Ozíia, Ioafámo (Jofamo), Aházo, i Jezekíia i dre dolé sáma dyvesá, kiéli kralindiá pe Izrailjo o Jerovoámo (Iierovoamo), čhavó Joasoskiro (Ioasoskiro)." 
Hosea6:11 Adiáke-pac', vaš túke, Jude, sykado dyvés vaš givengiro sčhinyben, kiéli Me riskiráva Miré – manušéngire plienonen." 
Joel3:1 Pal-dová so, ake, dre dolé dyvesá i dro davá časo, kiéli Me janáva pale plienone manušén Judejátyr i Jerusalimóstyr," 
Joel3:6 i manušén Judejátyr i manušén Jerusalimóstyr biknenas tumé Griekénge (Balaménge), sob (kaj) te durjakiren len miežendyr pe léngiri že phuv." 
Joel3:8 I Me biknava tumaré čhavén i čhajén dre vastá manušéngire Judejátyr, i jone biknena len Saviejenge, duratuné manušénge – adiáke phendiá Raj Devél." 
Joel3:18 I javéla adiáke dro dová dyvés, so neví mol (vino) javéla te thadel bergendyr, i thud javéla te čhuvelpe bergicendyr, i panieskire rovicy (xohojoré) dre Judéia javéna pherdé paniésa, a fontano (folahar) javéla te čhuvél pherdés paní Ráskire-Devléskire Khereskir i jov javéla te del paní pe dólo Sitimo." 
Amos1:1 Lavá Amosóskire, kon sys jekh čhupnári (pastuho) dre Fiekoia [Tekoa-ju.o.], savé léske Raj Devél sykadiá dre suné, dre odolé dyvesá, kiéli o Ozíia sys králi pe Judéia, i dre dyvesá, kiéli o Iierovoamo, čhavó Ioasoskiro, sys králi pe Izrailjo duj berš angíl phuvjákiro trinskiriben." 
Amos1:6 Adiáke rakiréla Raj Devél: “Pal trin čoripena, so kerdé manušá Gazatyr i pal štar čoripena, Me na otmekáva pharó séndo lénge, pal-dová so jone lydžiné saré Judén dro pliéno, sob (kaj) te biknen len syr pishar'jén ke Edómo." 
Amos2:5 Ne Me bičhaváva jag pe Judéia, i joj xačkiréla baré felatiniá dro Jerusalimo.”" 
Amos6:11 Pal-dová so, ake, Raj Devél priphenela, so Jov phagiréla baró kher (kralipén Izrailjoskiro) ke ruíny, i tyknó kher (kralipén Judejákiro) pe koterá." 
Micah1:1 Ake, sys lav Ráskire-Devléskiro, savó javdiá Mihiejoske Morasfiejostyr dre dolé dyvesá, kiéli sys trin králja Judejákire: Iofámo, Aházo i Jezekíia. Davá lav Devél sykadiá léske dre suné, so javéla Samarijasa i Jerusalimosa." 
Micah1:5 Saró davá pal Jakovóskiro čoripén, i pal gréhi, so kerdiá kher Izrailjoskiro. Savó isyn čoripén Jakovóskiro? Ci davá na pal Samárija? Save dalé isyn vučé štéty dre Judéia? Ci davá saró isyn na Jerusalimóstyr?" 
Micah1:9 Pal-dová so Samarijakire fránsy (rany) isyn nasastiakiribnytka, pal-dová so jone doginé ke Judéia; jone doginé ke pórta miré manušéngiri, ke Jerusalimo." 
Nahum1:12 Adiáke rakiréla Raj-Deviel Judejake: “Na dykhí pe dová, so jone, Asirijákire xaladé, isyn bidaripnaskire i isyn but len, saroiekh, len čingirena pe koterá, i jone xasjona. Syr Me pritasavavas tut, to butýr Me na javáva te keráv davá túke." 
Nahum1:15 Ake, dykhén kodoleskire piré (stópy) pe bérga, savó phenéla bahtalý zvies' (zan), savó rakiréla zoralés pal ramánjo (miro)! “O Judeije! Ker svenkitka skaminda, vypherdiakiren péskire sovlahá, pal-dová so butýr nijékh fuj manúš na prodžála pir túte: jov isyn sarésa xasiakirdo.”" 
Zephaniah1:1 Ake, isyn lav, savó javdiá Sofonijaske, čhavéske Xusijaskireske [unukoske Godolijaskireske, praŭnukoske Jezekijaskireske] dre dyvesá Iosijaskire, Amonoskire čhavéskire, kon sys králi pe Judéia." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Me pharés sendiakirava Miré vastésa Judéia, i saré manušén, savé dživéna ke Jerusalimo, i Me xasiakiráva saró, so jaciápe Vaalostyr pe davá štéto. Me xasiakiráva lavá rašángire khetané Najudytkoné-mangipnaskirenca idolénge;" 
Haggai1:1 Pe javír berš, syr lyjá te rainel Králi Darijo, dro šóvto čhon, pérvo dyvés čhonéskiro, sys lav Ráskiro-Devléskire prorokoske Agiejoske vaš Zorovavieljoske, čhavéske Salafiiloskireske [Šaltiloskireske-ju.o.], kon sys šeraló raj pe Judéia, i vaš Ješuaske [Isusóske-r.s.], čhavéske Iosedekoskireske, kon sys pérvo rašái, phení:" 
Haggai1:14 I džangadia o Raj Devél dúho (fáno) Zorovavieljoskiro, čhavéskire Salafiiljoskiro, kon sys šeraló raj pe Judéia, i dúho (fáno) Ješuaskiro, čhavéskire Iosiedekoskiro (Jehozadakoskiro), kon sys pérvo rašáj i saré-manušéngiro dúho (fáno), kon jaciápe, i jone javné i kerdé butý pe jangoléngire-bolybnáskiro, Ráskire-Devléskiro Kher (Khangirí), léngire Devléskiro," 
Haggai2:2 “Phen akaná Zorovavieljoske, čhavéske Salafiiljoskireske, kon sys šeraló raj pe Judéia i Ješuaske, čhavéske Jehozadakoskireske, kon isyn pérvo rašái, i manušénge, kon jaciápe, rakirí:" 
Haggai2:21 “Phen Zorovavieljoske, šeralé barydyréske pe Judéia, rakirí: ‘Me trinskirava bolybén i phuv." 
Zechariah14:5 I tumé našéna dre félda maškír bérgi Miré; pal-dová so félda protyrdelape ke Asilo; i tumé prastána, syr našenas phuvjákire trinskiribnastyr dre dyvesá Ozijaskire, Judejákire kralískire; i javéla Raj Devél, Devél miro i saré svénta Lésa." 
Zechariah14:21 I saré pirja (kakavja) dro Jerusalimo i dre Judéia javéna syr sventyma Ráskire-Devléskiri. I saré, kon javéla te janel svénto dyibén, léna len i keravena dre lénde. I na javéla butýr ni jekh Xananiejo dro Kher Ráskire-Devléskiro, jangoléngiro-bolybnáskiro dro dová dyvés." 
Matthew1:1 Lylvarí (kniga) pal Isusóskiro Xristosóskiro ródo, Davidóskire Čhavéskiro, Avramoskire Čhavéskiro." 
Matthew1:2 Avrámo sys Isakóskiro dad, Isako sys Jakovóskiro dad, Jakovo sys dad Judáske i léskire pšalénge;" 
Matthew1:3 Juda sys Fariesóskiro i Zaróskiro dad (léngiri daj sys Támar'); Fariéso sys Esromóskiro dad, Esrómo sys Aramóskiro dad;" 
Matthew1:4 Arámo sys Aminadavóskiro dad, Aminadávo sys Naasonóskiro dad, Naasóno sys Salmonóskiro dad;" 
Matthew1:5 Salmóno sys Vaozóskiro dad (Vaozóskiri daj sys Raháv), Vaózo sys Avidóskiro dad (Avidóskiri daj sys Ruf'); Avido sys Jesiejoskiro dad," 
Matthew1:6 Jesiejo sys kralískire – Davidóskiro Dad; Davído sys Solomonóskiro dad (Solomonóskiri daj sys Urijáskiri romný); 
Matthew1:7 Solomóno sys Rovoamóskiro dad, Rovoámo sys Avijákiro dad, Avijá sys Asáskiro dad;" 
Matthew1:8 Asá sys Iosafatóskiro dad, Iosafáto sys Ioramóskiro dad, Iorámo sys Ozíiaskiro dad;" 
Matthew1:9 Ozíia sys Iofamóskiro dad, Iofámo sys Ahazóskiro dad, Aházo sys Jezekijáskiro dad;" 
Matthew1:10 Jezekíia sys Manasijáskiro dad, Manásija sys Amonóskiro dad, Amono sys Iosijáskiro dad;" 
Matthew1:11 Iosija sys Iokimoskiro dad, Iokimo sys dad Jehonijaske i léskire pšalénge angíl dová, syr Judén lydžiné dro pliéno (pe zor) te dživén ke Vavilóno." 
Matthew1:11 Iosija sys Iokimoskiro dad, Iokimo sys dad Jehonijaske i léskire pšalénge angíl dová, syr Judén lydžiné dro pliéno (pe zor) te dživén ke Vavilóno." 
Matthew1:12 Paló davá, syr len lydžiné dro Vavilóno, Jehonija sys Salafiiloskiro dad; Salafiilo sys Zorovavieljoskiro dad;" 
Matthew1:13 Zorovavieljo sys Aviudoskiro dad, Aviudo sys Jeliakimoskiro dad, Jeliakimo sys Azoroskiro dad;" 
Matthew1:14 Azoro sys Sadokoskiro dad, Sadoko sys Ahimoskiro dad, Ahimo sys Jeliudoskiro dad;" 
Matthew1:15 Jeliudo sys Jelieazaroskiro dad, Jelieazaro sys Matfanoskiro dad, Matfano sys Jakovóskiro dad;" 
Matthew1:16 Jakovo sys Iosifoskiro (Jozaskiro) dad, savó sys Marijakiro rom, saví bijandiá Isusós, Savéske lav dyné Xristóso." 
Matthew1:17 Adiáke sys dešuštar ródy Avramostyr angíl Davidóste; Davidostyr angíl dová, syr Judén lydžiné dro Vavilóno isyn dešuštar ródy; i dolé dyveséndyr, syr Judén lydžiné dro Vavilóno angíl Xristosóskiro bijanypén isyn dešuštar ródy." 
Matthew1:17 Adiáke sys dešuštar ródy Avramostyr angíl Davidóste; Davidostyr angíl dová, syr Judén lydžiné dro Vavilóno isyn dešuštar ródy; i dolé dyveséndyr, syr Judén lydžiné dro Vavilóno angíl Xristosóskiro bijanypén isyn dešuštar ródy." 
Matthew1:18 Adiáke, syr Isúso Xristóso bijándyja: paló (poslie) dorakiribén te lenpe, syr Léskire dáke Marijake treindiá te vydžál paloróm pal Jozaste, ne angíl, syr lénge te zdžanpe (te lenpe), vygijá, so Joj sys pharí Sventoné Duhóstyr (Fanostyr)." 
Matthew1:19 A Joza (Iosifo), rom Lákiro, sys patyvalo manúš i na kamdiá te ladžakirel La, i kamdiá čorahanés te otmekél La." 
Matthew1:20 Ne syr jov podumindia davá, Devléskiro Jangólo javdiá ke jov dre suné i phendiá: “Joze, Davidóskiro čhavó, na andyrša te priles Maríia syr romniá, pal-dová so Kodová, Saves joj bijanéla, isyn Sventoné Duhóstyr (Fanostyr);" 
Matthew1:21 joj bijanéla Čhavés, tu désa Léske lav Isúso, pal-dová so Jov zrakhéla Péskire manušén grehéndyr.”" 
Matthew1:22 Ne saró davá sys, sob (kaj) te kerélpe dová, so Devél phendiá pir prorokoste:" 
Matthew1:23 “Ake, patyvalý terný džuvlý javéla pharí, i bijanéla Čhavés, i Léskiro lav javéla Emanuilo” (so značynéla: “Devél isyn aménca”)." 
Matthew1:24 Kiéli Joza uštyjá soibnastyr, jov kerdiá, syr Devléskiro Jangólo priphendiá léske; jov prilyjá romniá peskirjá," 
Matthew1:25 i jov na džindiá La syr romniá, angíl dová, syr Joj bijandiá Čhavés; i jov dyjá lav Léske Isúso." 
Matthew2:1 Kiéli Isúso bijándyja dro Vifliejémo pe phuv Judéia, kaj Irodo sys králi, javné tanuki (magi) vastokóstyr dro Jerusalimo i rakiréna:" 
Matthew2:1 Kiéli Isúso bijándyja dro Vifliejémo pe phuv Judéia, kaj Irodo sys králi, javné tanuki (magi) vastokóstyr dro Jerusalimo i rakiréna:" 
Matthew2:2 “Kaj ža isyn Judéngiro Králi, Savó bijándyja? Syr ame dykhciam čergen Léskiri pe vastóko, javdiám te pokloninaspe Léske.”" 
Matthew2:2 “Kaj ža isyn Judéngiro Králi, Savó bijándyja? Syr ame dykhciam čergen Léskiri pe vastóko, javdiám te pokloninaspe Léske.”" 
Matthew2:3 I kiéli králi Irodo šundiá davá, jov drieván zadumindiape (lyjá péske dro šeró), i saró Jerusalimo khetané lésa." 
Matthew2:4 I skedyjá králi sarén rašángire barydyrén i lylvaritkonen (knižniken), i phuciá léndyr, kaj treindiá te bijandjol Xristóso?" 
Matthew2:5 I jone phendlé léske: “Dro Vifliejémo pe phuv Judéia”; syr i čhindiá proróko: 
Matthew2:5 I jone phendlé léske: “Dro Vifliejémo pe phuv Judéia”; syr i čhindiá proróko: 
Matthew2:6 “I tu, Vifliejémo, phuv Judaskiri, tu na san tyknedýr Xulandyr Judejátyr; pal-dová so tútyr vydžála Šeraló, Savó javéla te xulainél pe Izrailjoskire manušénde.”" 
Matthew2:6 “I tu, Vifliejémo, phuv Judaskiri, tu na san tyknedýr Xulandyr Judejátyr; pal-dová so tútyr vydžála Šeraló, Savó javéla te xulainél pe Izrailjoskire manušénde.”" 
Matthew2:7 Tén'ci Irodo čorahanés prikhardia tanuken te vyĥaljol léndyr časo (cýro), dro savó čergen sykadyjá;" 
Matthew2:8 i jov bičhadiá len dro Vifliejémo i phendiá: “Džán i lačhés rozĥaljon pal Bijatoste; i, syr tumé lathéna Les, tedy piridén mánge, sob (kaj) i me adiáke-pac' te javav te pokloninavpe Léske.”" 
Matthew2:9 Kiéli jone vyšundle kralís, giné jone péskire dromésa, i ake, čergen, saví jone dykhné pe vastóko, džálas angíl lénde, paka na terdijá pe štéto, kaj sys Bijáto." 
Matthew2:10 Kiéli jone dykhné čergen, jone drieván obradyndlepe." 
Matthew2:11 I jone zaginé dro kher i dykhné Bijatos Marijasa, dasa Leskirjasa, pyné pe čangá i poklonindlepe Léske; tén'či otčhakirde péskire kučipena (sokroviščy) i dyné Léske dáry: suvnakái, ladano i smirna." 
Matthew2:12 I syr jone doresné priphenybén te rakhénpe dro sunó, i te na risjon ke Irodo, to durine jone pe péskiri phuv javire dromésa." 
Matthew2:13 Kiéli jone giné, ake, Devléskiro Jangólo, javdiá dro sunó Jozáske i phendiá: “Uštý, le Bijatos i Da Leskirja, naš dro Jegípto, i jav odój angíl davá, syr te phenáv túke: pal-dová so Irodo kaméla te rodél Bijatos, sob (kaj) te muliakirél Les.”" 
Matthew2:14 I jov uštyjá, lyjá Bijatos i Da Leskirja ratiákiro, i gijá dro Jegípto," 
Matthew2:15 i sys odój angíl dová, syr te merél Irodoske, sob (kaj) te spolninélpe Devléskiro rakiribén pir prorokoste: “Jegiptóstyr Me khardjom ke Pe Mires Čhavés.”" 
Matthew2:16 Tén'ci Irodo, kiéli dykhciá, so tanuki (magi) xohade les, drieván xoliásyja i bičhadiá te muliakirén sarén bijatén-muršoren dro Vifliejémo i dre saré pašatuné štéty, dujendyr beršéndyr i tyknedýr pir časo, savó jov vyĥalyja tanukendyr." 
Matthew2:17 Tedy spolnindiape prorokoskire-Jeriemiejoskiro rakiribén: 
Matthew2:18 “Zan (glos) sys šundly dre Ráma, roibén, jasva i bari godlyma; Rahíl' rovela pal péskire bijatende, joj na kaméla, sob (kaj) te podrikiren la, pal-dová so len nane butýr.”" 
Matthew2:19 Ne kiéli myjá Irodo, ake, Devléskiro Jangólo javdiá dro sunó ke Joza dro Jegípto," 
Matthew2:20 i rakírla: “Uštý, le Bijatos i Da Leskirja, i džá pe phuv Izrailjoskiri; pal-dová so myné odolé, savé rodenas te muliakirén Bijatos.”" 
Matthew2:21 Jov uštyjá i lyjá Bijatos i Da Leskirja, i gijá pe Izrailjoskiri phuv." 
Matthew2:22 Ne kiéli jov šundiá, so Arhielajo sys králi pirí Judéia paló léskire dadéste Irodoste, tedy pyjá dar pe léste dorik te džal; i, syr Devél podphendia léske te rakhelpe angíl dro sunó, Joza gijá pe štéty Galilejakire." 
Matthew2:22 Ne kiéli jov šundiá, so Arhielajo sys králi pirí Judéia paló léskire dadéste Irodoste, tedy pyjá dar pe léste dorik te džal; i, syr Devél podphendia léske te rakhelpe angíl dro sunó, Joza gijá pe štéty Galilejakire." 
Matthew2:23 I javdiá jov i lyjá te dživél ke fóro Nazarieto, sob (kaj) te kerélpe pir dová lav, so proróko phendiá: “So Léskiro lav javéla Nazariejo.”" 
Matthew3:1 Dre dolé dyvesá javéla Iáno Boldeipnari te phenél lav pir čhučí (pusto) phuv dre Judéia," 
Matthew3:1 Dre dolé dyvesá javéla Iáno Boldeipnari te phenél lav pir čhučí (pusto) phuv dre Judéia," 
Matthew3:2 i rakírla: “Priĥaljon péskire gréhi (bizy), kakaná javdiá pašyledýr Kralipén dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo.”" 
Matthew3:3 Pal-dová so jov isyn odová, pal konéste phendiá proróko Isajo: “Davá isyn zan, saví déla gódla pir čhučí phuv: ‘Kerén drom Ráske-Devléske, čhuvén Léske mamúj drom.’”" 
Matthew3:4 Kokoreste Ianoste sys uribén vierbliudytkone balendyr; cypitko kustýk pe léskire masá; léskiro xabén sys akridy i avgín (meda) feldytko. 
Matthew3:5 Tedy džánas ke jov saró Jerusalimo i sarí Judéia i saré štéty Iordanoskire," 
Matthew3:5 Tedy džánas ke jov saró Jerusalimo i sarí Judéia i saré štéty Iordanoskire," 
Matthew3:6 i jov boldia len dro Iordáno, paló dová, syr jone priĥaljonas péskire gréhi." 
Matthew3:7 Ne syr jov dykhciá, so but Farisiéi i Sadukiei džánas te bolenpe ke jov, phendiá lénge: “Tumé san sapitko ródo! Kon sykliakirdiá tumen te našén Devléskire xoliátyr, so javéla syg?" 
Matthew3:8 Kerén vari-so, sob (kaj) te dophenen, so tumé mekné te kerén gréhi i risiné ke Devél." 
Matthew3:9 I na duminen te rakirén péske: ‘Avraámo sys dad amaró;’ pal-dová so me rakiráva tuménge, so Devél moginéla dalendyr barendyr te ĥazdel bijatén Avraamóske." 
Matthew3:10 Ake, uže tover paštó isyn pašýl kašteskiro kornjo (rukh): kažno kašt (drévo), so na lydžála lačhó barjakirdó (plódo), čingirena telé i čhurdena dre jag." 
Matthew3:11 Me bolava tumen paniésa pal tumaró pri ĥalyibén dre gréhi, ne Jov, Savó džála pal mánde, isyn zoraledýr mándyr, Konéske ĥeritka me na som mol te zlav; Jov javéla te bolel tumen Sventoné Duhósa (Fanosa) i jagása." 
Matthew3:12 Léskiro ĥanadytko (lopata) isyn dre Léskiro vast, i Jov žužakirela (čystinela) Péskiro šúrna i skedéla Péskiro parnó giv dre piralý, a phus xačkiréla jagása, saví na murdjola.”" 
Matthew3:13 Tén'ci javéla Isúso Galilejatyr ke reka (len') Iordáno ke Iáno, sob (kaj) Iáno te bolel Les." 
Matthew3:14 Iáno ža terdiakirelas Les, rakirí: “Mánge trej te bolavpe Túte, a Tu javésa ke me?”" 
Matthew3:15 Ne Isúso otphendiá léske: “Mek adiáke kakaná te javél; pal-dová so adiáke aménge trej te kerás pir kažno čačipén.” Tedy jov domekela Les. 
Matthew3:16 I syr Isúso boldiape, Jov gijá javrí jekhátyr (srázu) paniéstyr, i, ake, bolybén psiradyja (otčhakirdiape), i Iáno dykhciá Devléskiro Dúho (Fáno), Savó džálas telé syr golumbo, i mekelaspe telé pe Isusóste;" 
Matthew3:17 I ake, zan bolybnástyr, saví rakirdiá: “Kadavá isyn Miro drógo Čhavó, dre Savéste isyn Mirí bari rádyma.”" 
Matthew4:1 Tén'ci lydžijá Dúho (Fáno) Isusós pe čhučí phuv, sob (kaj) te propatiakirel Les nálačho." 
Matthew4:2 I kiéli Jov postindia štardešá dyvesá i štardešá ratia, Jov zakamdiá te xal." 
Matthew4:3 I nálačho podgíia ke Jov i phendiá: “Kóli Tu san Devléskiro Čhavó, phen, sob (kaj) dalé bará te jačen marésa.”" 
Matthew4:4 Ne Jov otphendiá léske: “Isyn čhindló: ‘Na marésa jekhésa dživéla manúš, a kažnoné lavésa, so džála javrí Devléskire uštendyr’”" 
Matthew4:5 Tén'ci léla Les nálačho dro svénto fóro i čhuvéla Les pe Khangirjákiri stréha (čhakín)," 
Matthew4:6 i rakírla Léske: “Kóli Tu san Devléskiro Čhavó, uhty Kokoró telé; pal-dová so isyn čhindló: “Jov déla priphenybén Jangolenge Peskirenge pal Túte i pe vastá jone lydžána Tut, sob (kaj) Tu te na obštavespe (te na obstempinespe) pir bar ĥerjasa Peskirjasa.”" 
Matthew4:7 Isúso phendiá léske: “Isyn adiáke-pac' čhindló: ‘Na propatiakir Ras-Devlés, Devlés péskires.’”" 
Matthew4:8 Nevéstyr léla Les nálačho pe drieván vučy bérga i sykavéla Léske saré svetóskire kralipená i léngire baripena," 
Matthew4:9 i rakírla Léske: “Saró me dáva Túke, kóli peresa i pokloninesape mánge.”" 
Matthew4:10 Tén'ci rakiréla léske Isúso: “Džá Mándyr, nálačho, isyn čhindló: ‘Devléske tyréske kloninpe i Léske jekhéske dynarin.’”" 
Matthew4:11 Tén'ci mekéla Les nálačho, i ake, Jangóly javné i dynarindlé Léske." 
Matthew4:12 Syr šundiá Isúso, so Ianos lyné, to durija dre Galiliéia;" 
Matthew4:13 i gii Nazarietostyr, javdiá i jaciá te dživél ke Kapiernaumo pašýl mórjo (derjáv), pe štéty Zavulonoskire i Niefalimoskire," 
Matthew4:14 sob (kaj) te spolninélpe dová, so phendiá proróko Isajo:" 
Matthew4:15 “Phuv Zavulonoskiri i phuv Nafalimoskiri, so isyn pe drom pašýl mórjo (derjáv), pale Iordáno, Najudengiri Galiliéia," 
Matthew4:16 ake, manušá, savé sys bešté dro kalypén, dykhné baró dud (svéto); i pe odolénde, savé isyn sýrby mulé, – pal-dová so jone dživéna bi Devléskiro, zasvencyndia dud.”" 
Matthew4:17 Dalé časostyr Isúso lyjá te rakirél: “Riskirén péskiro džiibén ke Devél, pal-dová so javdiá pašyledýr Kralipén dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo.”" 
Matthew4:18 Gii pašýl Galilejakiro mórjo (derjáv), Jov dykhciá duje pšalén, Simonos, savés khardé Pétri, i Jendris (Andriejos), léskire pšalés, savé začhurdenas khudia (sietki) dro mórjo (derjáv), pal-dová so jone sys mačhibnarja." 
Matthew4:19 I Jov rakiréla lénge: “Javén Mánca, i Me keráva tuméndyr manušéngire mačhibnar'jen”" 
Matthew4:20 I jone jekhátyr (srázu) mekné péskire khudia i giné pal Léste. 
Matthew4:21 I otgii odothýr duredýr, Jov dykhciá duje pšalén, Jakovós čhavés Zaviediejoskires i Ioanos, pšalés leskires, savé sys dre bárka (lodka) léngire dadésa Zaviediejosa, savé kerénas péskire khudia: i Jov khardiá len Pésa;" 
Matthew4:22 i jone jekhátyr mekné bárka i péskire dadés i giné Lésa. 
Matthew4:23 I Isúso psirelas pir sarí Galiliéia, sykliakiri manušén pal Devléste dre léngire sinagogi i phení bahtalý zan (zvies') pal Kralipén i sastiakiri kažno nasvalypen i dukh dre manušénde." 
Matthew4:24 I gijá mavlýn (malva) pal Léste pir sarí Sirija: i janénas ke Jov sarén manušén, savé sys nasvale i men'čindlepe nalačhé Duhóstyr i čhonytkone nasvalypnastyr, praličostyr, i Jov sastiakirdia len." 
Matthew4:25 I giné pal Léste but manušá Galilejatyr, Dešufor'jendyr (Diesiatigradijatyr), Jerusalimóstyr, Judejátyr i pal Iordanostyr." 
Matthew4:25 I giné pal Léste but manušá Galilejatyr, Dešufor'jendyr (Diesiatigradijatyr), Jerusalimóstyr, Judejátyr i pal Iordanostyr." 
Matthew5:1 Kiéli Isúso dykhciá manušén, Jov gijá pe bérga, i, syr besciá, sykliaibnýtka Léskire podginé ke Jov," 
Matthew5:2 i Jov otkerdia Péskire uštá i lyjá te sykliakirél len, rakirí:" 
Matthew5:3 “Bahtalé isyn odolé, savé džinéna, so léngire duhoske trej Devél; léngiro sys Kralipén dro Devléskiro Rajo." 
Matthew5:4 Bahtalé isyn odolé, savé rovena, pal-dová so Devél podrikiréla léngiro dúho (fáno)." 
Matthew5:5 Bahtalé isyn kovlé-ilýtka, pal-dová so phuv javéla léngiri." 
Matthew5:6 Bahtalé isyn odolé, konéskiro iló isyn bokhalo pal Devléskiro lav i syr paní drieván rodéla čačipén. Devél čaliakirela léngiro iló." 
Matthew5:7 Bahtalé isyn odolé, savé primangena bang manušénge, pal-dová so lénge javéla primanglo." 
Matthew5:8 Bahtalé isyn odolé, savénde isyn žužó iló, pal-dová so jone dykhéna Devlés." 
Matthew5:9 Bahtalé isyn odolé, savé keréna ramánjo (miro), pal-dová so javéna te kharén len ‘Devléskire čhavé.’" 
Matthew5:10 Bahtalé isyn odolé, konés tradéna pal čačipén; léngiro isyn Kralipén dro Devléskiro Rajo." 
Matthew5:11 Bahtalé san tumé, kiéli manušá javéna te košen tumen i te tradén, i javéna te rakirén nalačhé lavá pe tuménde pal Mánde." 
Matthew5:12 Javén bahtalé i radynénpe, pal-dová so baró otdyibén Devléstyr užakiréla tumen dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo: adiáke tradenas i prorokén, savé sys angíl tuménde." 
Matthew5:13 Tumé isyn syr lond vaš saré manušénge. Kóli ž lond našavela péskiro londypen, nisyr naštý te kerés, sob (kaj) nevéstyr lond te javél londo; léste butýr ni savó lačhipén nane, jekh so te vyčhurdes les javrí te štaven manušá ĥerénca." 
Matthew5:14 Tumé isyn syr jag vaš saré manušénge. Fóro, so isyn pe bérga pe vučipén, na moginéla te ĥaradjol." 
Matthew5:15 I kiéli zahačkirena momoly, na čhuvéna la tel pirí, a dro šandalo (podsviečniko) te svencynel jag pir saró kher." 
Matthew5:16 Adiáke mek te svencynel tumarí jag angíl manušénde, sob (kaj) jone te dykhén tumaré lačhé réndy i te slavinén Dadés tumares Bolybnaskires." 
Matthew5:17 Na duminen, so Me javdjom te otparuvav Zakóno ci prorokén, ne te keráv ke kónco/iagóro (te spolninav)." 
Matthew5:18 Čačes, Me rakiráva tuménge: paka na javéla kónco (jagóro) bolybnaske i phuvjake, ni jekh tykny bukvica ni čerta bukvakiri na otlelape Zakonóstyr angíl, syr Zakóno te kerélpe." 
Matthew5:19 Adiáke, kóli vari-kon otparuvela xoc' jekh lav priphenybnastyr i sykliakiréla adiáke manušén, odová javéla naj tyknedýr dro Kralipén dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo. Ne kon kandéla i keréla pir lav, javéla naj baredýr dro Kralipén dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo." 
Matthew5:20 Paldová Me rakiráva tuménge: kóli čačipén tumaró nane butedýr syr lylvaritkonengiro i Farisiejengiro čačipén, tumé nikieli na zadžána dro Kralipén dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo." 
Matthew5:21 Tumé šundlé, so rakirdé dro phuranó časo: ‘Na zamar (na umar), kon ža zamarela, tel séndo džála.”" 
Matthew5:22 Ne Me rakiráva tuménge: ‘Kažno, kon xoliasóla pe péskire pšaléste ni palsó, džála tel séndo. Kon ža phenéla péskire pšaléske ‘dylynó’, javéla dre dar Siniedrionostyr. I kon phenéla ‘bigodiakiro’, javéla dre dar, so džála dro liúno (ado) jagása." 
Matthew5:23 Adiáke, kóli tu janesa péskiro dáro ke altárjo, i odój priripiresa, so tyró pšal isyn xoliamó pe Túte," 
Matthew5:24 mek péskiro svénto dyibén angíl altárjo i džá, angíl ker ramánjo (miro) péskire pšalesa, tén'či džá i jan péskiro svénto dyibén." 
Matthew5:25 Ker ‘ramánjo’ (miro) péskire manušésa sygedýr, paka tu iščo (inké) san pe drom lésa, sob (kaj) manúš te na otdél tut sendariske, a sendári te na otdél tut dynaríske, i odová te na čhurdel tut dro štaribén." 
Matthew5:26 Čačes, Me rakiráva túke: tu na vydžasa odothýr, paka otdesa ke naj tyknedýr ĥasprin’" 
Matthew5:27 Tumé šundlé, syr sys phendló dro ĥaratuno časo: ‘Na ker biladžaipén.’" 
Matthew5:28 Ne Me rakiráva tuménge, so kažno, kon dykhéla pe džuvliáte nalačhé kamibnasa, odová uže keréla biladžaipén dro péskiro iló." 
Matthew5:29 Kóli ž čačí jakh zlydžala tut ke grého, rískir la javrí i vyčhurde; pal-dová so fedýr vaš túke te našaves jekh jakh, syr saró te džal dro liúno (ado)." 
Matthew5:30 Kóli ž čačó vast lydžála tut ke grého, otčingir les i vyčhurde; pal-dová so fedýr vaš túke te našaves jekh vast, syr saré masá te džán dro liúno." 
Matthew5:31 Adiáke-pac' sys phendló: ‘Kóli vari-kon rozdžalape péskire romniása, mek te del láke lyl pal rozgiiben.’" 
Matthew5:32 Ne, Me rakiráva tuménge: ‘Kon mekéla péskire romniá apríč syr pal napatiaibnytko bang, odová jačélape bangó, kóli joj keréla biladžaipén; a kon léla pal péste džuvliá, saví isyn rozlydžiny romesa, odová sýrby kokoró isyn bangó dro napatiaiben." 
Matthew5:33 Iščo šundlé tumé, so sys phendló dro ĥaratuno časo: ‘Na sovlahá, kóli tu na san tvardo; ne ker pir sovlahá péskire angíl Devléste!" 
Matthew5:34 Ne Me rakiráva tuménge: ‘Na sovlahá sarésa; ni bolybnasa, pal-dová so jov isyn Devléskiro priestolo;" 
Matthew5:35 ni phuvjása, pal-dová so joj isyn štéto tel Léskire ĥerá, ni Jerusalimosa, pal-dová so jov isyn fóro baré Kralískiro;" 
Matthew5:36 na sovlahá péskire šerésa, pal-dová so ni jekh bal na moginésa te kerés ni parnesa, ni kalesa." 
Matthew5:37 Mek te javél tumaró lav ‘ny, ny’, ‘nad, nad’, a so upredyr daléstyr, dová isyn nalačhestyr.’" 
Matthew5:38 Tumé šundlé, so sys phendló: ‘Jakh pal jakh, i dand pal dand.’" 
Matthew5:39 Ne Me rakiráva tuménge: na ker fuipén pale odoléske, kon kerdiá fuipén túke; ne kon pekavela tut dre tyrí čačí (pravo) čam (ščoka), tén'či rískir ke jov javír." 
Matthew5:40 Ne kon zakaméla te sendinelpe túsa i te lel tútyr gad, otdé léske i upratuno uribén." 
Matthew5:41 Ne kon začhuvela tut te džal lésa jekh versta, džá lésa duj." 
Matthew5:42 Kon mangéla tútyr, de, i na otrisjov odoléstyr, kon kaméla te zalel tútyr." 
Matthew5:43 Tumé šundlé, so sys phendló: ‘Sykáv patýv péskire pašatuné manušéske i na sykáv patýv péskire vergénge.’" 
Matthew5:44 Ne Me phenáva tuménge: sykavén patýv péskire vergénge, i mangénpe Devléske pal odolénde, savé košena tumen, kerén lačhipén odolénge, savé drieván na kaména tumen i mangénpe Devléske pal odolénde, savé našukar otlydžanape ke tumé i tradéna tumen;" 
Matthew5:45 sob (kaj) tumé moginénas te javén ‘čhavé Bolybnáskire Dadéskire’, i Jov začhuvela Péskiro Kham te svencynel pe lačhé i nalačhé manušénde, i bičhavéla bryšýnd pe odolénde, kon keréla lačhipén i kon keréla fuipén." 
Matthew5:46 Paldová, kóli tumé sykavéna patýv odolénge, savénge tumé san dróga, savó otdyibén Devléstyr javéla tuménge? I mytoskire skedyibnarja keréna adiáke." 
Matthew5:47 Ne kóli tumé déna ‘dobridim’ péskire pšalénge, so dasavo tumé keréna? Až Náiudy keréna adiáke." 
Matthew5:48 Paldová javén bidošakire, syr bidošakiro isyn tumaró Bolybnáskiro Dad." 
Matthew6:1 Dykhén, i na sykavén péskiro patiaibén pe jakhá manušénge; kóli na adiáke, na javéla tuménge otdyibén Bolybnáskire Dadéstyr." 
Matthew6:2 Ne kóli tu désa odolénge, savénde isyn trébima, na phurde zoralés šaribnasa dro rógo (truba) angíl péste, syr keréna dujemuitka manušá dre sinagogi i pe vulícy (gásy), sob (kaj) te slavinén len manušá. Čačes, rakiráva tuménge: jone uže doresné péskiro otdyibén." 
Matthew6:3 Ne kiéli tu désa odolénge, savénde sys trébima, mek tyró zérvo (liévo) vast na džinéla, so keréla čačó (pravo)." 
Matthew6:4 Sob (kaj) tyró dyibén te na javél dyc'lo; i Dad tyró, Savó dykhéla saró, otdéla túke tyró otdyibén." 
Matthew6:5 Kiéli tu mangesape, na jav syr kadalé dujemuitka, savé kaména te terdjon pe véngly javrí i dre sinagogi, sob (kaj) len te dykhén manušá. Čačes, Me rakiráva tuménge: jone uže doresné péskiro otdyibén." 
Matthew6:6 Kiéli tu mangesape, zadžá dre andratuný štúba péskiri, phande vudár, i mangpe Dadéske tyréske, Savó isyn nadyc'lo; i Dad tyró, Savó dykhéla tut, so javirénge na dyc'lo, otdéla túke." 
Matthew6:7 Kiéli tu mangesape, na rákir but lavá, syr Náiudy, savé duminéna, so len ušunena pal léngire dlenge mangipena." 
Matthew6:8 Na javén, syr jone isyn, pal-dová so Dad tumaró džinéla, so tuménge trej angíl, syr tumé pomangena Léstyr." 
Matthew6:9 Mangénpe že adiáke: ‘Dad amaró Bolybnáskiro, Savó isyn dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo! Mek te slavinelpe Tyró lav;" 
Matthew6:10 Mek te javél Tyró Kralipén, Mek te spolninélpe Tyrí vólia pe phuv, Syr i pe bolybén;" 
Matthew6:11 Pode aménge maró so dyvés; 
Matthew6:12 I primang aménge dlugi amaré, Syr ame primangasa odolénge, Save isyn vužle aménge;" 
Matthew6:13 I na domek amen ke čoripén; ne zrákh amen nalačhestyr; pal-dová so isyn Tyró Kralipén i zor i sláva pe viéki. Amín'.’ 
Matthew6:14 Pal-dová, kóli tumé primangena manušénge pal léngire gréhi, tumaró Bolybnáskiro Dad primangela tuménge," 
Matthew6:15 ne kóli na javéna te primangen gréhi manušénge, tumaró Bolybnáskiro Dad na primangela gréhi tumaré." 
Matthew6:16 Kiéli tumé postinena, na kerén rondlé muiá, syr keréna dujemuitka, pal-dová so jone garavena péskire čačuné muiá, sob (kaj) manušá te dykhén, so jone postinena. Čačes, Me rakiráva tuménge: ‘Jone uže doresné péskiro otdyibén.’" 
Matthew6:17 Kiéli tu postinesa, pomakh péskiro šeró i vymor muj péskiro," 
Matthew6:18 sob (kaj) te na sykavespe javirénge, so tu postinesa, ne jekhe Dadéske tyréske, Savó isyn nadyc'lo; i Dad tyró, Savó dykhéla dová, so na dykhéna javír manušá, otdéla túke lačhipnása." 
Matthew6:19 Na keden péske kučipena pe phuv, kaj mol' i orža xasiakirena, i čora podĥanavenape i čorena;" 
Matthew6:20 ne keden péske kučipén vaš Bolybnáskiro Rajo, kaj ni mol', ni orža na xasiakiréla, ni čora na podĥanavenape; i na čorena;" 
Matthew6:21 pal-dová so, kaj tyró kučipén isyn, odój tyró iló javéla." 
Matthew6:22 Jakhá isyn syr momolýtko (svietíl'niko) vaš masá. Paldavá, kóli jakh tyrí javéla žužy (čysto), tedy tyré masá javéna žužé." 
Matthew6:23 Kóli jakh tyrí na javéla žužy, tedy saré masá tyré javéna dro ciamlypén. Paldavá, kóli jag, saví isyn dre túte, jaciá ciamlypnasa, savó ž baró tedy isyn davá kalypén (ciamlypén)." 
Matthew6:24 Nikón na moginéla te dynarinél duje range, ci jekhéske javéla te sykavél patýv, ne javír javéla na pir iló; ci javéla čačunó ke jekh, a ke javír javéla na pir iló. Tuménge naštý te dynarinén (te služynen) Devléske i barvalypnaske." 
Matthew6:25 Paldavá Me rakiráva tuménge: na piridživen pal tumaró džiibén, so tuménge te xan ci te p'jen; ci pal tumaré masá, so te ur'jen. Naúšto (xaj) džiibén isyn na drogedyr xabnastyr, naúšto masá isyn na drogedyr uribnastyr?" 
Matthew6:26 Podykhen pe bolybnytkone čirikliende; jone na sieinena, na sčhinena, na čhuvéna sčhindlo dre šúrna; i Dad tumaró Bolybnáskiro čaravela len. Naúšto tumé na san pe but drogedyr léndyr?" 
Matthew6:27 Ne kon tuméndyr, piridživi pal džiibén, moginéla te kerél dlengedyr pe nábut péskiro džiibén?" 
Matthew6:28 Ne so tumé piridživena pal uribén? Dykhén pe feldýtka lilii, syr jone barjona; na keréna butý, na khuvena thava," 
Matthew6:29 ne Me phenáva tuménge, so i Solomóno péskire barvalypnasa na ur'jelaspe adiáke, syr kažno léndyr." 
Matthew6:30 Kóli ž dasavo uribén Devél déla feldytkone čarjake, saví adadyvés isyn, ne atasiá javéla čhurdyi dro bov, tedy so ž na fedýr Jov déla tuménge uribén, tumé ž san nabaré – patiaibnaskire manušá?" 
Matthew6:31 Tedy na piridživen, i na rakirén: ‘So aménge te xas?’ ci ‘So te pjas, ci dro so te urjavaspe?’" 
Matthew6:32 Pal-dová so saró davá rodéna Náiudy, i pal-dová so Dad tumaró Bolybnáskiro džinéla, so tuménde isyn trébima dro davá saró." 
Matthew6:33 Rodén ža angíl Devléskiro Kralipén dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo i čačipén Léskiro, saró javír javéla dynó tuménge upralestyr." 
Matthew6:34 Paldová na piridživen pal atasiatuno dyvés, pal-dová so atasiatuno dyvés kokoró javéla te duminel pal péste; uhtýlla (dósi) pharipén vaš kažno dyvés." 
Matthew7:1 Na sendinén, i tumen na javéna te sendinén," 
Matthew7:2 pal-dová so, syr tumé sendinena, adiáke-pac' i tumen javéna te sendinén; savé mierasa tumé mierinena, dasavé-pac' mierasa tumen javéna te mierinen." 
Matthew7:3 Sóske tu dykhésa pe tykny phusinka dre jakh tyré pšaleskiri, a baró berno na dykhésa dre péskiri jakh?" 
Matthew7:4 Ci, syr tu phenésa pšaléske peskireske; ‘de, me vylava phusinka tyré jakhatyr; a berno isyn dre tyrí jakh?" 
Matthew7:5 Dujemuitko, vyle angledýr berno péskire jakhatyr, tedy dykhésa, syr te vyles phusinka tyré pšaléskire jakhatyr." 
Matthew7:6 Na den dová, so isyn svénto, džuklenge, na čhurdén mutinia (žemčugi) angíl balyčende, sob (kaj) jone te na štakiren len ĥerénca, i te na risjon, i te na roskušen tumen." 
Matthew7:7 Mangén, i javéla dynó tuménge; rodén, i lathéna; marén dro vudár, i psiravena (otphandena) tuménge." 
Matthew7:8 Pal-dová so kažno, kon mangéla, doreséla péskiro; kažno, kon rodéla, lathéla; kažnonéske, kon marela dro vudár, javéla psirado (otphandlo)." 
Matthew7:9 Ci isyn vari-kon tuméndyr, kóli léskiro čhavó mangéla léstyr maró, te del čhavéske bar?" 
Matthew7:10 I kiéli mangéla mačho, te del léske sapes?" 
Matthew7:11 Kóli tumé san nalačhé, i džinéna te kerén lačhipén péskire čhavénge, pe kicý butýr tuméndyr tumaró Bolybnáskiro Dad keréla lačhipén odolénge, savé mangena Léstyr." 
Matthew7:12 Kerén dová javirénge, so tuménge isyn pir iló, sob (kaj) i javír te kerén tuménge; Zakóno i proróki sykliakiréna davá-pac'." 
Matthew7:13 Zadžán dro ciasno (tango) pórta, pal-dová so buĥly isyn pórta i otphandlo isyn drom, savó lydžála dro xasiakiriben, i but džána dro davá vudár." 
Matthew7:14 Pal-dová so ciasno isyn pórta i nabuĥlo isyn drom, savó lydžála dro džiibén, i nábut lathéna les." 
Matthew7:15 Rakhénpe xohané prorokendyr, savé javéna ke ame dre bakrany ídia, ne andrál jone isyn xoliamé ruvá;" 
Matthew7:16 tumé ĥaljona len pir léngire barjakirdé. Ci skedéna dylyné čarjatyr vinagrado (drakh) ci inžyro kodriljostyr (diedoŭnikostyr)? 
Matthew7:17 Adiáke-pac' kažno lačhó kašt déla lačhé barjakirdé (plódy) i dylynó kašt déla dylyné barjakirdé. 
Matthew7:18 Lačhó kašt na moginéla te del dylyné barjakirdé, i dylynó kašt na déla lačhé barjakirdé." 
Matthew7:19 I kažno kašt, so na déla lačhé barjakirdé, čingirena telé i čhurdena dre jag." 
Matthew7:20 Adiáke pir léngire barjakirdé tumé ĥaljona xohané prorokén. 
Matthew7:21 Na kažno, savó rakiréla Mánge: ‘Dévla, Dévla!’ – zadžála dro Kralipén dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo; ne kodová, savó keréla pir vólia Miré Dadéskiri, Savó isyn dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo." 
Matthew7:22 But manušá phenéna Mánge dro dová dyvés, kiéli javéna te sendinén: ‘Dévla, Dévla! Ci na Tyré lavésa ame angilphendiam? Ci na Tyré lavésa ame vytradasas nalačhé dúhi? Ci na Tyré lavésa but dívy kerasas?’" 
Matthew7:23 Tén'ci Me phenáva lénge: ‘Me nikieli na džindjom tumen; džán krig Mándyr tumé, savé keréna čoripén.’" 
Matthew7:24 Kažno, kon šunéla lavá Miré i kandéla len, isyn syr god'varó manúš, kon čhudiá péskiro kher pe bar." 
Matthew7:25 I giné bryšynda, i ĥazdynépe réki (leniá), i lyné te phurdén balvalia, i saró pyjá pe davá kher; i jov na pyjá, pal-dová so sys čhudó pe bar." 
Matthew7:26 Ne kažno, kon šunéla lavá Miré, i na kandéla len, isyn syr balvalitko manúš, kon čhudiá péskiro kher pe práho;" 
Matthew7:27 i giné bryšynda, i ĥazdynépe réki (leniá), i lyné te phurdén balvalia, i saró pyjá pe davá kher. I pyjá kher, i rospyjape sarésa.’”" 
Matthew7:28 I sys adiáke: kiéli Isúso končyndia dalé lavá, manušá divindlépe Léskire sykliakiribnastyr," 
Matthew7:29 pal-dová so Jov sykliakirdiá, syr Odová, Savéste isyn pravo, a na syr lylvarítka." 
Matthew8:1 I kiéli Jov gijá telé bergátyr, but manušá giné pal Léste." 
Matthew8:2 I ake, prokazytko manúš podgíia i pyjá pe čangá angíl Léste, rakirí: “Rajo Dévla, kóli Túke isyn pir iló, vysastia'kir man”" 
Matthew8:3 Isúso protyrdyjá vast, čiladiá (čypindia) les i phendiá: “Pir iló isyn, tu kakaná san žužó (čysto).” I adáj že jov sys vysastiakirdo prokazatyr." 
Matthew8:4 I rakírla léske Isúso: “Dykh že; ni konéske na rákir, ne džá, sykáv pes rašáske, jan dáro, so priphendiá Mójza, syr dophenybén manušénge.”" 
Matthew8:5 Syr Jov gijá dro Kapiernaumo, podgíia ke Jov šelengire-xaladytko barydyró i mangdiá Les te pomoginel," 
Matthew8:6 i phendiá: “Rajo Dévla miro dynári (sluga), isyn paštó rozmardo praličosa kheré i drieván men'čynelape dukhendyr.”" 
Matthew8:7 Isúso rakiréla léske: “Me javáva i vysastiakirava les.” 
Matthew8:8 Ne šelengiro otphendiá: “Rajo Dévla, me na som mol, sob (kaj) Tu te zadžas dro miro kher, ne Tu jekh phen lav i javéla miro dynári nevéstyr sastó." 
Matthew8:9 I me adiáke-pac' som manúš, pe konéste isyn barydyrá, mánde isyn xaladé, savé kandéna man, i me phenáva jekhéske: ‘Džá’, i džála; i javireske: ‘Jav’, i javéla, i kadaleske dynaríske miréske: ‘Ker davá’, i keréla.”" 
Matthew8:10 I syr Isúso šundiá davá, divindiape i phendiá manušénge, savé giné pal Léste: “Čačes, Me phenáva tuménge: Me na lathjom dasavo patiaibén i dro Izrailjo." 
Matthew8:11 Me phenáva tuménge, so but javír javéna vastokóstyr i zapadostyr (pal-paniendyr) i bešena pal skamínd Avraamosa, Isakosa i Jakovosa dro Kralipén dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo," 
Matthew8:12 ne manušén, savén vykedyné vaš Kralipén, Devél tradéla javrí dre kalypén; odój javéla roibén i dandengiri skriežyma”" 
Matthew8:13 I phendiá Isúso šelengireske: “Džá, pal tyró patiaibén javéla túke kerdó” I dynári vysastija dre kodová-pac' mardó (štúnda)." 
Matthew8:14 I javdiá Isúso dro Petriskiro kher, i dykhciá, so léskiri sasuj sys pašty xačkiribnasa:" 
Matthew8:15 i Jov čiladiá lákiro vast, i xačkiribén jačkirdiá la, i joj uštyjá i dynarindiá lénge." 
Matthew8:16 Kiéli javdiá bel'vél', janénas ke Jov buté manušén, savénde sys nálačho dúho (fáno), i Jov tradyjá javrí dúhi (fany) laveskire zorjása, i Jov vysastiakirdiá sarén, savé sys nasvale;" 
Matthew8:17 sob (kaj) te kerélpe dová, so phendiá proróko Isajo: “Jov lyjá pe Péste amaró bizorjakiriben i lydžijá saré amaré nasvalypena.”" 
Matthew8:18 Kiéli Isúso dykhciá but manušén pašýl Péste, Jov priphendiá Péskire sykliaibnytkonénge te džán pe javír brégo." 
Matthew8:19 I podgíia ke Jov jekh lylvarítko i phendiá: “Sykliakiribnáskiro (Učytieljo)! Me džáva Túsa, karik i Tu džása.”" 
Matthew8:20 I rakiréla léske Isúso: “Lokhniende (lisende) isyn nory, bolybnáskire čirikliende isyn gniázdy (kúfy), a Manušéskire Čhavéske nane kaj šeró te čhuvél.”" 
Matthew8:21 Ne javír phendiá Léske: “Rajo Dévla, mek man angíl te garavav miré dadés.”" 
Matthew8:22 Ne Isúso rakiréla léske: “Jav Mánca; mek mulé te garaven péskire mulen.” 
Matthew8:23 Kiéli gijá Isúso andré bárka, but Léskire sykliaibnýtka giné pal Léste" 
Matthew8:24 i, ake, ĥazdyjápe baró štormo adiáke, so bárka začhuvelaspe valnenca; ne Jov sys sutó." 
Matthew8:25 Ke Jov podginé sykliaibnýtka, džangade Les, rakirí: “Rajo Dévla, zrákh, ame tasadjovasa.”" 
Matthew8:26 I Jov rakiréla lénge: “Sóske tumé san darandytka, tumé san manušá nabaré patiaibnása!” Tén'ci uštyi, Jov priphendiá balvaliake i morjoske, i kerdiápe baró štylypen." 
Matthew8:27 I manušá divindlépe i rakirdé: “Kon adavá Manúš isyn, so až balvál i mórjo (derjáv) Les kandéna?”" 
Matthew8:28 I kiéli Jov javdiá pe javír brégo pe Gadarinoskiri phuv, pirilyne Les duj manušá nalačhé duhenca (fanenca), savé džánas javrí maĥilytkone pieščerendyr (ĥiebarendyr) dasavé xoliamé, so nikón na moginelas te džal pir dová drom." 
Matthew8:29 I, ake, jone dénas gódla, rakirí: “So Túke trej améndyr, Čhavó Devléskiro? Javdian Tu adarík angíl uphendló mardó (štúnda) te men'čynes amen?”" 
Matthew8:30 Sys ĥurto balyčen, savé xanas čar nádur léndyr." 
Matthew8:31 I nalačhé dúhi (fany) mangenas Les: “Kóli Tu tradesas javrí amen, bičháv amen dro ĥurto balyčengiro”" 
Matthew8:32 I Jov phendiá lénge: “Džán.” I jone mekné manušén i zaginé dre balyčende, i, ake, saró ĥurto balyčengiro čhurdyjape bregoskire krutymatyr dro mórjo (derjáv) i jone tasadyne dro paní." 
Matthew8:33 Čhupnárja (pastúhi) balyčengire našné, i javné dro fóro, i rosphendlé saró, i pal manušénde nalačhé duhenca." 
Matthew8:34 I, ake, saró fóro vygijá te pirilel Isusós, i, syr dykhné Les, mangné Les te durjol léngire phuvjátyr." 
Matthew9:1 I zagii dre bárka, Jov tradyjá pale i javdiá dro Péskiro fóro." 
Matthew9:2 I, ake, lydžánas ke Jov nasvale manušés, savó sys paštó pe matraco. I syr Isúso dykhciá léngiro patiaibén, phendiá nasvaleske: “Jav murškanó, čhavó Miro, otmekne gréhi tyré!”" 
Matthew9:3 Tedy phendlé lylvarítka jekh jekhéske: “Kadavá manúš teliakirela Devlés!” 
Matthew9:4 I Isúso, džiný, so jone dumindle, phendiá: “Sóske iščo (inké) tumé duminéna fuipén dre péskire ile?" 
Matthew9:5 ne so lokhedýr te phenés: ‘Tyré gréhi otmekne’, ci: ‘Uštý i psir?’" 
Matthew9:6 A sob (kaj) tumé te džinén, so Čhavéste Manušeskireste isyn zor pe phuv te otmekél gréhi,” tedy Jov rakiréla nasvaleske: “Uštý, le matraco péskiro, i džá dro péskiro kher.”" 
Matthew9:7 I jov uštyjá, i gijá dro péskiro kher." 
Matthew9:8 Kiéli manušá dykhné davá, jone divindlépe i slavindle Devlés, so Jov dyjá dasaví zor manušénge." 
Matthew9:9 I syr Isúso džálas pašýl odothýr, Jov dykhciá manušés, savó sys beštó dro mytytko (nalogitko) kher, Matfiejos, i rakírla Léske: “Jav Mánca”, i jov uštyjá i gijá pal Léste." 
Matthew9:10 I syr prigijape Léske te bešél pal skamínd i, ake, but mytoskire skedyibnarja i grehengire javné i bešné pal skamínd Lésa, i Léskire sykliaibnytkonénca." 
Matthew9:11 I kiéli Farisiéi dykhné davá, to phendlé Léskire sykliaibnytkonénge: “Sóske Sykliakiribnáskiro tumaró xála grehengirenca i mytoskire skedyibnar'jenca?”" 
Matthew9:12 Ne Jov šundiá davá i phendiá: “Na saste manušénge trej sastypnari, a nasvalenge," 
Matthew9:13 ne džán, sykljon, so davá značynéla, so Biblija rakírla: “Mánge trej lačhé-ilýtkima dre manušénde, a na svénta dyibená”, paldavá Me javdjom te kharav ke Pe na čačuné manušén, a grehengiren”" 
Matthew9:14 Tén'ci javné ke Jov Ianoskire sykliaibnýtka i rakirna: “Sóske ame i Farisiéi postinasa, ne Tyré sykliaibnýtka na postinena?”" 
Matthew9:15 I phendiá lénge Isúso: “Naúšto moginéna Terneskire gosti te javén smentna (piečal'na) dre bjavitko štúba, paka Ternó isyn lénca? Dyvesá javéna, kiéli Ternó javéla lynó léndyr, i tedy jone javéna te postinen." 
Matthew9:16 Nikón na čhuvéla kotér (kusko) nevó than pe phuranó uribén; pal-dová so prisudo kotér rozriskirla i ljoha (dira) javéla iščo (inké) baredýr. 
Matthew9:17 Nikón na čhuvéla neví mol (vino) dre phurané goné, pal-dová so kušenape phurané, i mol vyčhuvelape i goné xasjona. Ne neví mol čhuvéna dre neve goné, i zrakhenape jekh i javír.”" 
Matthew9:18 Syr Jov rakirdiá davá, Judýtko barydyró podgíia, i, pyi pe čangá, phendiá: “Čhaj mirí akaná myjá; ne Tu jav, čhuv vast Tyró pe láte, i joj otdžidjola.”" 
Matthew9:19 I uštyjá Isúso i gijá pal léste, i adiáke-pac' Léskire sykliaibnýtka." 
Matthew9:20 I, ake, džuvlý, saví sys drieván nasvaly dešudúj berš thadune ratvalypnasa, zagii palál léstyr, joj čiladiá jagóro (krajo) Léskire uribnaskiro," 
Matthew9:21 pal-dová so joj rakirdiá kokori péske: “Kóli me féni (tóka) čilavavas uribén Léskiro, to me sastjovavas.”" 
Matthew9:22 I Isúso risijá pale, dykhí la, phendiá: “Jav murškany, čháie, tyró patiaibén zrakhciá tut.” I jekhátyr (srázu) adáia džuvlý jaciá sasty." 
Matthew9:23 Kiéli Isúso zagijá dro barydyreskiro kher, dykhciá bašaibnaskiren pe svirol'ki i but javire manušén, savé šumindle godlenca," 
Matthew9:24 I Jov phendiá: “Džán javrí, saré! Terný patyvalý džuvlý isyn namuly, ne joj isyn suty.” I jone sandlepe Léstyr." 
Matthew9:25 I kiéli manušá sys bičhadé javrí, Jov gijá dre štúba, lyjá la pal vast, i uštyjá terný patyvalý džuvlý." 
Matthew9:26 I mavlýn (malva) pal davá rozgijápe pir sarí doiá phuv. 
Matthew9:27 I kiéli Isúso džálas odothýr, duj kororé manušá giné pal Léste, dyi gódla: “Potangine (požalin) amen, Čhavó Davidóskiro!”" 
Matthew9:28 I kiéli Jov zagijá dro kher, kororé manušá podginé ke Jov, i Jov phendiá lénge: “Iščo patiána, so Me mogináva davá te keráv?” Jone rakirna Léske: “Čačó, Rajo Dévla.”" 
Matthew9:29 Tén'ci Jov čiladiá jakhá léngire i phendiá: “Mek te javél tuménge pir tumaró patiaibén.” 
Matthew9:30 I otkerdepe léngire jakhá. I Isúso zorjása uphendia lénge: “Sob (kaj) nikón te na džinél.” 
Matthew9:31 Ne kiéli jone giné péske, rosphendlé pal Léste pir sarí kodoia phuv." 
Matthew9:32 Kiéli ž jone džánas, javrí ke Jov jandlé niemone (mutone) manušés nalačhé duhósa." 
Matthew9:33 I kiéli nálačho dúho sys tradyno javrí, niemo (muto) lyjá te rakirél. I divindlépe manušá, rakirí: “Nijékhvar na sys dasavo dro Izrailjo!”" 
Matthew9:34 Ne Farisiéi rakirénas: “Davá isyn nalačhé-duhengiro xulái, savjása zorjása Jov tradéla javrí nalačhé dúhi.”" 
Matthew9:35 I psirelas Isúso pir fórja i gavá, sykliakiri dre léngire sinagogi Devléskiri bahtalý zan (zvies') i sastiakirdia kažno nasvalypen i dukh dre manušénde." 
Matthew9:36 Kiéli Jov dykhciá but manušén, tedy drieván potangindia len, pal-dová so jone pyné dro dúho i sys kažno péske, syr bakriá bi čhupnariskiro." 
Matthew9:37 Tén'ci Jov rakiréla Péskire sykliaibnytkonénge (učenikenge): “Čačó, ubijandypen isyn barvaló, a butiarné isyn nábut;" 
Matthew9:38 mangén paldavá Ras-Devlés, Kon isyn Xuláj pe féldy, sob (kaj) jov te bičhavel butiarnen pe ubijandypen Péskiro.”" 
Matthew10:1 I kiéli Isúso khardiá dešudujen sykliaibnytkonén ke Pe, Jov dyjá lénge zor pe nalačhé dúhi, sob (kaj) te tradén javrí len manušéndyr i sastiakiren kažno nasvalypen i dukh." 
Matthew10:2 Ake, dešudujengire – Apostolengire lavá: pérvo Símono, savés khardé Pétri, i Jendri (Andriejo), pšal léskiro, Zaviediejoskiro Jakovo, i Iáno, pšal léskiro." 
Matthew10:3 Filipo i Varfalamiejo; Tamašo i Matfiejo, mytoskiro skedyibnari, Alfiejoskiro Jakovo i Fadiejo," 
Matthew10:4 Símono Kananito i Juda Iskarioto, savó zdyja Les." 
Matthew10:5 Isúso bičhadiá adalen dešudujen i dyjá lénge stroga uphenybená: “Na zadžán dre štéty, kaj Náiudy dživéna, na zadžán dro Samaritianengiro fóro;" 
Matthew10:6 a džán fedýr ke manušá Izrailjoskire kheréstyr, savé isyn xasiakirdé syr bakré." 
Matthew10:7 I kiéli tumé zadžána, phenén lav pal Devléste, rakirí: ‘Javdiá pašyledýr Kralipén dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo, Savésa xulainela Devél.’" 
Matthew10:8 Sastiakiren nasvalen, žužakiren prokazytkonen, otdžidžiakiren mulen, tradén javrí nalačhé dúhi (fany); bi lovengiro doresné, bi lovengiro otdén." 
Matthew10:9 Na len pésa ni suvnakái, ni rup, ni xarkóma (mied') dre kisyka pe kustýk," 
Matthew10:10 ni sakva (sumka) pe drom, ni duj ĥáda, ni ĥeritka, ni destó. Pal-dová so butiarno isyn mol te xal." 
Matthew10:11 I dro vari-savó fóro ci gav tumé te na zadžán, udžinén, kon isyn patyvalo manúš dro davá fóro, i jačénpe odój angíl, syr te džán."
