Mark9:2 Pir šov dyvesá Isúso lyjá Pésa Petris, Jakovós i Ianos i jandiá len pe vučí bérga. Odój pe jakhá sykliaibnytkonende Jov parudyja:" 
Mark9:3 Léskiro uribén jaciá drieván parnó, parnedyr kažnoné parnypnastyr dro svéto, so moribnaskiro (suknovalo) moginéla te kerél." 
Mark9:4 Tén'ci sykadyne Ilíia i Mójza, i jačné te rakirén Isusósa." 
Mark9:5 Pétri phendiá Isusóske: “Ravvi, aménge adáj isyn adiáke šukár! Kerása adáj trin šátry: jekh Túke, jekh Mojzáske i jekh Ilijaske.”" 
Mark9:6 Darátyr jov kokoró na džindiá, so rakirdiá, pal-dová so jone sys dre bari dar." 
Mark9:7 Ne adáj ža sykadyjá óbloko, čhakirdia len i oblokostyr rozdyjape zan!: “Kadavá isyn Miro drógo Čhavó, Les šunén!”" 
Mark9:8 I saré jekhátyr obdykhne pašýl i na dykhné nikonés, apríč jekhe Isusóste lénca." 
Mark9:9 Kiéli jone džánas telé bergátyr, Isúso angilpriphendia lénge, sob (kaj) jone ni konéske te na rakirén, so jone dykhné, paka Čhavó Manušéskiro na otdžidjola muléndyr." 
Mark9:10 Jone rakhne davá dre péste, a maškír péste but móly rakirdé pal davá, syr te ĥaljon Léskire lavá ‘otdžidjola muléndyr’." 
Mark9:11 I phučenas Léstyr, rakirí: “Sóske ž lylvarítka (knížniki) rakiréna, so Ilíia angledýr sys bangó (musindia) te javél?”" 
Mark9:12 I Jov otphendiá lénge: “Čačó, so Ilíia angledýr sys bangó te javél i te kerél saró nevéstyr, syr i isyn čhindló pal Čhavéste Manušeskireste, so prijavelape Léske but te pirilydžal mén'ki, i so Jov javéla ladžakirdó?" 
Mark9:13 Ne Me rakiráva tuménge, so Ilíia uže javdiá, i manušá kerdé Lésa, so sys pe iló lénde, syr davá i sys čhindló pal léste.”" 
Mark9:14 Kiéli jone javné pale ke sykliaibnýtka, tén'či dykhné pašýl lénde but manušén i lylvaritkonen, savé dophenenas lénge." 
Mark9:15 I jekhátyr (srázu), kiéli saré manušá dykhné Les, jone divindlépe zoralés, lyné te podprastan ke Jov te den “dobridim” Léske." 
Mark9:16 “Pal so tumé dophenena jekh jekhéske?” – phuciá Isúso léndyr. 
Mark9:17 I jekh manúš otphendiá Léske: “Sykliakiribnariskiro, me jandjom ke Tu miré čhavés, dre léste zagijá nálačho dúho (fáno) i čhavó na rakiréla." 
Mark9:18 I kaj nálačho dúho (fáno) les te na uhtylel, to jov ravela les telé, adavá manúš mekéla piena móstyr, jov skriežytynela dandenca i jačélape syr kašt. I adiáke me rakirdjom Tyré sykliaibnytkonénge, sob (kaj) jone te vytraden davá nálačho dúho (fáno) javrí, ne jone na dyné ráda." 
Mark9:19 Isúso otphendiá kadasavé lavénca: “O, napatiaibnytko ródo! Kicý Mánge te javav tuménca? Ci but Mánge te vyrikirav tumen? Janén les ke Me!”" 
Mark9:20 Tén'ci jone jandlé les ke Jov. I kiéli jov dykhciá Les, jekhátyr nálačho dúho (fáno) zoralés trinskirdia les, i jov pyjá pe phuv i radiape, i mekelas piena móstyr." 
Mark9:21 I phuciá Isúso léskire dadéstyr: “Syr ĥará (dlúges) davá kerélape lésa?” I jov phendiá: “Tyknybnastyr. 
Mark9:22 I častes dúho čhurdelas les dre jag i dro paní te xasiakirél les. Ne kóli tu désa ráda te kerés vari-so, mek te javél túke pe iló te des vast aménge.”" 
Mark9:23 O Isúso phendiá Léske: “Kóli tu moginésa te patias nábut, saró moginéla te javél kodoléske, kon patiála." 
Mark9:24 Jekhátyr (srázu) terné-beršengiro dad dyjá gódla i phendiá jasvénca: “Rajo Dévla! Me patiáva, pomogin Miré napatiaibnaske!”" 
Mark9:25 Kiéli Isúso dykhciá, so manušá lyné te prastan ke davá štéto, jov štyliakirdia nálačho dúho (fáno), phení léske: “Dúho (Fáno) kašuko i muto (niemo), me priphenava túke, te džas krig léstyr, i, sob (kaj) butýr te na zadžas!”" 
Mark9:26 Tén'ci nálačho dúho (fáno) dyjá gódla, trinskirdia zoralés les i gijá krig léstyr. I adavá manúš jaciá sýrby muló, paldavá but manušá phendlé: “Jov isyn muló.”" 
Mark9:27 Ne Isúso lyjá terné-beršengires paló vast, pomogindia (dyjá vast) te ĥazdelpe i odová uštyjá pe ĥerá." 
Mark9:28 Kiéli Isúso zagijá dro kher, Léskire sykliaibnýtka jekh pe jekh phučné Léstyr: “Sóske ame na mogindiam te vytradas nálačho dúho (fáno)?”" 
Mark9:29 I Jov phendiá lénge: “Dasavo dúho (fáno) vytradelape féni (tóka) mangipnasa i postosa. 
Mark9:30 Isúso i sykliaibnýtka giné péske dalé štetóstyr i giné pirdál Galiliéia. Isúso pričhudia zor te kerél adiáke, sob (kaj) manušá te na džinén, kaj Jov sys." 
Mark9:31 Pal-dová so Jov sykliakirdiá Péskire sykliaibnytkonén, i phendiá lénge: “Čhavés Manušeskires zdena dre manušéngire vastá, i jone muliakirena Les; i muliakirdo Jov otdžidjola pir trin dyvesá.”" 
Mark9:32 Ne jone usajékh na ĥalyné dalé lavá, a te phučén Léstyr darándyne." 
Mark9:33 I jone javné dro Kapiernaumo. Kiéli Isúso sys dro kher, Jov phučelaspe léndyr: “Phenén, pal so tumé dénas duma pir drom?”" 
Mark9:34 Jone ž sys štyl; pal-dová so pir drom rakirdé jekh jekhésa, kon isyn naj baredýr maškír lénde?" 
Mark9:35 Isúso besciá, skedyjá len trusciál (vokrug) Péste i rakiréla: “Kon vykedéla te javél anglatunó, odová mek te javél palatunó i butiarno vaš sarénge.”" 
Mark9:36 Jov lyjá tykné bijatós (čhavores) pe vastá, oblyja les, čhudiá les maškirál i phendiá lénge:" 
Mark9:37 “Kon priléla ke pe jekhés adasavé bijatós vaš Miro lav, odová i Man priléla, a kon priléla Man, odová priléla Odolés, Kon bičhadiá Man?”" 
Mark9:38 Iáno phendiá Isusóske: “Sykliakiribnáskiro! Ame dykhciam manušés, savó Tyré lavésa vytradela nalačhé dúhi (fany) i ame léske phendiam te pirijačel, pal-dová so jov na sys aménca.”" 
Mark9:39 “Na zaphenen Léske, – phendiá lénge Isúso, – kon Miré lavésa keréla dívo, odová na moginéla te phenél čoripén pe Mánde." 
Mark9:40 Kon isyn pal aménde, odová nane proti aménde." 
Mark9:41 Kóli vari-kon déla tuménge tahtáj (čaša) šylale paniésa, vaš Miro lav, pal-dová so tumé san Xristosóskire, čačes Me rakiráva tuménge: jov na xasiakiréla otdyibén Devléstyr." 
Mark9:42 I kon zlydžala ke grého adasaven tyknen, savé patiána dre Mánde, tedy fedýr javélas léske te ur'jel siavitko (miel'nično) bar pe men i te čhurdén les dro morjoskiro (derjavéskiro) xoripén." 
Mark9:43 Kóli tyró čačó vast zlydžala ke grého tut, čingir krig les. Fedýr javélas túke te zadžas dro džiibén jekhe vastésa, syr duje vasténca te zadžas dro liúno (ado), dre jag, so nijékhvar na murdjola." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 I kóli tyrí ĥerój zlydžala ke grého tut, čingir krig la. Fedýr javélas túke te zadžas dro džiibén langalesa, syr duje 'gerenca te čhurdén tut dro liúno." 
Mark9:46  
Mark9:47 I kóli tyrí jakh zlydžala ke grého tut, vyle la. Fedýr javélas túke te zadžas dro Devléskiro Kralipén jekhe jakhasa, syr dujo jakhénca te čhurdén tut dro liúno," 
Mark9:48 kaj isyn kirmo, savó xála len, savo na muljola, i jag, saví xačkiréla len, so na murdjola." 
Mark9:49 Kažno manúš javéla žužakirdo i sýrby londiakirdo jagása. 
Mark9:50 Lond isyn kuč, ne kóli lond jačéla bi londypnaskiro, sósa londiakiresa lond pale? Te javél lond dre tuménde, i te javén tumé dro ramánjo (miro) jekh jekhésa!”" 
Mark10:1 I uštyi, Isúso gijá krig dolé šteténdyr, i javdiá pal Iordáno dre Judéia; i nevéstyr ke Isúso skedynépe manušá, i Jov sykliakirdiá len pir Péskiro sykliaiben." 
Mark10:1 I uštyi, Isúso gijá krig dolé šteténdyr, i javdiá pal Iordáno dre Judéia; i nevéstyr ke Isúso skedynépe manušá, i Jov sykliakirdiá len pir Péskiro sykliaiben." 
Mark10:2 I javné ke Jov Farisiéi te propatiakiren Les, i phučné Léstyr: “Phen aménge, ci saštý (možna) muršeske te mekel péskire romniá?”" 
Mark10:3 I Jov otphendiá lénge i phendiá: “So Mójza (Moisiejo) priphendiá tuménge?” 
Mark10:4 I jone phendlé: “Mójza délas vólia muršeske te čhinel lyl pal rozgiiben i te mekel la.” 
Mark10:5 Ne Isúso phendiá lénge: “Jov čhindiá davá priphenybén pal tumaré xoliamé ile. 
Mark10:6 A dro anglypén (načalo), syr Devél sozdelas svéto, Jov sozdyjá muršés i džuvliá." 
Mark10:7 Paldavá mekéla manúš péskire dadés i da, i jov javéla te dživél péskire romniása;" 
Mark10:8 i javéna jone syr jekh loč (plot'); pal-dová so jone isyn kakaná na duj, a jekh loč." 
Mark10:9 Pal-dová so Devél čhudiá khetané, mek adavá manúš te na rozmarel.”" 
Mark10:10 I dro kher sykliaibnýtka nevéstyr phučné Léstyr pal davá. 
Mark10:11 I phendiá Jov lénge: “Kóli kon mekéla péskire romniá i léla javirja, odová keréla biladžaipén pervoné romniake;" 
Mark10:12 i kóli joj kokori rozdžalape péskire romesa i vydžála paloróm pal javiréste, tedy joj keréla biladžaipén.”" 
Mark10:13 I jone janénas ke Isúso tykné bijatén, sob (kaj) Jov te čilavel len; a sykliaibnýtka košle len [na domekenas-r.s.]" 
Mark10:14 Ne kiéli Isúso dykhciá davá, Jov xoliásyja i phendiá: “Mekén čhavorén ke Me; i na terdjon pe drom lénde, pal-dová so Kralipén dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo javéla léngiro." 
Mark10:15 Čačes, rakiráva tuménge: kon na priléla Kralipén dro Devléskiro Rajo, adiáke syr davá bijáto, odová na zadžála dro Kralipén.’”" 
Mark10:16 I Jov oblyja bijatén, čhudiá upré vastá pe lénde, i bahtiakirdiá len." 
Mark10:17 Ne kiéli Isúso vydžálas dro drom, ke Jov podprastandyja manúš, pyjá pe čangá angíl Léste i phuciá: “Drógo Sykliakiribnáskiro! So mánge te keráv, sob (kaj) te doresav paš dro viéčno džiibén?”" 
Mark10:18 “Palsó tu kharesa man ‘Drógo?’” – phendiá Isúso. ‘Drógo isyn jekh Devél. 
Mark10:19 Tu džinésa priphenybená: ‘Na zamar, na ker biladžaipén, na čor, na sovlahá xohanés (pefromi), na xohav, kutiakir dadés i da.’”" 
Mark10:20 “Sykliakiribnáskiro, – otphendiá i phendiá pe davá manúš, – saró davá me zrakhcjom čhavoripnastyr.”" 
Mark10:21 Isúso laskasa podykhciá pe léste i rakiréla: “Túke jekh na uhtýlla (nádosi): džá, rozbikin saró péskiro barvalypén, i rozde lové čororenge, tedy túte javéla kučipén pe bolybén; tén'či jav, džá pal Mánde.”" 
Mark10:22 Manúš jaciá smentno (skučno) dalé lavéndyr, i gijá dre rig pharé minasa: pal-dová, so Jov sys drieván barvaló." 
Mark10:23 Isúso lydžijá trusciál i phendiá Péskire sykliaibnytkonénge: “Syr pharó javéla barvaleske te zadžál dro Kralipén dro Devléskiro Rajo.” 
Mark10:24 Sykliaibnýtka strahádyne Léskire lavéndyr, a Isúso nevéstyr otphendiá lénge, rakirí: “Čhavorale! Syr isyn pharó te zadžán dro Kralipén dro Devléskiro Rajo odolénge, kon patiála zoralés dro barvalypén." 
Mark10:25 Davá lokhedýr vierbliudoske te prodžal pir suvjakiro kan, syr barvaleske te zadžál dro Kralipén dro Devléskiro Kralipén.”" 
Mark10:26 Sykliaibnýtka iščo (inké) butýr divindlépe i lyné te phučén jekh jekhestyr: “Kon da moginéla tedy te zrakhelpe?” 
Mark10:27 Isúso podykhciá pe lénde i phendiá: “Manušénge davá naštý apríč Devléste. Devléske saró saštý.” 
Mark10:28 Pétri tedy lyjá te rakirél Léske: “Ame saró jačkirdiam i gijam pal Túte.” 
Mark10:29 Isúso phendiá: “Čačes, Me rakiráva tuménge: Nane nikonés, kon jačkirdiá kher, ci pšalén, ci phenien, ci dadés, ci da, ci čhavorén, ci féldy vaš Mánge i vaš Jevángielija," 
Mark10:30 konéste na javélas dre šel móly butýr doléstyr, so lénde isyn dro davá džiibén: kherá, pšalén, phenien, dajen, čhavorén, féldy, ne khetané sarésa i tradypena, a dro anglatunó džiibén jone doreséna (dolena) viéčno džiibén." 
Mark10:31 A but anglatuné, javéna palatuné, a palatuné – anglatuné.’”" 
Mark10:32 Jone sys dro drom ke Jerusalimo; Isúso gijá angíl sykliaibnytkonende, savé džánas dre dar, adiáke-pac' syr i manušá, savé džánas pal Léste. Jov khardiá dre rig Peskiren dešudujen sykliaibnytkonén i lyjá te rakirél lénge pal dová, so treindiá Lésa te javél:" 
Mark10:33 “Ame džása pašyledýr ke Jerusalimo, i Čhavó Manušéskiro javéla zdyno rašángire barydyrénge i lylvaritkonenge: jone zasendinena Les pe maribén i zdena Les Najudénge;" 
Mark10:34 jone javéna te sanpe xoliames, i te čungarden pe Léste, te marén Les čupniasa i muliakirena Les, ne pir trin dyvesá Jov otdžidjola.”" 
Mark10:35 I džána pašyledýr ke Isúso Jakovo i Iáno, duj Zaviediejoskire čhavé, i rakiréna Léske: “Sykliakiribnáskiro, ame myslinasa dro iló, sob (kaj) Tu te kerés vaš aménge dová, pal so ame mangasa Tut.”" 
Mark10:36 Jov phendiá lénge: “So isyn tuménge pir iló, sob (kaj) Me te keráv vaš tuménge?”" 
Mark10:37 “De vólia aménge dro Tyró Kralipén te bešas jekhéske pir čačó i javireske pir zérvo (liévo) vast Tútyr”, – phendlé jone Léske." 
Mark10:38 “Tumé kokoré na džinéna, so tumé mangena”, – phendiá lénge Isúso. “Naúšto tumé moginéna te p'jen davá tahtái, savó Me pjava, i te bolenpe boldeipnasa, savésa Me bolavape?”" 
Mark10:39 “Moginasa”, – otphendlé jone Léske. Tedy Isúso phendiá lénge: “Te p'jen tahtáj (čaša), savó Me pjava, i te bolenpe boldeipnasa, savésa Me som boldo, tumé javéna;" 
Mark10:40 ne te dav vólia tuménge te bešén pir čačó i pir zérvo vast Mándyr, – davá isyn na dre Mirí zor; dalé štéty isyn kodolénge, konéske jone isyn prigotovindle.”" 
Mark10:41 Kiéli javír deš sykliaibnýtka šundlé pal davá, jone xoliasyne pe Jakovoste i Ianoste." 
Mark10:42 Isúso khardiá len i rakiréla: “Tumé džinéna, so kodolé, savén ginéna pal baré rande pe Najudénde, rikirna zor te xulainen pe lénde, i léngire baré raja xulainena pe lénde:" 
Mark10:43 ne mek davá te na javél maškír tuménde. Odová, kon kaméla te javél naj baredýr maškír tuménde, mek te javél dynári tuménge," 
Mark10:44 i kon kaméla te javél pérvo maškír tuménde, mek te javél pishári sarénge." 
Mark10:45 Adiáke i Čhavó Manušéskiro javdiá na vaš dová, sob (kaj) Léske te dynarinén (te služynen), ne sob (kaj) Jov kokoró te dynarinél i te otdél Péskiro džiibén, syr vykinybén pal butende.”" 
Mark10:46 I jone javné dro Jerihóno. Kiéli Isúso vydžálas Jerihonostyr Péskire sykliaibnytkonénca i buté manušénca, kororó bógo Vartimiejo, Timiejoskiro čhavó, sys beštó pašýl drom." 
Mark10:47 I, syr Jov šundiá, so davá sys Isúso Nazarianino, jov lyjá te del gódla: “Isúsie, Čhavó Davidóskiro! Potangine (požalin) man!”" 
Mark10:48 I but manušá lyné te rakirén xoliása Léske, sob (kaj) jov te javél štyl, ne jov délas gódla iščo (inké) zoraledýr: “Čhavó Davidóskiro! Potangine man!”" 
Mark10:49 Isúso terdijá i phendiá: “Kharén les.” I jone khardé korores, rakirí Léske: “Jav muršesa, uštý, Jov kharéla tut.”" 
Mark10:50 Vartimiejo čhurdyjá krig péstyr upratuno uribén, uhtia i podgíia ke Isúso." 
Mark10:51 “So tŭke trej, sob (kaj) Me te keráv túke?” – phuciá Isúso. Kororó phendiá Léske: “Ravvuni, sob (kaj) te otkerenpe Miré jakhá.”" 
Mark10:52 “Džá, – phendiá Léske Isúso, – tyró patiaibén vysastiakirdiá tut.” Kororó adáj ža lyjá te dykhél i gijá pir drom pal Isusóste." 
Mark11:1 Kiéli Isúso sykliaibnytkonénca podginé pašyledýr ke Jerusalimo ke gavá Vifagija i Vifanija, savé sys pe Olivitkone – bergákiro sklono, Isúso bičhadiá dujén Péskire sykliaibnytkonendyr," 
Mark11:2 i phendiá lénge: “Džán dro gav, savó isyn angíl tuménde, i kiéli tumé odorík zadžána, tumé dykhéna priphandle ternin'kone osljonkos (miegarorís), pe savéste nikón na sys beštó. Otphanden les i janén adarík." 
Mark11:3 Kóli kon phučela tuméndyr, so tumé keréna, phenén léske: ‘Osljonko trej Ráske-Devléske’, i ‘So Jov syg riskiréla les pale.’”" 
Mark11:4 Sykliaibnýtka giné, i lathné osljonkos, savó sys priphandlo javrí pašýl kherítko pórta i otphandle les." 
Mark11:5 Vari-savé manušá, savé sys terdé odój, rakirdé lénge: “So tumé keréna? Palsó tumé otphandena osljonkos?”" 
Mark11:6 Sykliaibnýtka otphendlé lénge adiáke, syr phendiá Isúso, i manušá mekné len te džán." 
Mark11:7 I jone jandlé osljonkos ke Isúso i čhudé upré pe léste péskire uribená, i Jov besciá pe léste." 
Mark11:8 I but manušá čhuvénas péskiro uribén pir drom, javír čhurdenas pe drom zelena randiá, savé jone sčhindle feldendyr." 
Mark11:9 I manušá, savé giné angíl i palál Isusóste, dénas gódla radymása: – “Asanna! Bahtiakirdó, Savó džála vaš lav Devléskiro!" 
Mark11:10 Bahtiakirdó, Savó džála dro Kralipén Dadéskire amareskiro Davidóskiro! – “Asanna dre upratunende!”" 
Mark11:11 I kiéli Jov javdiá dro Jerusalimo, zagijá dre Khangirí; obdykhcia pašýl Péste saró i vygijá. Syr sys uže koríg (poznes), to Jov gijá dešudujé sykliaibnytkonénca dre Vifanija." 
Mark11:12 I pe javír dyvés, kiéli jone vyginé Vifanijatyr, Isúso bokhalyja;" 
Mark11:13 i Jov dykhciá durál inžyritko kašt (drévo), savó sys čhakirdo patrienca (listenca) i podgíia pašyledýr te dykhél, ci isyn pe léste barjakirdé (plódy). Ne barjakirdé pe kašt na sys, jekh patria, pal-dová, so časo vaš múri na javdiá." 
Mark11:14 I phendiá Jov pe davá kašt: “Mek nikón te na xal barjakirdó tútyr nijékhvar.” I sykliaibnýtka Léskire šundlé davá. 
Mark11:15 I javné jone dro Jerusalimo. I Jov zagijá dre Khangirí i lyjá te tradel javrí odolén, savé biknenas i kinenas dre Khangirí; i Jov obriskirdia odolengire skaminda, savé paruvenas lové i prilavki odolengire, savé biknenas golumben:" 
Mark11:16 i Jov na délas vólia te lydžán nisó tovarostyr (arcikulendyr) pirdál Khangirí; 
Mark11:17 i Jov sykliakirdiá i phendiá lénge: “Saré manuše javéna te kharén Miro kher ‘Mangipnytko kher’ vaš saré nácyi, syr isyn čhindló?’ A tumé kerdé léstyr rozmaribnar'jengiri kirčyma.”" 
Mark11:18 I rašángire barydyrá i lylvarítka šundlé davá i rodenas, syr te muliakirén Les; pal-dová so jone darándyne Léstyr, pal-dová so saré manušá divindlépe pe Léskiro sykliakiribén." 
Mark11:19 I kiéli javdiá bel'vél', Isúso sykliaibnytkonénca giné foróstyr." 
Mark11:20 Tasiárles (ránes) pe javír dyvés, syr jone džánas pašýl, jone dykhné, so inžyro zašutija ke phuv." 
Mark11:21 Pétri priripirdia i phendiá Léske: “Ravvi! Dykh, inžyro zašutija, savó Tu prokostian!”" 
Mark11:22 I Isúso phendiá lénge: “Patián dre Devléste!” 
Mark11:23 Čačes rakiráva tuménge: “Kóli kon priphenela daliake bergake: ‘Ĥazdepe i čhurdepe dro paní’ i, kóli tumé na javéna te kuninenpe dro tumaró iló, i javéna te patián, so javéla dová, so jov rakiréla, tedy Devél spolninela vaš adalé manušéske." 
Mark11:24 Paldavá Me rakiráva tuménge: saró, pal so tumé mangénape i mangena, patián, so tumé doresné (dolyne), i javéla dynó tuménge." 
Mark11:25 I kóli tumé mangénape, tedy primangen sarénge, pe konéste rikiréna xolý, sob (kaj) i tuménge tumaró Dad, Savó isyn dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo, te otmekél tumaré gréhi.”" 
Mark11:26  
Mark11:27 Isúso sykliaibnytkonénca javné nevéstyr dro Jerusalimo. I kiéli Isúso sys dre Khangirí, ke Jov podginé rašángire barydyrá, lylvarítka i godephuré." 
Mark11:28 I jačné te rakirén Léske: “Save zorjása Tu kerésa saró davá? I kon dyjá Túke dasaví zor te kerés davá?” 
Mark11:29 Isúso ž phendiá Lénge: “Me phučava tuméndyr jekh lav i otphenen Mánge, i tedy Me phenáva tuménge, savé zorjása Me keráva saró davá." 
Mark11:30 Ianoskiro boldeipen isyn bolybnástyr ci manušéndyr? Otphenen Mánge.” 
Mark11:31 Jone rakirdé maškír péste: ‘Kóli phenása, so bolybnástyr’, Jov tedy phučela: ‘Sóske tumé na patiandyné Léske?’" 
Mark11:32 Ne kóli ame phenása: ‘Manušéndyr’ – jone darándyne manušéndyr, savé sys odój, pal-dová so saré gindlé Ianos pal Devléskire prorokoste." 
Mark11:33 I jone phendlé Isusóske dro otphenybén: “Na džinása.” I Isúso phendiá lénge: “I Me na phenáva tuménge, savé zorjása Me keráva davá.”" 
Mark12:1 I Isúso lyjá te rakirél manušénge primierenca (sykaibnenca): “Jekh manúš čhudiá vinagrádniko, i tyno pašýl léste, vy ĥanadia ĥanbín (jama) te tasavel mol (vino) i kerdiá vučardý (vyška) te rakhén, i zdyja les vinagradar'jenge dro najmo i kokoró tradyjá." 
Mark12:2 Ne kiéli javdiá časo, jov bičhadiá ke vinagradarja jekhe péskire pishar'jendyr te lel péskiri paš aplodostyr," 
Mark12:3 ne vinagradarja uhtyldé les, mardé i otbičhade les krig nisosa." 
Mark12:4 Tedy jov bičhadiá nevéstyr ke jone javire pisharís, ne i léske pharade šeró barénca i ladžakirdé les." 
Mark12:5 I bičhadiá tritone dynarís; a les vinagradarja sarésa zamardé; konés xuláj na bičhavelas, jone sarén marenas ci zamarenas." 
Mark12:6 Léste butýr ni konés na jačelaspe te bičhavel apríč péskire jekhe drogoné čhavéste. “Ne, ĥáda, jone na čilavena miré čhavés”, – dumindia jov i bičhadiá les dro kónco (dro jagóro)." 
Mark12:7 I vinagradarja phendlé jekh jekhéske: “'Gada, isyn nasliedniko (prilyibnaskiro pe mištypén): javén, zamarasa les i vinagrádniko javéla amaró.”" 
Mark12:8 Jone lyné les, zamardé i čhurdyné javrí les vinagradnikostyr." 
Mark12:9 So javéla te kerél vinagradnikoskiro xulái? Jov javéla, muliakiréla vinagradar'jen, a vinagrádniko zdela javirénge." 
Mark12:10 Ci na gindlé tumé dro Čhinybén: ‘Bar, savó na prilyné butiarné, jaciá šeralé baresa pe venglo vaš kher." 
Mark12:11 Davá isyn Devléstyr i isyn divno dro amaré jakhá’” 
Mark12:12 I jone rodenas saštypen te uhtylel Les, ne darándyne manušéndyr, pal-dová so jone ĥalyné, so Jov rakirdiá davá primiéro (sykaibén) pal lénde; jone mekné Les i giné krig." 
Mark12:13 I jone bičhadé ke Isúso vari-savé Farisiejendyr i Irodianendyr, sob (kaj) te uhtylén Les dro lav." 
Mark12:14 Kodolé manušá javné ke Isúso i phučné: “Sykliakiribnáskiro! Ame džinása, so Tu san čačunó i sykliakiresa Devléskire čačipnenge, na dykhí pe manušéskiro štéto maškír javire manušénde, Tu na daresa nikonestyr; phen aménge čačunés: ci pir Zakóno te pleskiras myto kiesarjoske? Te pleskiras aménge ci nad?”" 
Mark12:15 Isúso džindiá léngiri frotyma i phendiá lénge: “Sóske tumé kaména te propatiakiren Man?” – phuciá Jov. “Janén Mánge dinarijo te dykháv.” 
Mark12:16 Léske jandlé ĥasprin (kapieika) i Jov phuciá léndyr: “Konéskiro muj i lav isyn vyčhindlé adái?” “Kiesarjoskiro”, – phendlé jone Léske." 
Mark12:17 Tedy Isúso phendiá lénge: “Otdén kiesarjoskiro kiesarjoske, a Devléskiro Devléske.” Jone drieván divindlépe Léstyr." 
Mark12:18 I javné vari-savé Sadukiei ke Isúso. Sadukiei rakirdé, so nane otdžidyipen meribnástyr. Jone jačné te phučén Léstyr:" 
Mark12:19 “Sykliakiribnáskiro! Mójza čhindiá vaš aménge: kóli vari-konéste pšal meréla i jačkiréla džuvliá bi čhavorengiro, mek léskiro pšal te lel adalia džuvliá paloróm, sob (kaj) te riskirél pale ródo mulé pšaleskiro." 
Mark12:20 Sys eftá bitrinéngiro deš pšála; i pérvo pšal lyjá romniá, i myjá, na jačkirdiá péske ródo;" 
Mark12:21 i javír lyjá la i myjá, na jačkirdiá péske ródo: i tríto pšal adiáke-pac';" 
Mark12:22 i saré eftá na jačkirdé čhavorén. Syg pal sarénde i džuvlý myjá. 
Mark12:23 Dro otdžidyipen, kiéli jone uštena meribnástyr, konéskiri romný javéla kadaja džuvlý? Pal-dová so saré eftá pšála sys lákire romá.”" 
Mark12:24 Isúso phendiá lénge: “Tumé xohavenape, pal-dová so tumé na džinéna ni Čhinybén, ni zor Devléskiri?" 
Mark12:25 Save otdžidjona meribnástyr, na javéna te vydžán paloróm; i na javéna te lenpe; a jone javéna syr Jangóly dro Bolybnáskiro Rajo." 
Mark12:26 Kakaná, rakirí pal otdžidyipen muléndyr: ci na gindlé tumé dre Mojzáskire lylvaria pal dová, syr Devél phendiá Léske Péskiro lav xrustostyr, savó xačolas jagása: ‘Me som Devél Avraamóskiro, Devél Isaakoskiro i Devél Jakovóskiro?’”" 
Mark12:27 Jov isyn Devél na mulenge, Jov isyn Devél džidé-manušéngiro! Tumé drieván xohavenape.”" 
Mark12:28 Jekh lylvaritkonendyr šundiá, syr jone dophenenas Léske, to pri'galyja, syr mištés Isúso otphendiá lénge i phuciá Léstyr: “Savó priphenybén isyn baredýr saréndyr?”" 
Mark12:29 Isúso otphendiá: “Ĥáda, isyn baredýr saréndyr: ‘Šun Izrailjo! Raj Devél amaró isyn jekh Devél;" 
Mark12:30 rikir dro péste syr Drógima Ras-Devlés tyrés saré ilésa peskiresa i saré Duhósa tyresa i saré godiása tyrjasa i saré zorjása tyrjasa’. 
Mark12:31 Javír priphenybén isyn syr pérvo: ‘Rikir dro iló pašatunes tyrés, syr kokoró pes’. Nane priphenybená baredýr dalendyr.”" 
Mark12:32 “Mištó! Čačipén Tu phendián, Sykliakiribnáskiro, – phendiá Léske lylvarítko, – “Devél isyn Jekh i javír butýr nane apríč Léste;" 
Mark12:33 i te rikires syr Drógima Les saré ilésa, saré godiása, saré zorjása, te rikires dro iló pašatunes péskires, syr kokoró pes-butýr, syr celoné-xačkiribnaskire dyibená i svénta dyibená.”" 
Mark12:34 Isúso dykhciá, so lylvarítko god'vares otphendiá i phendiá Léske: “Nadur tu san Devléskire Kralipnastyr.” Dolé molostyr nikoneste butýr na sys muršypen te zadel Isusóske butýr phučibena." 
Mark12:35 I, kiéli nevéstyr Isúso sykliakirdiá dre Khangirí, Jov otphenélas: “Syr adalé lylvarítka rakiréna, so Xristóso isyn Čhavó Davidóskiro?”" 
Mark12:36 Davído ža Kokoró phendiá Sventoné Duhósa: “Phendia Raj Devél Ráske-Devléske miréske: beš pe čačó (pravo) vast Mándyr, paka Me čhuváva vergén Tyrén tel ĥerá tyré.”" 
Mark12:37 Davído ž Kokoró khardiá Les “Raj Devél”, katýr ža Jov isyn Čhavó Léskiro?” I but manušá šundlé Les radymása." 
Mark12:38 I rakirdiá Isúso duredýr dro Péskiro sykliakiribén: “Rakhénpe lylvaritkonendyr, savénge pir iló te psirén dre dlenge uribená i lénge trej, sob (kaj) te patyvakiren len pe targitka štéty;" 
Mark12:39 savé vykedena te bešén pe anglatuné štéty dre sinagogi i pal khardé skaminda," 
Mark12:40 savé obhana pivliengire (udovengire) kherá i mangénape ĥará (dlúges), sob (kaj) len te dykhén; adasaven manušén užakiréla pharó sendiakiriben.”" 
Mark12:41 I Isúso besciá angíl Khangirjákire-lovitko piralý (tyknori) i dykhciá, syr manušá čhuvénas lové dre piralý. But barvalé manušá čhuvénas baré kicypena lové." 
Mark12:42 Ne ĥáda, podgíia čorori pivly (udova), i čhudiá duj xarkuné ĥaspria (miedítka gaspria), so isyn syr jekh kodranto." 
Mark12:43 Jov khardiá Péskire Sykliaibnytkonén i phendiá: “Čačes, Me rakiráva tuménge: adáia čorori pivly čhudiá butýr saréndyr, savé čhuvénas dre tyknori," 
Mark12:44 pal-dová so jone čhuvénas péskire balvalypnastyr, a joj péskire čororipnastyr dyjá saró, so láte sys, saró so sys láte te dživél.”" 
Mark13:1 Kiéli Isúso vydžálas Khangirjátyr, jekh sykliaibnytkonendyr rakiréla Léske: “Dykh, Sykliakiribnariskiro! Save bará! Save uprekeribena!”" 
Mark13:2 “Tu dykhésa saré dalé baré kherá?”, – phendiá Léske Isúso. “Na jačélape adáj bar pe bar, savó na javélas čhurdynó telé.”" 
Mark13:3 Kiéli Isúso sys beštó pe Olivitkone-bergákiro sklono angíl Khangirí, sykliaibnýtka Pétri, Jakovo, Iáno i Jendri phučenas Léstyr jekh pe jekh javirendyr:" 
Mark13:4 “Phen aménge, kiéli davá saró javéla i saví špéra (znako) javéla angíl, syr saró davá kerélape?”" 
Mark13:5 Isúso otphendiá Lénge: “Rakhénpe, sob (kaj) nikón te na xohavél tumen." 
Mark13:6 But javéna ke tumé Miré lavésa i javéna te rakirén: ‘Me som’, i buten xohavena." 
Mark13:7 Kiéli tumé šunena pal maribén i mavlynia (malvy) pal maribena, na andyršan. Saró davá trej te javél, ne davá iščo (inké) na saró." 
Mark13:8 Pal-dová so ĥazdénape manušá pe manušénde i kralipén pe kralipén. Dre rázna štéty javéla te trinskirelpe phuv i javéla bokh. Saró davá javéla angíl sýrby dukhá, dre savé nevó manúš bijandjola," 
Mark13:9 Dykhén ža pal péste; tumen javéna te sendinén, i javéna te marén dre sinagogi. Pal Mánde tumen javéna te tyrden angíl rande i kral'jénde, i tumé javéna te dophenen lénge pal Mánde." 
Mark13:10 Ne angledýr saréstyr trej te phenelpe lav Jevangielijatyr vaš saré nácyi. 
Mark13:11 Kiéli tumen lydžána te zden, na piridživen angíl, so tuménge te rakirén; rakirén dová, so tuménge javéla dynó dre dová-pac' mardó (štúnda) te rakirén; pal-dová so na tumé kokoré javéna te rakirén, a Svénto Dúho (Fáno)." 
Mark13:12 Pšal javéla te biknel pe meribén pšalés i dad javéla te biknel péskires bijatós; čhavoré javéna te biknen péskire daden, sob (kaj) te muliakirén len." 
Mark13:13 Saré javéna te na den patýv zoralés tuménge pal Miro lav; a odová, savó vyrikiréla saró davá, javéla zrakhno." 
Mark13:14 Kiéli tumé dykhéna golotyniakiro/ zamekibnaskiro džungalypén (brytkima), odój, kaj láke na treindiá te javél (mek te ĥaljol odová, kon ginéla), ĥáda, mek odolé, savé isyn dre Judéia, te našén dre bérgi;" 
Mark13:14 Kiéli tumé dykhéna golotyniakiro/ zamekibnaskiro džungalypén (brytkima), odój, kaj láke na treindiá te javél (mek te ĥaljol odová, kon ginéla), ĥáda, mek odolé, savé isyn dre Judéia, te našén dre bérgi;" 
Mark13:15 kon isyn pe kherítko bérga, mek te na zdžal telé, i te na džal tele dro kher te lel vari-so kheréskire mištypnástyr." 
Mark13:16 Kon isyn dre félda, mek te na risjol pale te lel péskiro uribén." 
Mark13:17 Men'ka javéla tedy perale džuvlienge i džuvlienge, savé čaravena kolynesa tyknoren dre dolé dyvesá!" 
Mark13:18 Mangénpe Devléske, sob (kaj) davá te na javél ivantakiro/ivendeskiro (zimakiro)." 
Mark13:19 Tedy javéla dasaví pharí bída, saví na sys svetóskire anglypnástyr, savó Devél kerdiá, ke adadyvés, i so butýr na javéla nijékhvar." 
Mark13:20 I kóli Devél te na tykniakirelas dalé dyvesá, tedy nikón na vydživelas. A vaš manušénge, savén Jov Kokoró vykedyjá, Jov tykniakirdia dalé dyvesá." 
Mark13:21 Tén'ci kóli vari-kon phenéla tuménge: ‘Ĥáda, isyn Xristóso!’ Ci ‘Jov isyn odój’, – na patián," 
Mark13:22 iavéna xohané Xristosy, xohané proróki; jone sykavéna baré ĥertyka (znamiénii) i keréna dívy, sob (kaj) te xohaven až kodolén manušén, savén Devél vykedyjá, kóli javéla saštý." 
Mark13:23 Rakhénpe. Me tuménge saró angíl phendjom. 
Mark13:24 A dro dolé dyvesá, syr prodžála (nakhela) daja pharí bída, kham murdjola, i čhon na javéla te svencynel péskire svetosa (losasa)," 
Mark13:25 i čergeniá peréna bolybnástyr, i bolybnáskire zorja javéna trinskirde." 
Mark13:26 Tedy manušá dykhéna Manušéskire Čhavés, Savó javéla te džal dre óbloki baré zorjása i dre sláva." 
Mark13:27 I tedy bičhavéla Jov Péskire Jangolen i skedéla khetané, konés Jov vykedyjá štaré rigéndyr, phuvjákire jagoróstyr (krajostyr) ke Bolybnáskiro jagóro." 
Mark13:28 Sykljon primiéro (sykaibén) inžyritkone kaštéstyr: kiéli léskire randiá jačéna kovlé i mekéna patria (listy), to tumé džinén, so syg javéla lynaj (nilaj)" 
Mark13:29 adiáke i tumé, syr dykhéna, so davá saró adiáke kerlape, džinén, so Jov isyn nádur, pašýl vudará." 
Mark13:30 Čačes, Me rakiráva tuménge: na prodžála davá manušýtko ródo, paka saró davá kerélape ke kónco/ke jagóro (spolninelape)." 
Mark13:31 Bolybén i phuv prodžána, a lavá Miré na prodžána." 
Mark13:32 Nikón na džinéla ni dyvés, ni mardó (štúnda), kiéli davá saró javéla, ni bolybnáskire Jangóly, ni Čhavó – a jekh Dad džinéla." 
Mark13:33 Dykhén, i rakhénpe i mangénpe Devléske: pal-dová so tumé na džinéna, kiéli dasavo časo javéla." 
Mark13:34 Davá saštý (možna) te primierines manušésa, savó gijá dro daratuno drom. Jov jačkiréla péskiro kher, sob (kaj) te pridykhen pishárja. Kažnonéske pisharíske jov déla zadyiben, a odoléske, savó sys terdó pašýl pórta, priphendiá te dykhél rakhunes (pil'nes)." 
Mark13:35 Adiáke i tumé: “Dykhén, na soven!” Pal-dová so tumé na džinéna, kiéli risjola kheréskiro xulái: moginéla dre paš rat, ci syr probagala bašno, ci pe zlóko;" 
Mark13:36 sob (kaj), kiéli jov javéla, te na zauhtylel tumen, so tumé san suté." 
Mark13:37 I dová, so Me rakiráva tuménge, rakiráva sarénge: rakhénpe!”" 
Mark14:1 Pir duj dyvesá javélas svénko Patradí i Apriesnokengiro; rašángire barydyrá i lylvarítka dykhné rakhibnýtkes, syr te uhtylén Isusós frentymasa i te muliakirén Les." 
Mark14:2 “Ne pe svénko Patradí davá naštý te kerás nisyr, – rakirdé jone maškír péste, – manušá moginéna te ĥazdén búnto.”" 
Mark14:3 Kiéli Isúso sys dre Vifanija, Jov sys beštó pal skamínd dro kher ke Símono Prokazytkoneskiro, i dro kher zagijá džuvlý alibastrytkone khoresa (žbanosa) kučoné makhibnasa, savó sys kerdó čačuné nardanostyr. Joj rozmardiá khoró i lyjá te čhuvél pe šeró Isusóske." 
Mark14:4 Vari-savé sykliaibnýtka xoliasyne, rakirí: “Palsó dasavo makhibnaskiro xasiakiriben!" 
Mark14:5 Naúšto (uželi) sys naštý te biknel davá makhiben butýr syr pal trinšelá dinarii i te rozden lové bogenge.” I jone rakirdé xoliása láke. 
Mark14:6 Ne Isúso phendiá: “Mekén la, so tumé keréna pharó láke. Joj kerdiá lačhó réndo vaš Mánge." 
Mark14:7 Bogi isyn ŭsády (sak) pašýl tuménde i tumé moginéna te dzn vast lénge, kóli tuménge isyn pir iló, a Me na javáva ŭsády (sak) tuménca." 
Mark14:8 Joj kerdiá, so sys saštý dre lákiri zor, joj angledýr pomakhcia Miré masá ke garaiben." 
Mark14:9 Čačes, Me rakiráva tuménge: kaj by te na javél te phenelpe lav dalé Jevangielijatyr pir saró svéto, dro ripiribén pal adaliate džuvliáte javéna te rakirén pal dová, so joj kerdiá.”" 
Mark14:10 I Juda Iskarioto, jekh dešudujendyr sykliaibnytkonendyr, gijá tedy ke rašángire barydyrá te zdel Isusós." 
Mark14:11 I kiéli jone šundlé davá, jone adiáke obradyndlepe i dyné lav te den lové léske. I jov lyjá te rodél vakancyja (slučajo), sob (kaj) te zdel Isusós." 
Mark14:12 Dro pérvo ž dyvés Apriesnokengiro Svénko, kiéli čhinenas Patraditkone bakrores, sykliaibnýtka rakiréna Léske: “Kaj Túke isyn pir iló, sob (kaj) ame te džas i te kerás Túke patraditko skamínd?”" 
Mark14:13 Isúso bičhavéla dujén léndyr i rakiréla: “Džán dro fóro; i tumé dykhéna manušés pirjasa paniésa, džán pal léste," 
Mark14:14 i zadžán dro kher, dro savó jov zadžála, i phenén kheritkoné xuláske: “Sykliakiribnáskiro phučela: kaj javéla štúba, sob (kaj) Me Péskire sykliaibnytkonénca te xav Patradí?”" 
Mark14:15 Jov tuménge sykavéla upratuny bari šukár štúba; odój kerén skamínd vaš aménge”.” 
Mark14:16 Sykliaibnýtka Léskire giné, javné dro fóro; saró sys adiáke, syr phendiá lénge Isúso, i jone kerdé patraditko skamínd." 
Mark14:17 I kiéli jaciá bel'vél', Jov javdiá dešudujé sykliaibnytkonénca." 
Mark14:18 I kiéli jone sys bešté pal skamínd i xanas, Isúso phendiá: “Čačes, Me rakiráva tuménge: jekh tuméndyr zdela Man, savó xála Mánca.”" 
Mark14:19 Sykliaibnýtka pyné dro dúho (fáno), i lyné te phučén jekh pale jekhéste: “Čačes, davá na me, Rajo Dévla?”" 
Mark14:20 “Jekh dešudujendyr”, – phendiá Isúso, – “odová, kon khetané Mánca makinela dro čaró." 
Mark14:21 Čhavéske Manušeskireske prodžalape te menčynelepe, syr davá sys angíl phendló, a bída kodolé manušéske, savó zdela Čhavés Manušeskires! Fedýr javélas vaš léske te na bijandjol.”" 
Mark14:22 Kiéli jone xanas, Isúso lyjá maró, parikirdia Devléske pal léste, phagirdiá les, dyjá lénge, rakirí: “Len, xan; ake, isyn Miré masá.”" 
Mark14:23 I kiéli Jov lyjá tahtáj (čaša), phendiá parikiriben Devléske, dyjá lénge i jone saré piné léstyr." 
Mark14:24 “Ake, isyn Miro rat zavietóskiro, savó pročhudo pal butende”, – phendiá Jov lénge." 
Mark14:25 “Čačes, Me rakiráva tuménge: Me na javáva te pjáv butýr aplodo vinagradoskire xrustostyr angíl dová dyvés, kiéli Me javáva te pjáv neví mol (vino) dro Devléskiro Kralipén.”" 
Mark14:26 I kiéli jone zbagandle šardytko gilý Devléske, tedy giné pe Olivítko Bérga." 
Mark14:27 “Saré tumé Mándyr otperena”, – rakiréla lénge Isúso, – paldavá isyn čhindló: ‘Me xasiakiráva Čhupnaris i rosprastanape bakriá;’" 
Mark14:28 ne paló davá, kiéli Me otdžidjovava, Me sygedýr tuméndyr javáva dre Galiliéia.’”" 
Mark14:29 Ne Pétri ža phendiá Léske: “I kóli saré Tútyr otperena-me nikieli davá na keráva.” 
Mark14:30 Tedy rakiréla Léske Isúso: “Čačes, Me rakiráva Túke, so adadyvés bel'veliakiro, angíl dová, syr bašno probagala duj móly, tu trin móly otphenesape Mándyr.”" 
Mark14:31 A Pétri iščo (inké) butýr patiakirelas: “I kóli mánge javéla trej te merav Túsa, me na otphenavape Tútyr.” I saré sykliaibnýtka rakirdé dová-pac'." 
Mark14:32 I jone javné pe štéto, savó kharélape Giefsimanija i Isúso phendiá sykliaibnytkonénge: “Bešén kadaj, paka Me džáva te mangavpe Devléske.”" 
Mark14:33 I lyjá Jov pésa Petris, Jakovós i Ianos, i obuhtyldia Les bari dar i smentnyma." 
Mark14:34 “Miro iló isyn pherdó meribnytkone darása”, – rakiréla Jov lénge, – “iavén adái, i rakhénpe [na soven-r.s.].”" 
Mark14:35 I Jov otgijá nábut angíl, i pyjá mósa pe phuv, mangdiápe Devléske, sob (kaj), kóli saštý (možna), te prodžal (nakhel) dre rig Léstyr davá mardó (štúnda);" 
Mark14:36 i Jov rakirdiá: “Avva, Dádo! Tu saró moginésa. Lýdža davá tahtáj (čaša) dre rig Mándyr; a mek te na javél adiáke, syr Mánge isyn pir iló, a syr isyn Túke pir iló.”" 
Mark14:37 I Isúso javéla pale i lathéla, so jone isyn suté, i rakiréla Petriske: “Simonie, tu san sutó? Naúšto tu na mogindian jekh mardó te rakhespe [te na soves-r.s.]?" 
Mark14:38 Rakhénpe (na soven) i mangénpe Devléske, sob (kaj) te na poddenpe dro propatakiriben; dúho (fáno) isyn sastó, a masá isyn bizorjákire.”" 
Mark14:39 Isúso gijá i iščo (inké) mólo mangdiápe Devléske dolé-pac' mangipnasa (patierjasa). 
Mark14:40 I nevéstyr Jov risijá i lathiá, so jone sys suté, pal-dová so léngire jakhá sys začhakirde i jone na džindlé, so Léske te otphenen." 
Mark14:41 Risii ke jone dro tríto mólo, Jov phendiá lénge: “Tumé usá san suté i otkhinjona. Uhtýlla (dósi)! Mardó javdiá: dykhén, Čhavés Manušeskires zdena dre grehitkoné-manušéngire vastá." 
Mark14:42 Uštén, džása! Ake, uže sarésa pašýl isyn kodová, kon zdela Man!”" 
Mark14:43 I paka Jov iščo (inké) rakirdiá, javélas Juda, jekh dešudujendyr, i sys lésa but manušá kurtalenca i kilenca, savén bičhadé rašángire barydyrá, lylvarítka i godephuré." 
Mark14:44 Zdyibnari dorakirdiape lénca pal špéra (znako): “Kadavá, Konés me čamudava, isyn Jov; zakeden Les i lydžán tel rakhiben.”" 
Mark14:45 I jekhátyr podgíia jov ke Isúso, rakirí: “Dobridim, Ravvi!” I čamudia Les." 
Mark14:46 I jone čhudé vastá pe Léste i uhtyldé Les. 
Mark14:47 Jekh manušéndyr, savó sys terdó adái, vyuhtyldia kurtála péskiri i čingirdia lása rašángire barydyreskire pisharís i otčingirdia léske kan." 
Mark14:48 Isúso otphendiá lénge: “Syr pe rozmaribnariste tumé vyginé kurtalenca i kilenca te len Man? 
Mark14:49 Me kažno dyvés sómas beštó tuménca i sykliakirdjom dre Khangirí i tumé na lyné Man; ne mek te spolninélpe Čhinybén.” 
Mark14:50 I saré sykliaibnýtka mekné Les i našné krig. 
Mark14:51 A jekh ternó manúš sataki džálas pal Léste: pe léste sys jekh cérga pe psiké i jone uhtyldé les. 
Mark14:52 Ne jov vyriskirdiape léndyr krig i nascia odothýr nango (dre jekh cérga). 
Mark14:53 I jandlé Isusós ke pérvo rašángiro barydyró: i skedynépe saré rašángire barydyrá, godephuré i lylvarítka." 
Mark14:54 I Pétri džálas durál pal Léste duripnastyr ke pervoné-rašángire barydyreskiri gréda (dvóro); i jov besciá slugénca (dynar'jénca) i tatjolas pašýl jag. 
Mark14:55 Rašaja i saró Siniedriono rodyne dophenybén pe Isusóste, sob (kaj) te muliakirén Les, ne jone na mogindlé nisó te lathén." 
Mark14:56 But jakhítka (svidietieli) rakirdé xohanés pe Léste, ne léngiro dophenybén na zdžalaspe dro čačipén." 
Mark14:57 I vari-savé uštenas i dophenenas xohanés pe Léste, rakirí:" 
Mark14:58 “Ame šundiám, syr Jov rakirdiá: ‘Me rosphagirava daja Khangirí, saví kerdé manušá, i pale trin dyvesá ĥazdáva javír khangirí bi manušéngire vastengiro?’”" 
Mark14:59 Ne i dasavo léngiro dophenybén na zdžalaspe dro čačipén. 
Mark14:60 Tén'ci pérvo rašángiro barydyró uštyjá i phuciá Isusóstyr: “Tu so na otphenesa nisó? So adalé manušá dophenena pe Túte!” 
Mark14:61 Ne Isúso sys štyl. Pérvo rašángiro barydyró nevéstyr phuciá Léstyr: “Ci, čačó, Tu san Xristóso, Čhavó Bahtiakirde Devléskiro?”" 
Mark14:62 “Me som”, – otphendiá Isúso, – i tumé dykhéna Čhavés Manušeskires, syr Jov javéla te bešél pir čačó vast zorjátyr, kiéli Jov javéla pe bolybnáskire óbloki.”" 
Mark14:63 Tedy pérvo rašángiro barydyró roskuscia péskire uribená i phendiá: “Save aménge iščo (inké) akaná trej jakhítka? 
Mark14:64 Tumé ž šundlé teliakiriben pe Devléste? So tumé pe davá phenéna?” Saré priĥalyne, so Isúso sys bangó, sob (kaj) te muliakirén Les." 
Mark14:65 Tén'ci vari-savé lyné te čungarden pe Léste; Isusóske zaphandle jakhá, lyné te marén pir šeró burnykenca (ladoškenca) i rakirdé: “Uĥaljov!”; i slúgi (dynárja) mardé Les pir muj." 
Mark14:66 Kiéli Pétri sys telál pe gréda (pe dvóro), podgíia pašyledýr jekh pervoné-rašángire barydyreskire dynaricendyr." 
Mark14:67 Joj dykhciá Petris, syr jov tatjolas pašýl jag, rakhibnýtkes dykhciá pe léste i phendiá: “Tu ža sánas adalesa Isusósa Nazarietostyr?”" 
Mark14:68 Ne Jov otphendiape: “Me sarésa na džinóm (na džináv), pal so tu rakirésa”, – phendiá jov i gijá javrí ke pórta; i bašno probagandia." 
Mark14:69 Džuvlý-dynárica nevéstyr lyjá te rakirél manušénge, savé sys terdé: “Kadavá isyn jekh léndyr.”" 
Mark14:70 Ne Pétri nevéstyr otphendiape. Nábut korigedýr (pozžedýr) manušá, savé sys terdé odój, phendlé Petriske: “Ne, usajékh, tu ž san léndyr, tu ž adia-pac' san Galilejanino.”" 
Mark14:71 Pétri lyjá te košel pes, i te sovlahal: “Nad, me na džinóm kadalé Manušés, pal Savéste tumé rakiréna.”" 
Mark14:72 Ake, tedy bašno probagandia javír mólo, i Pétri priripirdia Isusóskire lavá: “Angledýr, syr probagala bašno duj móly, tu trin móly otphenesape Mándyr.” I jov lyjá te rovel." 
Mark15:1 I jekhátyr (srázu) pe zlóko, syr jaciá dyvés, rašángire barydyrá godephurenca i lylvaritkonenca i saró Siniedriono pirirakirde davá réndo, phandle Isusós i lydžiné Les ke Piláto." 
Mark15:2 Piláto phuciá Léstyr: “Tu san Králi Judéngiro?” Isúso otphendiá, – “adiáke, syr tu rakirésa.”" 
Mark15:2 Piláto phuciá Léstyr: “Tu san Králi Judéngiro?” Isúso otphendiá, – “adiáke, syr tu rakirésa.”" 
Mark15:3 Rašángire barydyrá bangiakirenas zoralés Isusós. 
Mark15:4 Piláto nevéstyr phuciá Léstyr: “Sóske Tu nisó na otphenesa? Ne, šun, syr but bangipena jone rakiréna pe Túte?”" 
Mark15:5 Ne Isúso usajékh nisó pe davá na phendiá, i davá drieván divindia Pilatos." 
Mark15:6 Pe svénko Piláto otmekelas jekhe manušés štaribnastyr (bešybnastyr) pir manušéngiro mangipén. 
Mark15:7 Dro štaribén dro dová časo sys beštó Varava javire manušénca, savé ĥazdyné búnto i zamardé manušés." 
Mark15:8 I manušá giné upré i lyné te mangén Pilatos pal davá, so jov saró mólo kerélas vaš lénge." 
Mark15:9 I Piláto otphendiá lénge, rakirí: “Kóli tuménge isyn pir iló, to me otmekáva tuménge Kralís Judengires?" 
Mark15:9 I Piláto otphendiá lénge, rakirí: “Kóli tuménge isyn pir iló, to me otmekáva tuménge Kralís Judengires?" 
Mark15:10 Piláto ž džindiá, so rašaja zdyne Isusós léske zevlynypnastyr." 
Mark15:11 Ne rašángire barydyrá podrakirde manušén te mangén Pilatostyr te otmekél lénge fedýr Varavas. 
Mark15:12 Ne Piláto nevéstyr otphendiá lénge: “So ž Mánge te keráv Adalesa, Konés tumé kharéna “Králi Judéngiro?”" 
Mark15:12 Ne Piláto nevéstyr otphendiá lénge: “So ž Mánge te keráv Adalesa, Konés tumé kharéna “Králi Judéngiro?”" 
Mark15:13 “Primar Les pe trušúl!”, – zadyne gódla nevéstyr jone." 
Mark15:14 Ne Piláto phendiá lénge: “Savó ž čoripén Jov kerdiá?” A jone iščo (inké) zoraledýr dyné gódla: “Primar Les pe trušúl!” 
Mark15:15 Piláto ž vaš dová, sob (kaj) te kerél manušénge pir iló, otmekciá Varavas, a Isusós otdyjá te marén čupniasa, tén'či te primaren pe trušúl." 
Mark15:16 Haladé lydžiné Isusós dre prietorija i khardé khetané pherdó xaladéngiro polko. 
Mark15:17 Jone uridé Les dre purpurno mantija, skhude phusadytkone ciernovnikostyr viánka i uridé pe Léskiro šeró." 
Mark15:18 I jone lyné te den gódla: “Jav džidó, Králjo Judéngiro!”" 
Mark15:18 I jone lyné te den gódla: “Jav džidó, Králjo Judéngiro!”" 
Mark15:19 Jone mardé Les trascinitkone destesa pir šeró i čungardyne pe Léste, perenas pe čangá angíl Léste i kloninenaspe." 
Mark15:20 I kiéli jone vysandle xoliames Les, jone zlyne Léstyr purpurno mantija, uridé Les dro Léskiro uribén, i lydžiné Les pe trušúl te primaren." 
Mark15:21 I jone začhude vari-savé Simonos Kirijaninos, Rufoskire i Lieksandroskire dadés, savó džálas feldatyr, te lydžál Léskiro trušúl." 
Mark15:22 I jone jandlé Isusós pe štéto, savó kharélape “Golgofa”, so značynéla “Čeriepo.”" 
Mark15:23 Jone dénas Léske te p'jel mol (vino), zmiešyndly mirósa, ne Jov otphendiape." 
Mark15:24 Kiéli jone primarde Les pe trušúl, jone roskerde (rosčhude) uribén Léskiro maškír péste pir žriébijo, konéske so te lel." 
Mark15:25 Sys tríto mardó (štúnda), kiéli jone primarde Les." 
Mark15:26 Pe phal, kaj čhinena bangipen, sys čhindló: “Králi Judéngiro.”" 
Mark15:26 Pe phal, kaj čhinena bangipen, sys čhindló: “Králi Judéngiro.”" 
Mark15:27 I jone primarde pe trušúl pašýl Léste duje rozmaribnar'jen, jekhés čačé rigátyr, javirés zervone (lievone) rigátyr." 
Mark15:28  
Mark15:29 I manušá, savé prodžanas pašýl Léste, kuninenas šerenca i rakirdé nalačhé lavá: “Tu ž kadavá san, Savó rosphagirelas Khangirí i pir trin dyvesá ĥazdesas la nevéstyr!" 
Mark15:30 Rakh Kokoró Pes, džá telé trušulestyr.”" 
Mark15:31 Adiáke-pac' rašángire barydyrá, khetané lylvaritkonenca, sandlepe xoliames Léstyr, rakirí: “Javirén Jov zrakhelas, a Jov na moginéla Kokoró Pes te zrakhél!" 
Mark15:32 Mek davá Xristóso, Králi Judéngiro, te džal telé trušulestyr, sob (kaj) aménge te dykhas, i te upatias dre Léste.” I rozmaribnarja, savé sys primarde Isusósa, adiáke-pac' ladžakirenas Les." 
Mark15:32 Mek davá Xristóso, Králi Judéngiro, te džal telé trušulestyr, sob (kaj) aménge te dykhas, i te upatias dre Léste.” I rozmaribnarja, savé sys primarde Isusósa, adiáke-pac' ladžakirenas Les." 
Mark15:33 I dro šóvto mardó (štúnda) jaciá kalypén pir sarí phuv i rikirdiape ke jeniáto (bijekhéskiro déšto) mardó (štúnda). 
Mark15:34 Dro jeniáto mardó dyvesé Isúso dyjá gódla zoralés Judytkes: “Eloi, lama savaktani?” So značynéla Romanes: “Dévla Miro, Dévla Miro, sóske Tu mekcian Man?”" 
Mark15:35 I vari-savé kodolé manušéndyr, savé sys terdé adái, kiéli jone šundlé davá, lyné te rakirén: “Šunén, Jov kharéla Ilijas.”" 
Mark15:36 Ne jekh léndyr podprastandyja pašyledýr, kindiakirdia gupka dro molitko uksuso, uridia la pe kašt i podyja te p'jel Isusóske; rakirí: “Užakiren. Dykhasa, syr javéla Ilíia te zlel Les.”" 
Mark15:37 Isúso ž, dyjá gódla zoralés i myjá." 
Mark15:38 Šýrma dre Khangirí rozriskirdiape samone upralestyr ke phuv. 
Mark15:39 A šelengiro barydyró, savó sys terdó angíl Isusóste, šundiá Léskiri godlyma i dykhciá, syr Jov myjá, phendiá: “Adavá manúš, čačes, sys Devléskiro Čhavó!”" 
Mark15:40 Dre rig sys terdé džuvliá i dykhenas duripnastyr: maškír lénde sys Maríia Magdalina, Maríia, daj Tyknedyreskiri Jakovoskiri i Iosijaskiri, Salomija," 
Mark15:41 davá sys adalé džuvliá, savé džánas pal Isusóste dre Galiliéia i dynarindlé Léske; odój sys but javír džuvliá, savé javné khetané Lésa dro Jerusalimo." 
Mark15:42 I syr javdiá bel'vél', davá sys parastivín (piatnica) – davá dyvés, savó džála angíl sávato (subóta)," 
Mark15:43 iavdiá Joza Arimafejatyr. Jov sys patyvalo manúš dro séndo, savó užakirdia Kralipén Devléskiro. Jov murškanés podgíia ke Piláto i mangdiá te del léske Isusóskiro trúpo." 
Mark15:44 Piláto zdivindiape, so Isúso uže myjá, khardiá šelengire barydyrés, phuciá léstyr: “Ci ĥará Jov myjá?”" 
Mark15:45 Syr Piláto udžindiá šelengire baredyrestyr, tedy otdyjá trúpo Jozáske." 
Mark15:46 Joza kindia pohtan, zlyjá Isusóskiro trúpo; obkrencyndia Les žužé pohtanesa i čhudiá dre koplíca, vyčingirdy dre skála, i priradia bar ke zagiibén dre koplíca." 
Mark15:47 Maríia Magdalina i Maríia, daj Iosijaskiri, dykhné, karik Isusós čhudé." 
Mark16:1 A kiéli progijá sávato (subóta), Maríia Magdalina, Maríia daj Jakovoskiri i Salomija, kindle aromatytka čarjá, sob (kaj) te džán te makhen Isusóskiro trúpo." 
Mark16:2 Pe zlóko, dro pérvo kurkeskiro dyvés, syr uštyjá kham, jone giné ke maĥila." 
Mark16:3 Pir drom jone rakirdé maškír péste: “Kon da aménge otriskirela krig bar pašýl zagiibén dre koplíca? 
Mark16:4 A kiéli jone pridykhnepe, dykhéna, so bar otriskirdo krig, a bar sys drieván baró." 
Mark16:5 Jone giné andré i dykhné terné manušés, savó sys uridó dro saró parnypen; jov sys beštó pir čačí rig vudarendyr, i jone strahádyne." 
Mark16:6 “Na andyršan”, – rakiréla jov lénge. “Tumé rodéna Isusós Nazarietostyr, Saves primarde pe trušúl. Jov otdžidyjá! Les adáj nane, davá isyn štéto, kaj Les čhudé." 
Mark16:7 Kakaná džán i phenén Léskire sykliaibnytkonénge i Petriske: “Jov džála angíl tuménde dre Galiliéia, odój tumé Les i dykhéna, syr Jov i phendiá tuménge.”" 
Mark16:8 Jone vyginé i dynepe te prastan maĥilatyr, syr pyjá pe lénde bari dar i izdrany; jone nikonéske nisó na phendlé, pal-dová so jone darándyne." 
Mark16:9 Otdžidyi dro pérvo kurkeskiro dyvés, Isúso sykadyjá angíl Marijake Magdalinake, savjátyr Jov vytradyjá eftá nalačhé dúhi (fany)." 
Mark16:10 Joj gijá i rosphendiá davá odolénge, kon sys Lésa i savé rovenas pal Léste i piridživenas;" 
Mark16:11 kiéli jone šundlé pal dová, so Isúso isyn džidó i, so joj dykhciá Les, jone na patiandyné." 
Mark16:12 Tén'ci Isúso sykadyjá dro javír dykhibén dujenge léndyr pir drom, kiéli jone giné pal fóro." 
Mark16:13 Kadalé duj manušá risiné i rosphendlé javirénge, ne jone i lénge na patiandyné." 
Mark16:14 Tén'ci Isúso sykadyjá dešujekhe sykliaibnytkonénge, savé xanas pal skamínd. Jov vyrakirdia lénge, so na uhtýlla (nádosi) lénde patiaibén i léngiro iló isyn pharó dro dová, so lénge sys na pir iló te patián odolénge, savé dykhné Les korigedýr (pozžedýr), syr Jov otdžidyjá." 
Mark16:15 Isúso phendiá lénge: “Džán pir saró svéto (lot) i phenén lav Jevangielijatyr kažnoné džidé sozdyibnaske. 
Mark16:16 Odolé, savé patiána i javéna te bolenpe, javéna zrakhné. Ne odolé, savé na javéna te patián-javéna sendindle." 
Mark16:17 Patiaibnaskire javéna te sykavén dasavé dívy: jone javéna Miré lavésa te tradén nalačhé dúhi, jone javéna te rakirén pe neve čibá (čibjá);" 
Mark16:18 jone javéna te len sapen vasténca ci te p'jen truta (otrava) i ni savó čoripén na javéla lénge, jone javéna te čhuvén vastá péskire pe nasvalende, i kodolé javéna te sastjon.”" 
Mark16:19 I kiéli Raj Devél Isúso phendiá lénge saró, tedy Jov sys ĥazdynó pe bolybén i besciá pe čačó vast Devléste Dadéste." 
Mark16:20 I jone vyginé i rosphendlé lav usiendie (viezdie), Raj Devél sys pašýl léngire réndy i Jov dophenelas léngire lavengiro čačipén znamienijénca (ĥiertykénca), savé džánas adáj že pal léngire lavá." 
Luke1:1 Pal-dová so, syr but manušá uže lynepe te čhinen rosphenyben pal dová, so sys maškír aménde i, so isyn drieván džindló tuménge," 
Luke1:2 jone udžindlé manušéndyr, savé pérva dykhné dová péskire jakhénca i služyndle (dynarindlé) vaš Devléskiro lav, adiáke jone piriphendle aménge." 
Luke1:3 Paldavá zdyjape i mánge, so javéla mištó te čhinav túke, baró Tieofilie, paló dová, syr me lačhés rozĥalyjom davá saró anglypnástyr," 
Luke1:4 sob (kaj) tu te džinés čačipén pal dová, dro so tut sykliakirdé." 
Luke1:5 Dro dolé dyvesá, kiéli Irodo sys králi pir Judéia, dživdiá jekh rašáj pir lav Zahárija Avijaskire rašángire rodóstyr, péskire romniása, Aronoskire rodóstyr pir lav Jelizavieta." 
Luke1:5 Dro dolé dyvesá, kiéli Irodo sys králi pir Judéia, dživdiá jekh rašáj pir lav Zahárija Avijaskire rašángire rodóstyr, péskire romniása, Aronoskire rodóstyr pir lav Jelizavieta." 
Luke1:6 Jone ž sys dujdžiné čačuné angíl Devléste, rikirdepe ke Devléskire priphenybená i Zakóno." 
Luke1:7 Lénde na sys čhavoré, pal-dová so Jelizavieta na mogindiá te bijanél, jone dujdžiné sys phuré pir beršá." 
Luke1:8 I sys adiáke: jékhvar, kiéli Zahárija kerdiá péskiri butý syr rašáj angíl Devléste, syr sys prilyno péskire rodóstyr," 
Luke1:9 pal rašángiro dorakiribén pir žriébijo léske treindiá te zadžál dre Khangirí i te thuvliakirel gudlé smolenca ladanostyr," 
Luke1:10 i saré manušá mangnepe Devléske javrí dro davá časo, kiéli sys thuvliakiriben gudlé smolasa." 
Luke1:11 I sykadyjá Zaharijaske Devléskiro Jangólo, savó sys terdó pir čačí (pravo) rig thuvitkone (kadilytkone) altarjostyr." 
Luke1:12 Zahárija strahadyja, kiéli dykhciá les, i dar pyjá pe léste." 
Luke1:13 Ne Jangólo phendiá Léske: “Na andyrša, Zahárija, pal-dová so Devél šundiá tyró mangipén, i tyrí romný bijanéla čhavés, i tu désa lav Léske Iáno." 
Luke1:14 I javéla túke bari rádyma i viesjolyma (loš), i but manušá javéna te radynénpe léskire bijanypnastyr." 
Luke1:15 Pal-dová so jov javéla baró angíl Raste-Devléste, i jov na javéla te p'jel mol (vino) i zoralé pibena, i Svénto Dúho (Fáno) javéla dre léste adáj že, syr jov bijandjola," 
Luke1:16 i jov riskiréla pale ke Léngiro Raj Devél buten Izrailjoskire čhavén. 
Luke1:17 I jov javéla angíl Raste-Devléste, zorjása i duhósa syr Ilíia, i jov keréla ramánie (miro) maškír dadende i čhavénde, riskiréla pe čačunó drom kodolén, savé na kandéna Devlés, sob (kaj) te skedel manušén vaš Ráske-Devléske.”" 
Luke1:18 I Zahárija phendiá Jangoloske: “Syr mánge te džináv, so adiáke javéla? Me som phuró, i mirí romný isyn uže dre beršá.”" 
Luke1:19 I Jangólo otphendiá Léske: “Me som Gavriilo, me som terdó pašýl Devléste. Jov bičhadiá man te phenáv túke i te janav túke davá bahtaló lav," 
Luke1:20 i, ĥáda, tu javésa štyl i tu na désa ráda (na zmoginesa) te rakirés angíl dová dyvés, kiéli saró davá kerélape, pal-dová so tu na patiandyjan Miré lavenge, savé kerénape ke kónco / jagóro dro péskiro časo." 
Luke1:21 I manušá užakirde Zaharijas i divindlépe pe davá, so jov ĥará (dlúges) na džálas javrí Khangirjátyr." 
Luke1:22 Kiéli jov vygijá javrí, jov na dyjá ráda te rakirél, i jone ĥalyné, so sys léste dykhibén dro Khangirí; i jov sykavelas vasténca i jov jaciápe niemo (muto)." 
Luke1:23 I kiéli dyvesá končyndlepe, dre savé jov lydžijá mangipén Devléske, jov risijá kheré." 
Luke1:24 I paló kadalé dyvesá e Jelizavieta, romný léskiri jaciá pharí, i garadiape pandž čhoná manušéndyr, rakirí péske:" 
Luke1:25 “Adiáke, Raj Devél kerdiá vaš mánge”, – phendiá joi, – “Jov, ĥáda, kerdiá lačhipén mánge, sob (kaj) Jov te lel krig mándyr ladž angíl manušénde.”" 
Luke1:26 Dro šóvto čhon Devél bičhadiá Jangolós Gavriilos ke Galilejakiro fóro Nazarieto. 
Luke1:27 Ke Patyvalý Terný Džuvlý, saví sys angrustiakirdy (dorakirdy) te džal paloróm pal muršeste pir lav Iosifo (Joza), savó sys Davidóskire rodóstyr; Patyvalia Ternia Džuvliá khardé Maríia." 
Luke1:28 I Jangólo zagijá ke joi, i phendiá láke: “Dobridim! Tu san bahtalý Devléstyr! Devél isyn Túsa!”" 
Luke1:29 Joj ža strahadyja dalé rakiribnastyr, i Joj dyjá godý péske (dumindia) pal dová; “So ž dalé lavá značynena?”" 
Luke1:30 I Jangólo phendiá láke: “Na andyrša, Maríia, pal-dová so Tu lathian bahtalypén Devléste." 
Luke1:31 I Tu javésa pharí, i bijanesa Čhavés, i Tu désa lav Léske Isúso." 
Luke1:32 Jov javéla baró, i Les léna te kharén Čhavésa Naj Vučedyreskiresa, i Raj Devél déla Léske Davidóskiro trono, Léskire Dadéskiro;" 
Luke1:33 i Jov javéla králi pe Jakovóskire manušénde pe saré viéki; i Léskiro Kralipén na končynelape.” 
Luke1:34 Ne Maríia phendiá Jangoloske: “Syr davá saštý (moginéla) te javél, kóli me na džináv romes?”" 
Luke1:35 I otphendiá láke Jangólo, pheny: “Svénto Dúho (Fáno) zdžála pe Túte, i zor Sarevučedyreskiri učhakiréla Tut; pal-dová so Svénto Čhavó, Savó bijandjola, javéla te kharelpe Devléskiro Čhavó." 
Luke1:36 I iščo (inké), seménca Tyrí, Jelizavieta, jaciá pharí dre lákire phuré beršá; i joi, savjá džindlé syr bičhavorengirja, kakaná isyn pharí šóvto čhon," 
Luke1:37 pal-dová so Devléste nane nisó, sob (kaj) Jov na délas by ráda (moginelas) te kerél." 
Luke1:38 I phendiá Maríia: “Ĥáda, me som Devléskiri pisharica; mek te javél Mánge pir Tyró lav.” I Jangólo gijá krig látyr." 
Luke1:39 Dre dalé dyvesá Maríia uštyjá i gijá sýges pir bergitko phuv ke fóro dre Judéia," 
Luke1:39 Dre dalé dyvesá Maríia uštyjá i gijá sýges pir bergitko phuv ke fóro dre Judéia," 
Luke1:40 i joj zagijá dro Zaharijaskiro kher i dyjá “dobridim” Jelizavietake. 
Luke1:41 I sys adiáke: kiéli Jelizavieta šundiá, syr Maríia dyjá “dobridim” láke, tyknó bijáto trinskirdiape upré jekh mólo dro lákiro per, i tedy Svénto Dúho (Fáno) pherdiakirdiá la, obradyndia pes" 
Luke1:42 i joj zoralés dyjá gódla i phendiá: “Tu san bahtiakirdy maškír džuvliende, i bahtiakirdó javéla bijáto, savés Tu bijanesa!" 
Luke1:43 I katýr davá javdiá mánge, so Ráskire-Devléskiri Daj javdiá ke Me?" 
Luke1:44 Pal-dová, kiéli me šundjom, syr Tu dyján “dobridim” mánge, miro tyknó bijáto obradyndiape radymátyr dro miro per," 
Luke1:45 so bahtalý isyn Kodoia, Saví upatiandyja dro dová, so davá javéla čačunés, syr Raj Devél phendiá láke.”" 
Luke1:46 I phendiá Maríia: “Miro iló barjakiréla patýv Ráske-Devléske," 
Luke1:47 i Miro dúho (fáno) radynélape pal Devléste, Miré Zrakhibnariste." 
Luke1:48 So Jov podykhciá laskasa pe Péskire pisharicate, saví isyn kanduny, pal-dová so dalé dyveséstyr saré ródy javéna te kharén Man “bahtiakirdy”;" 
Luke1:49 pal baripén, savó so kerdiá Mánge Zoralypnaskiro Devél, mek te javél svénto Léskiro lav," 
Luke1:50 I Léskiro tangipén javéla pe saré ródy, kon daréla Léstyr." 
Luke1:51 Jov kerdiá baré butiá Péskire myščasa (vastésa), rostradyja odolén, savé isyn phut'kirdé i but kaména dre péskire ile;" 
Luke1:52 Jov radia telé zoralen léngire tronendyr i ĥazdyjá upré kandune manušén; 
Luke1:53 Jov čaliakirdia čalés bokhalen, i mekciá krig barvalen čhučé vasténca," 
Luke1:54 Jov dyjá vast (pomogindia) Izrailjoske, Léskire dynaríske, sob (kaj) te ripirel Léskiro tangipén," 
Luke1:55 syr Jov dyjá lav i kerdiá amaré dadénge, Avraamostyr ke Léskiro ródo dre viéki.”" 
Luke1:56 Maríia sys ke joj pašé trin čhoná, i tén'či Joj risijá dro Péskiro Kher." 
Luke1:57 Kiéli Jelizavietake javdiá časo te bijanél, joj bijandiá čhavés." 
Luke1:58 I šundlé lákire susiédy (kotárja) i semency, so Devél sys lačhó ke joi, i radyndlepe khetané lása." 
Luke1:59 I sys adiáke: kiéli bijatoske (muršoreske) sys ohtó (bidujéngiro deš) dyvesá, jone javné te občhinen les, i jone kamlé te kharén čhavés “Zahárija” pir dadéste," 
Luke1:60 ne Jelizavieta, daj léskiri, phendiá: “Nad, Léskiro lav javéla Iáno.”" 
Luke1:61 Jone phendlé láke: “Nane nikonés dro saró tyró ródo, savéste isyn dasavo lav.”" 
Luke1:62 Jone phučné vasténca léskire dadéstyr, syr jov kamdiá te kharel čhavores." 
Luke1:63 Jov mangdiá phalori te čhinel, i čhindiá “Iáno” léske lav i saré ž divindlépe pe davá." 
Luke1:64 I jekhátyr Zaharijaskiro muj otkerdiape, léskiri čib otphandiape, i jov lyjá te rakirél, i te šarel Devlés." 
Luke1:65 Manušá, savé dživdé pašýl odój, strahádyne, i sarí bergitko phuv Judéia rakirdiá pal davá." 
Luke1:65 Manušá, savé dživdé pašýl odój, strahádyne, i sarí bergitko phuv Judéia rakirdiá pal davá." 
Luke1:66 I sarénge, kon šundiá davá, zapyja dro iló i jone rakirdé: “So da javéla dolé bijatostyr?” Pal-dová so Devléskiro vast sys pe léste." 
Luke1:67 Svénto Dúho (Fáno) pherdiakirdiá Zaharijas, léskire dadés, Savó lyjá te angilphenel, rakirí:" 
Luke1:68 “Bahtaló isyn Raj Devél, Izrailjoskiro Devél, Savó javdiá te dykhél Péskire manušén i te vyrakhel len," 
Luke1:69 Jov dyjá aménge zoralé Zrakhibnaris, savó isyn Dynári Davidóskire rodóstyr," 
Luke1:70 Syr Devél i dyjá lav but berš pale pir Péskire Sventoné prorokénde, savé phendlé," 
Luke1:71 so Jov zrakhéla amen amaré vergéndyr i kodolengire vasténdyr, savé drieván na vyrikirena amen," 
Luke1:72 i Jov potanginela (požalinela) amaré daden i ripirela Péskiro Svénto Zavieto. 
Luke1:73 So pe davá Jov déla sovláh aménge, syr Jov dyjá amaré prapapuske Avraamóske," 
Luke1:74 te zrakhél amen vasténdyr amaré vergéndyr, sob (kaj) ame te dynarinás bi darákiro Léske," 
Luke1:75 pir sventyma i patiaibén angíl Léste pir saré amaré dyvesá. 
Luke1:76 I tut, čhavoró, javéna te kharén prorokosa Naj Vučedyreskiresa, pal-dová so tu javésa te džas angíl Raste-Devléste te skedes drom Léske," 
Luke1:77 sob (kaj) te rosphenes manušénge pal dová, so jone zrakhenape, pal-davá so Devél otmekéla léngire gréhi," 
Luke1:78 pal-dová so, syr amaró Devél tanginela, i amen sam dróga Léske, i začhuvela kham te uštel vyčipnastyr," 
Luke1:79 te svencynel pe odolénde, savé dživéna dro kalypén (ciamlypén) i dre dar meribnástyr, sob (kaj) te džán amaré ĥerá pir drom ke ramánjo (miro).”" 
Luke1:80 O bijáto barjolas i jačelaspe zoraledýr dro dúho (fáno); jov dživdiá pe čhučí phuv angíl dyvés, syr te sykadiel Izrailjoskire manušénge." 
Luke2:1 Dre dolé dyvesá Rimoskiro khieningo (kiesarjo) Aŭgusto dyjá uphenybén te piriginen saré manušén, savé sys pir sarí phuv." 
Luke2:2 Davá sys pérvo piriginybén i les kerénas dro dová časo, kiéli o Kviriniejo sys Sirijakire-themeskiro barydyró." 
Luke2:3 Kažnonéske treindiá te javél dro péskiro fóro vaš piriginybén. 
Luke2:4 I Joza (Iosifo) adiáke-pac' gijá Nazarietostyr, savó isyn dre Galiliéia ke Judéia dro fóro Viflieemo, savó kharlape adiáke-pac' “Davidóskiro fóro”, pal-dová so jov sys Davidóskire manušéndyr i rodóstyr," 
Luke2:4 I Joza (Iosifo) adiáke-pac' gijá Nazarietostyr, savó isyn dre Galiliéia ke Judéia dro fóro Viflieemo, savó kharlape adiáke-pac' “Davidóskiro fóro”, pal-dová so jov sys Davidóskire manušéndyr i rodóstyr," 
Luke2:5 te začhinelpe Marijasa, Saví gindiape léske syr romný, i Saví sys pharí." 
Luke2:6 I sys adiáke: paka jone sys odój, javdiá Láke dyvés te bijanél," 
Luke2:7 i Joj bijandiá Péskire Pervoné Čhavés, i pat'kirdia Les dre pherne, i čhudiá Les dre jasla (khurly), pal-dová so na sys lénge štéto dro zatradypnytko kher (gostinica)." 
Luke2:8 Sys čhupnárja (pastuhi) pe kodoia rig pe félda, i rakhenas ratý péskiro gurto." 
Luke2:9 I jekhátyr (srázu) Devléskiro Jangólo javdiá angíl lénde, i Devléskiri sláva syr jaguno dud (svéto) zasvencyndia pašýl lénde; i pyjá pe lénde bari dar." 
Luke2:10 I Jangólo phendiá lénge: “Na darén, me phenáva tuménge lačhó nevipen pal bari rádyma vaš saré manušénge." 
Luke2:11 Adadyvés dro Davidóskiro fóro bijándyja tuménge Zrakhibnari, savó isyn Xristóso, Raj Devél." 
Luke2:12 I, ĥáda, tuménge znako (špéra): tumé lathéna Tykné Bijatos pat'kirdes dre pherne, i Jov javéla dre jasla.”" 
Luke2:13 I jekhátyr sykadyne but bolybnýtka xaladybena (Jangóly) khetané dalé Jangolosa; jone šarenas Devlés i rakirénas: 
Luke2:14 “Te slavinelpe Devél dre upratune bolybena, i te javél ramánjo (miro) pe phuv maškír manušénde, savéndyr Devél radynélape.”" 
Luke2:15 I sys adiáke: kiéli Jangóly giné krig léndyr pe bolybén, to čhupnárja phendlé jekh jekhéske: “Javén dro Vifliejémo te dykhas, so odój kerdiápe, pal so sys davá nevipen Rástyr-Devléstyr amarestyr.”" 
Luke2:16 I jone sýges javné, i lathné Maríia i Jozas (Iosifos) i Tykné Bijatos, Savó sys paštó dre jasla (khurly)." 
Luke2:17 Kiéli jone dykhné davá, jone rosphendlé pal dová, so sys phendló lénge pal dalé Tykné Bijatoste." 
Luke2:18 I saré, kon šundlé davá, divindlépe pe dová, so lénge čhupnárja phendlé." 
Luke2:19 Ne Maríia ripirelas saré dalé lavá, i duminelas pal lénde xor dro Péskiro iló." 
Luke2:20 I čhupnárja risiné pale šarenas i parikirenas Devléske pal saró, so jone šundlé i dykhné adiáke, syr lénge sys phendló." 
Luke2:21 I kiéli proginé ohtó (bidujéngiro deš) dyvesá, sob (kaj) te občhinen Tykné Bijatos, dyné Léske lav Isúso, lav, savó dyjá Jangólo angíl davá, syr Léskiri Daj jaciá pharí Lésa." 
Luke2:22 I kiéli proginé (nakhle) dyvesá, savé sys na žužé pir Mojzáskiro Zakóno, jone jandlé les te svenciakiren (te sykavén i te čhuvén dre rig Les) angíl Devléste," 
Luke2:23 syr isyn čhindló dro Devléskiro Zakóno: “Kažno muršoro, savó vydžála dákire ločoviátyr (utrobatyr), te javél svenciakirdo vaš Devléske”," 
Luke2:24 sob (kaj) te janén svénto dyibén, syr isyn phendló dro Devléskiro Zakóno, dujén golumbicen ci dujén golumbengire tyknoren." 
Luke2:25 I, ĥáda, sys manúš, savés khardé Simieono; jov sys čačunó manúš i darelas Devléstyr; jov užakirelas, kiéli javéla Izrailjoskiro Zrakhibnari, i Dúho (Fáno) Svénto sys pe léste." 
Luke2:26 I Dúho (Fáno) Svénto otkerdia džinybén Léske, so jov na meréla, paka jov dykhéla Devléskire Xristosós." 
Luke2:27 Dúho (Fáno) lydžijá les i jandiá dre Khangirí. I kiéli dad i daj jandlé Bijatos Isusós, sob (kaj) te kerén vaš Léske dová, so trej pir Zakóno," 
Luke2:28 to Simieono lyjá Les pe vastá, parikirdia Devléske i phendiá:" 
Luke2:29 “Kakaná, Rajo, Tu otmekesa Péskire pisharís, pir Lav Tyró ramanjosa (mirósa)." 
Luke2:30 Pal-dová so Miré jakhá dykhné Tyró zrakhibén," 
Luke2:31 Savó Tu prigotovindian angíl saré manušénde," 
Luke2:32 Jov javéla syr Dud (Svéto) te otkerel Tyrí vólia vaš Najudénge. Jov janéla sláva Tyré manušénge, Izrailjoske.”" 
Luke2:33 Ne o Joza, i Bijatoskiri Daj divindlépe pe dová, so sys phendló pal Léste." 
Luke2:34 Simieono bahtiakirdiá len i phendiá Marijake, Dake Leskirjake: “Pal Léste but manušá Izrailjostyr peréna i ĥazdénape syr bahtalé, Jov javéla sýrby ĥiertýk (znako) Devléstyr, pal Konéste manušá javéna te rakirén xoliása;" 
Luke2:35 i kurtála (miečo) promarela tyró iló, sob (kaj) te otkerenpe ĥaradé dúmy.”" 
Luke2:36 Adáj sys adiáke-pac' Anna, proročica, Fanuiloskiri čhaj, Asiroskire rodóstyr, saví dodživdia ke phurané beršá i dživdiá péskire romesa féni eftá berš, syr joj gijá paloróm." 
Luke2:37 Dalé pivliake (udovake) sys ohtodešá štar berš; joj na džálas Khangirjátyr i dynarindiá Devléske postosa i mangipnasa Devléske. 
Luke2:38 Dre dová-pac' mardó (štúnda) joj podgíia i slavindia Devlés, i rakirdiá pal Čhavoreste sarénge, kon užakirdia vyrakhiben dro Izrailjo." 
Luke2:39 I kiéli Joza i Maríia kerdé saró pir Devléskiro Zakóno, jone risiné dro léngiro fóro Nazarieto dre Galiliéia." 
Luke2:40 Bijáto barjolas i zoraljolas, jačelaspe ŭsa god'varedyr; i Devléskiro bahtylen sys pe Léste." 
Luke2:41 So berš dad i daj Léskire džánas ke Jerusalimo pe Svénko Patradí. 
Luke2:42 I kiéli Léske sys dešudúj berš, jone javné pe svénko, syr len sykliakirdé." 
Luke2:43 Kiéli svenkoskire dyvesá končyndlepe, jone risjonas kheré, ne Terné-Beršengiro Isúso jaciápe dro Jerusalimo, a Léskire dadá na dykhné davá;" 
Luke2:44 a jone dumindle, so Jov džála javirenca, ne syr jone proginé (nakhle) dyveseskiro drom, lyné te rodén Les maškír semencende i džindlende (pindžkirdende)," 
Luke2:45 i pal-dová so jone na lathné Les, to jone risiné dro Jerusalimo te rodél Les." 
Luke2:46 Pe tríto dyvés jone lathné Les dre Khangirí, kaj Jov sys beštó maškír sykliakirdende: Jov šunelas len i phučelas Léndyr." 
Luke2:47 Saré, kon šundiá Les, divindlépe pe Léskiri godý i pe dová, syr Jov otphenélas." 
Luke2:48 Kiéli Léskire dadá dykhné Les, jone zdivindlepe, i Léskiri Daj phendiá Léske: “Mro Čhávoro! So Tu kerdián aménge? Ĥáda, Tyró dad i Me baré dukhasa rodyjam Tut.”" 
Luke2:49 Jov phendiá lénge: “Vaš so tuménge treindiá te rodén Man? Ci na džinenas tumé, so Mánge trej te javav te keráv Miré-Dadéskiro réndo.”" 
Luke2:50 Ne jone na ĥalyné lavá, so Jov phendiá lénge." 
Luke2:51 I Isúso gijá lénca i javdiá dro Nazarieto, i Jov zoralés kandelas len. A Léskiri Daj ripirdia saré kadalé lavá dro Péskiro iló." 
Luke2:52 I Isúso jačelaspe god'varedyr i barjolas dro láska Devléstyr i manušéndyr. 
Luke3:1 Dro dešupandžto berš, kiéli Tivierijo sys khieningo (kiesarjo), a Pontijo Piláto sys balunitko (pravitieljo) pe Judéia, a Irodo sys xuláj pe Galiliéia, Léskiro pšal Filipo sys xuláj pe Itureja i Trahonitoskiri phuv, a Lisanijo xulaindia pe Avilineja;" 
Luke3:1 Dro dešupandžto berš, kiéli Tivierijo sys khieningo (kiesarjo), a Pontijo Piláto sys balunitko (pravitieljo) pe Judéia, a Irodo sys xuláj pe Galiliéia, Léskiro pšal Filipo sys xuláj pe Itureja i Trahonitoskiri phuv, a Lisanijo xulaindia pe Avilineja;" 
Luke3:2 i kiéli Anna i Kaiáfa sys rašángire barydyrá, javdiá Devléskiro lav Ianoske, Zaharijeskire čhavéske pe čhučí phuv." 
Luke3:3 I jov javdiá pe phuv pašýl reka (len') Iordáno, sykliakiri manušén te bolenpe te sykavén, so jone riskirdé péskiro džiibén ke Devél, sob (kaj) Jov te otmekél gréhi." 
Luke3:4 Syr isyn čhindló dre Isajoskire-prorokoskiri lylvarí, savó rakírla: “Ĥáda, isyn zan, saví déla gódla pe čhučí phuv: ‘Kerén drom Ráske-Devléske, čhuvén Léske mamúj drom;" 
Luke3:5 kažno dólo te javél pherdó, kažno bérga i bérgica te javén teledýr, kažno bangipen te javél roŭno i bangé dromá te javén gladka;" 
Luke3:6 kažno loč te udžinel pal Devléskiro zrakhibén.’” 
Luke3:7 Iáno ž rakirdiá buté manušénge, savé javénas te bolenpe ke jov: tumé san sapitko ródo! Kon sykliakirdiá tumen te našén Devléskire xoliátyr, so javéla syg?" 
Luke3:8 Kerén vari-so, sob (kaj) te javél mol, so tumé mekné te kerén gréhi i riskirdé péskiro džiibén ke Devél, i na duminen te rakirén péske: ‘Avraámo isyn dad amaró’, pal-dová so me rakiráva tuménge, so Devél moginéla dalendyr barendyr te ĥazdén čhavorén Avraamóske;" 
Luke3:9 ĥáda, uže tover isyn paštó pašýl kašteskiro kornjo (rukh), kažno kašt, so na déla lačhó barjakirdó (plódo), čingirena telé i čhurdena dre jag.”" 
Luke3:10 Manušá phučné Léstyr: “So ž aménge te kerás?” 
Luke3:11 I Iáno otphendiá lénge: “Konéste isyn duj ĥáda, te del jekh odoléske, konéste nane; i konéste isyn xabén, te kerél adiáke-pac'.”" 
Luke3:12 I mytoskire skedyibnarja javné te bolenpe i phendlé Léske: “Sykliakiribnáskiro! So aménge te kerás?” 
Luke3:13 “Na len butedýr lové, syr tuménge saštý (domekno) te len pir Zakóno.”" 
Luke3:14 Vari-savé xaladé adiáke-pac' phučné Léstyr: “A so ž aménge te kerás?” Jov phendiá xaladenge: “Na otlen zorjása nikonestyr, i na bangiakiren nikonés xohanés. Javén ráda daleske, so tuménge pleskirena.”" 
Luke3:15 Ne pal-dová so manušá užakirde i dumindle dro péskiro iló, so, xobi, Iáno isyn Kokoró Xristóso," 
Luke3:16 Iáno tedy otphendiá sarénge: “Me bolava tumen paniésa, ne pal mánde džála Odová, Kon isyn zoraledýr mándyr, so me na som mol až te rosphandav simirja Léskire ĥeritkonendyr, Jov javéla te bolel tumen Sventoné Duhósa i jagása;" 
Luke3:17 Léskiro ĥanadytko (lopata) isyn dro Léskiro vast, i Jov žužakirela Péskiri šúrna i skedéla parnó giv dre Péskiri piralý, a phus xačkiréla jagása, saví na murdjola.”" 
Luke3:18 I but javír jov sykliakirdiá manušén, i rosphendiá bahtalý zan (zvies')." 
Luke3:19 Jov, Iáno, adiáke-pac' vyrakirdia Irodoske, savó sys balunitko (tietrarho) pe doiá phuv, pal-dová so Irodo lyjá paloróm Irodiada, péskire-pšaléskire romniá i pal javír nalačhé léskire réndy;" 
Luke3:20 a Irodo iščo (inké) butýr kerdiá čoripén: jov čhudiá Ianos dro štaribén. 
Luke3:21 I sys adiáke: kiéli saré manušá boldepe, i Isúso tež boldiape i mangdiápe, bolybén otčhakirdiape," 
Luke3:22 i Svénto Dúho (Fáno) zgija pe Léste dro dyc'ly patrín (óbrazo) syr golumbo, i sys zan bolybnástyr, saví rakirdiá: “Tu san Miro drógo Čhavó, dre Túte isyn bari Mirí rádyma!”" 
Luke3:23 Kiéli Isúso lyjá te kerél Devléskiri butý, Léske sys trijánda berš; i, syr manušá dumindle, Jov sys Jozaskiro (Iosifoskiro) Čhavó," 
Luke3:24 a Joza sys Ilijaskiro čhavó, Ilíia sys Matfatoskiro čhavó, Matfato sys Lievijoskiro čhavó, Lievijo sys Mielhijoskiro čhavó; Mielhijo sys Ianajoskire čhavó; Ianajo sys Jozaskiro čhavó;" 
Luke3:25 Joza sys Matafijoskiro čhavó, Matafijo sys Amososkiro čhavó, Amoso sys Naumoskiro čhavó; Naumo sys Jeslimoskiro čhavó; Jeslimo sys Nagiejoskiro čhavó;" 
Luke3:26 Nagiejo sys Maafoskiro čhavó; Maafo sys Matafijeskiro čhavó; Matafijo sys Siemieinoskiro čhavó; Siemieino sys Jozaskiro čhavó; Joza sys Judáskiro čhavó; 
Luke3:27 Juda sys Joananoskiro čhavó; Joanano sys Risajoskiro čhavó; Risajo sys Zorovavieljoskiro čhavó; Zorovavieljo sys Salafiiljoskiro čhavó; Salafiiljo sys Nirijoskiro čhavó; 
Luke3:28 Nirijo sys Mielhijoskiro čhavó; Mielhijo sys Adijoskiro čhavó; Adijo sys Kasamoskiro čhavó; Kasamo sys Jelmadoskiro čhavó; Jelmado sys Iroskiro čhavó; 
Luke3:29 Iro sys Iosijáskiro čhavó; Iosija sys Jelijezeroskiro čhavó; Jelijezero sys Iorimoskiro čhavó; Iorimo sys Matfatoskiro čhavó; Matfato sys Lievijoskiro čhavó; 
Luke3:30 Lievijo sys Simieonoskiro čhavó; Simieono sys Judáskiro čhavó; Juda sys Jozaskiro (Iosifoskiro) čhavó; Joza sys Jonanoskiro čhavó; Jonano sys Jelmakimoskiro čhavó; 
Luke3:31 Jeliakimo sys Mielieajoskiro čhavó; Mielieajo sys Mainanoskiro čhavó; Mainano sys Matafijoskiro čhavó; Matafijo sys Nafanoskiro čhavó; Nafano sys Davidóskiro čhavó; 
Luke3:32 Davído sys Jesiejoskiro čhavó; Jesiejo sys Avidóskiro čhavó; Avido sys Vaozóskiro čhavó; Vaózo sys Salmonóskiro čhavó; Salmano sys Naasonóskiro čhavó; 
Luke3:33 Naasóno sys Aminadavóskiro čhavó; Aminadávo sys Adminoskiro čhavó; Admino sys Arnijoskiro čhavó; Arnijo sys Esromóskiro čhavó; Esrómo sys Fariesóskiro čhavó; Fariéso sys Judáskiro čhavó; 
Luke3:34 Juda sys Jakovóskiro čhavó; Jakovo sys Avraamóskiro čhavó; Avraámo sys Farijoskiro čhavó; Farijo sys Nahoroskiro čhavó; 
Luke3:35 Nahoro sys Sieruhoskiro čhavó; Sieruho sys Ragavoskiro čhavó; Ragavo sys Faliekoskiro čhavó; Falieko sys Jevieroskiro čhavó; Jeviero sys Salijoskiro čhavó; 
Luke3:36 Salijo sys Kainanoskiro čhavó; Kainano sys Arfaksadoskiro čhavó; Arfakieado sys Simoskiro čhavó; Simo sys Nojoskiro čhavó; Nojo sys Lamiehoskiro čhavó; Lamieho sys Mafusailoskiro čhavó; 
Luke3:37 Mafusailo sys Jenohoskiro čhavó; Jenoho sys Iariedoskiro čhavó; Iariedo sys Malielieiloskiro čhavó; Malielieilo sys Kainoskiro čhavó; 
Luke3:38 Kaino sys Jenososkiro čhavó; Jenoso sys Sifoskiro čhavó; Sifo sys Adamoskiro čhavó; Adamo sys Devléskiro čhavó. 
Luke4:1 Isúso sys pherdó Sventoné Duhósa i risijá Iordanostyr i Dúho (Fáno) lydžijá Les pe čhučí phuv," 
Luke4:2 kaj nálačho propatiakirelas Les štardešá dyvesá i Isúso nisó na xaja dre dolé dyvesá; a kiéli dalé dyvesá proginé, Jov zakamdiá te xal." 
Luke4:3 I phendiá Léske nálačho: “Kóli Tu san Devléskiro Čhavó, phen, sob (kaj) dalé bará te jačen marésa.”" 
Luke4:4 A Isúso otphendiá Léske: “Isyn čhindló: ‘Na marésa jekhésa dživéla manúš, a kažnoné lavésa, so vydžála Devléskire uštendyr.’”" 
Luke4:5 Tedy lydžijá Les nálačho pe vučí bérga, i sykadiá Léske sýges pal menta (minuta) saré svetóskire kralipená." 
Luke4:6 I nálačho phendiá Léske: “Me dáva Túke pravo pe saré dalé kralipená, i léngiri sláva, pal-dová so joj isyn dyný mánge, i me dáva la odoléske, konéske me kamám;" 
Luke4:7 ĥáda, saró javéla Tyró, kóli Tu pokloninesape mánge.”" 
Luke4:8 Isúso otphendiá Léske: “Isyn čhindló: ‘Devléske tyréske kloninpe i Léske jekhéske dynarin (služyn)’” 
Luke4:9 Tedy nálačho lydžijá Les dro Jerusalimo, i čhudiá Les pe Khangirjákiri stréha (čhakín), i phendiá Léske: “Kóli Tu san Devléskiro Čhavó, uhty, Kokoró, adathýr telé”," 
Luke4:10 pal-dová so isyn čhindló: “Jov déla priphenybén Jangolenge Peskirenge te zrakhél Tut; 
Luke4:11 i pe vastá jone lydžána Tut, sob (kaj) Tu te na obštavespe pir bar ĥerjasa Peskirjasa.”" 
Luke4:12 Isúso otphendiá Léske: “Isyn phendló: ‘Na propatiakir Ras-Devlés péskires.’” 
Luke4:13 Kiéli nálačho končyndia saré propatiakiribena, jov gijá krig Isusóstyr, užakiri javír časo." 
Luke4:14 Odothýr Isúso risijá dre Galiliéia. Jov sys pherdó Duhósa (Sventoné Duhósa); i mavlýn (malva) pal Léste rozgijápe pir sarí phuv, kaj Jov sys." 
Luke4:15 Jov sykliakirdiá dre sinagogi, i saré šarde Les." 
Luke4:16 Tén'ci Isúso javdiá dro Nazarieto, kaj Jov barija, i zagijá dre sinagoga dro sávato (subóta) pir Péskiro prisykliaiben, i lyjá te ginel" 
Luke4:17 prorokoskire-Isajoskiri lylvarí, saví Léske podyne; i Jov otkerdia lylvarí, tedy lathiá štéto, kaj sys čhindló:" 
Luke4:18 “Devléskire–Ráskiro Dúho (Fáno) isyn pe mánde; pal-dová so Jov vykedyjá Man te rosphenav bahtalý zan (zvies') bogenge i bičhadiá Man te phenáv vólia odolénge, savé isyn dro pliéno, te dykhén svéto kororenge; te otmekav pe vólia i te dzn vast odolénge, savén vérgi pritasade," 
Luke4:19 te rosphenav manušénge pal lačhó berš, dro savó Devél sykavéla Péskiri láska i tangipén (žalima) ke manušá.”" 
Luke4:20 Isúso zakerdia lylvarí, i kiéli Jov otdyjá pale rašáske, besciá; i saré, kon sys dre Khangirí, lyné rakhunes te dykhén pe Léste," 
Luke4:21 i ĥáda, Jov phendiá lénge: “Adadyvés kerdiápe ke kónco/iagóro (spolnindiape) Svénto Čhinybén, kiéli tumé šundlé les péskire kanenca.”" 
Luke4:22 I jone saré prilyné davá Léstyr i divindepe pe bahtalypén lavéndyr, savé Isúso rakirdiá i jone rakirdé: “Ci na Jov isyn Jozaskiro Čhavó?”" 
Luke4:23 Jov phendiá lénge: “Me (džinóm) džináv, so tumé Mánge phenéna: ‘Sastypnárie, vysastiakir Kokoró Pes! Ker davá-pac' adái, pe Péskiri phuv dová, so Tu kerdián dro Kapiernaumo, syr ame šundiám.’”" 
Luke4:24 I Isúso phendiá lénge: “Čačes, Me rakiráva tuménge: Manušá na kutiakirena ni savé prorokós pe péskiri phuv,"
